body:
and I wanted to send you a quick update about the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program I initially mentioned to you on September 7th. If you recall, I’ll rece I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. |
---
Peter,

**We’re just four days away from the end of the 3rd quarter** and I wanted to send you a quick update about the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program I initially mentioned to you on September 7th.

If you recall, I’ll receive an invitation to join this elite program run by the NRCC if I’m able to **raise $250,000** in a single three-month quarter. The program will open many opportunities I don’t currently have access to.

**On September 7th I wrote to you that I had $91,000 left to raise before September 30th; as of this morning, that number now stands at $19,000.**

I would be profoundly upset if we came this close to reaching our goal and fell just short of hitting it. **[We’re working around the clock to make sure that doesn’t happen, which is why I’m asking for your immediate help.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1ad4ee895c2c4b36a18b73054303abab&_e=FjRi_4ap0zl-zyLg482NYG3KJfagA6eWwN2qYzG1qQtljAF1KmqK0Y46uGXtafD0ua39XE8K4GMhtlfEfqF-saXrJxDezAMHx8_6hSdlT9C3t-7pXL5tyF38IjMrWGf5Obiu-bXFgwh7tx9jRNiw4X1bVQCs3vjcEOq-4q72-iAEOTrykM03-HyNgc9hQxplKxPRgD6NdgdbJkghNPzTFOTHNWGIX2tzo6Ap9777AvHaZbxw4CONHMr4wmYCzJG_aoPUr3YU3woHG404biHRx2d-p40J-d0qbwzB3EKTif-Ov5RZNHteTOaHPRw_qaD6VVsbCs99Jxf42fTLmN8gCooM67wL1FuTlBjD7dRSMAaz9vNZadAzvdzisDHhP9RiXjTzKBx315H-0fyXnU_fY2rQMGsmZwz68mGjQRh8qEkMjSWcFNIpCB9Hab3_M6TgjCRVPVFZWkMjhiBX5TRXuw%3D%3D)**

Peter,

Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “**Young Gun’s Program?** ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year.

I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and **[why I need your financial assistance to gain acceptance.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1ad4ee895c2c4b36a18b73054303abab&_e=FjRi_4ap0zl-zyLg482NYG3KJfagA6eWwN2qYzG1qQtljAF1KmqK0Y46uGXtafD0ua39XE8K4GMhtlfEfqF-saXrJxDezAMHx8_6hSdlT9C3t-7pXL5tyF38IjMrWGf5Obiu-bXFgwh7tx9jRNiw4X1bVQCs3vjcEOq-4q72-iAEOTrykM03-HyNgc9hQxplKxPRgD6NdgdbJkghNPzTFOTHNWGIX2tzo6Ap9777AvH0ew3aDLU2TMa-KnS15OiIJhXMfWMzbzgqnt_TKuKsKtiXXKkThaHw3YkPTNAQOGh_9ZmtbbSEG77M2M0gyPUrK0Ax8klT1arYNoNn88ejhExWadOKMtQn21brKqzi5zHuKrYKIQAW9Z7_avXklKRFkinhDCXgi90JtSzRNAOlr4crurVrOn6RuR0Fi38XCWewFz8am3fyJnBaNi9-zGwmqWMxWgH4g4U0L_JotCEk_w%3D%3D) **

The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. **Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C.** – and prove they can WIN.

**[If you’re a frequent flyer, you might equate it to elite-level status. Only the entrance fee for this program isn’t flying hundreds of thousands of miles per year, it’s raising $250,000 in one fundraising quarter.](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1ad4ee895c2c4b36a18b73054303abab&_e=FjRi_4ap0zl-zyLg482NYG3KJfagA6eWwN2qYzG1qQtljAF1KmqK0Y46uGXtafD0ua39XE8K4GMhtlfEfqF-saXrJxDezAMHx8_6hSdlT9C3t-7pXL5tyF38IjMrWGf5Obiu-bXFgwh7tx9jRNiw4X1bVQCs3vjcEOq-4q72-iAEOTrykM03-HyNgc9hQxplKxPRgD6NdgdbJkghNPzTFOTHNWGIX2tzo6Ap9777AvE2c6Iy7zURMKrOtgRYnQtKH_z4SJpTgDgHlZ8JZoXF82XdvAJqBxifKSSX6HgNxoS9m6QAYy32y7K7PxQ_dT5DWBwkP_bWHMPdhBVXjfsAFfNvzcNDspIr9QrCAox09qc4ygu45dXTtg-dVZNQdlG7plvYA3dSioFX7d4nPDg-ykBS9ZCzlstV4aRowCBuMwxoZ7BhtyrPdgzNll9tRVUz-Xi-4KSW8RYrlpI9wojTRQ%3D%3D)**

This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, **[I sincerely need all of the help I can get. But, with the deadline arriving fast at the end of this month my campaign is still short of hitting the threshold for entry by $74,920](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1ad4ee895c2c4b36a18b73054303abab&_e=FjRi_4ap0zl-zyLg482NYG3KJfagA6eWwN2qYzG1qQtljAF1KmqK0Y46uGXtafD0ua39XE8K4GMhtlfEfqF-saXrJxDezAMHx8_6hSdlT9C3t-7pXL5tyF38IjMrWGf5Obiu-bXFgwh7tx9jRNiw4X1bVQCs3vjcEOq-4q72-iAEOTrykM03-HyNgc9hQxplKxPRgD6NdgdbJkghNPzTFOTHNWGIX2tzo6Ap9777AvHc5qUhNlTVTbDvaZGAo2e4tZCytQkgcC1wbBP8-ntrLxdLAhUersGKHpgQ0rPO20NaiNt0WO6N-c5iFpc66Ks439XdHZEEvFWkdAGXxhPnyctr7nwtAx8VDY_RBFzGLNePY7mzTmvtmyejmLRgR6PR5x_tT0E9u5p56voe21dt8xvVInjCN27wxa5tXAXKsFANHqpMR0ijwmm-0cZiqZHz7TzST_qR2iQKaTjiL_0eEg%3D%3D)**.

If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘**Young Gun’** status this month with a **[contribution of $4 or more](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=1ad4ee895c2c4b36a18b73054303abab&_e=FjRi_4ap0zl-zyLg482NYG3KJfagA6eWwN2qYzG1qQtljAF1KmqK0Y46uGXtafD0ua39XE8K4GMhtlfEfqF-saXrJxDezAMHx8_6hSdlT9C3t-7pXL5tyF38IjMrWGf5Obiu-bXFgwh7tx9jRNiw4X1bVQCs3vjcEOq-4q72-iAEOTrykM03-HyNgc9hQxplKxPRgD6NdgdbJkghNPzTFOTHNWGIX2tzo6Ap9777AvG8aOSktdxZrzBcJF-yZXCqStXffsGbnusIzjTtYOT8urBgO00L2fQPKRQr2cC6NRhSTx9R5ZmLsOQkBVQaThH7e4pCh_4lFLK4dWS39xxgzTIDThrf92WvoWkxuMtzucdHbjjGEEP7oIZScwtOMKe52xHcdjdMATZUpQiCHJGDqnYDKFW3Ehkz05K78GrNUaqzVob1NokaXbV4BxcY0Uzw-n4pENQZra_cQP6C7_wTWQ%3D%3D)** to my campaign right now.

May I please count on your help right now?

If you recall, I’ll rece I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Peter, We’re just four days away from the end of the 3rd quarter and I wanted to send you a quick update about the NRCC’s “Young Guns” program I initially mentioned to you on September 7th. If you recall, I’ll receive an invitation to join this elite program run by the NRCC if I’m able to raise $250,000 in a single three-month quarter. The program will open many opportunities I don’t currently have access to. On September 7th I wrote to you that I had $91,000 left to raise before September 30th; as of this morning, that number now stands at $19,000. I would be profoundly upset if we came this close to reaching our goal and fell just short of hitting it. \-----Forwarded message----- From: Alek Skarlatos - info@alekfororegon.com Date: September 7, 2021 Subject: Quick email about my September goal To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Have you heard of the National Republican Congressional Committee’s “Young Gun’s Program? ” I hadn’t either until my first campaign for Congress last year. I’d like to give you an explanation as to what the purpose of the program is and The Young Guns program serves to help Republican candidates running in some of the most competitive districts around the country with a playbook on how to vanquish Democrat opposition, along with providing strategic support on everything from polling, fundraising, advertising and grassroots outreach. Membership is exclusive and serves to recognize candidates who have proven that they can raise enough money online to sustain their campaigns without help from Washington, D.C. – and prove they can WIN. This year, I’m aiming to be one of the first candidates to qualify for the program because with my race expected to be one of the closest in the nation for a second year in a row, . If you’re interested in making an investment in flipping the House Republican, you needn’t look further than this email. I’m asking you to help me secure ‘Young Gun’ status this month with a ** to my campaign right now. May I please count on your help right now? | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | With sincere thanks, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. body:
If I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate. | | |
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvg36pZ0Hq-XST_S9xnmi387mEgFoxqA6LsNozjCSkveNLn1e8qYv_PLvcYyGFPOASCy0ULVpYWi64m2K4bIwr3DmUP-D_MofGA7OSvYGD2syYgA9LRZz-qdBXmyM1yANHM_iKrQaG8fiaPMRw5FrPU9X_Bpr6I-sHgbcG_xLwV7mzdU2YLxM6LBc90PQ_WLtiYlimAAE8eK-sDe6zG3sMu_t-hDqhEpQmXQ4_2P8ZgaEGbOe6-mpyR2hhK5f4DM5ICcNRyd_KLUsWGab9hZf4mAPK7rUwaYxpeNimqL4MKKVd34ezPQlBLhcvgRvIDHjg/3fo/S2c2E1waSYKHlEODLHiJPQ/h0/K87dCtx_yUPR96Sq8LHsSuAqGdW_6vIkKYbCC-tfaOo) Derek,

I’m Catherine Cortez Masto, and I proudly represent Nevada in the U.S. Senate. Last election cycle, I worked tirelessly to defeat Mitch McConnell and help flip the Senate as the Chair of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, Senate Democrats’ campaign arm. Now, Mitch McConnell is making it crystal clear that he wants revenge.

In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a $25 donation between my campaign and Common Good VA to defend our hard-won Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvg36pZ0Hq-XST_S9xnmi38Njpumyh1NnFRK0viM6XzJXlv-n06U5-AnHDlMeUzQ2_ULe-t2puN0ZtcUgpXc-exDwzCBprYuUb10F2mb3TCWo12t_g45bL87xD7uMHoCtJVy0mu4Fgivzo-q_Sqi1wZ8KQbPTtEJnPO4yK3mM1I8UchK5Am2vXgbw5Ij8Cz5OBMGQfbommLrxjD8_KpIfhs0sBM0_ccIo4LjYwbBne_1PCZfaBCUPZeRcZ9KgVXYAAlSvBziU2d5rXQy89MCyJlHugGK6pV3jOjb8_C-yInJkr2qV8chwJYchJXpHjTwrA/3fo/S2c2E1waSYKHlEODLHiJPQ/h1/IlqjmSyn3LJ0OaqMwI3geMoP5YEeHujGa7l8WFJKAtA)** I hope you’ll let me explain – because if I lose this race, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.

I just got some urgent news that completely changes the state of my race, and I wanted you to be the first to know: **Mitch McConnell’s handpicked candidate has _officially_ announced his campaign to defeat me and take back the Senate for Republicans.**

CNN is reporting that my Senate seat is one of the most likely to flip and _The Cook Political Report_ just shifted this race in Republicans’ favor. Donald Trump nearly flipped Nevada in 2020, and the GOP and outside groups have already spent over $1 million this year to defeat me.

**That’s why my campaign just launched an emergency rapid-response goal to raise $50,000. Reaching this goal will help ensure we have the resources to defend this critical seat – and Common Good Virginia thought I should reach out. I’m counting on you to rush a donation to help us defend the Senate.[Please, will you split $25 between my campaign and Common Good VA right now to keep Nevada blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvg36pZ0Hq-XST_S9xnmi38Njpumyh1NnFRK0viM6XzJOlIydMISNhFYkHoGrSwe6REOCAXAhNEAWHyxo6HcS1K-0348zw3tWfwfgpe29REANYVhEniJC0kKg_z13c0-GpoQR2D13ZIrGUZKGyAhazoMdbjlwLW-3dwJjlw2EWuzesZpBEJEsuWZLdD_sWZ-2jfq-F4xOeQNbOKwPqScdoorm-ugRu77efvYw4AmfSYSs8XsXzsPGcIaGtIzmOUOsyy7x4EU2FejDy1XJrxEyqj5NTunIRp7uAf0JQc6ja4KXWtNCZknHDR3sMe-FqFD0w/3fo/S2c2E1waSYKHlEODLHiJPQ/h2/AEi7nTT7fW8ES8y0SnFCiJamrX8XkFlSRx8oqRuTSwo)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvg36pZ0Hq-XST_S9xnmi38Njpumyh1NnFRK0viM6XzJ4mm_2ylfA50aioJ3fbeWJZl_4w_23z0xdCZcC5UrQnm0Bjm_hLUD8GIKqgKbTVqhBbqj9jJiT3oXOtubSxLW5X8v2_QH_4cr_VV-SXTkXcxlqPsPQSHDGo5Z4xsPASLO6u6t_HPIlC2J13Iv4tYpogs3aYx94ndnGku3Et86Db8HlkIgs6QicAG1mi8yiGpeJkYLWJ5bNLZ17HmT3bEQkR165orJgHfWPE0kaJ4cI3DLIrCW4RZ8NWOG4U3ZVeMkCpZnDGxRH23mVEgh7bfMVQ/3fo/S2c2E1waSYKHlEODLHiJPQ/h3/_IAYlC5uIaDFuU4UcvHgMGjHfZZn4xGyO42qyIJrcnM)

[ Donate $100 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvg36pZ0Hq-XST_S9xnmi3-bewt3qjkhudEJgVj5m8F0MrHAXzk0cte-uShNv4yRBxYAtQxtXncVxK4LliatMdoJfu3XndkgC8Q_1P_raW8wJrdVKltqOEGSEgkzyPOTy8zgXbB8yUvKpQZBlsHIMkmwdfzdxSaGL9WZIHRp7jtn8-e3jzH7N36vvBwS0NCKjQ_cx15BRWq_nFJJ4vei1YeLGeLqzv_G_hGg9gtTQz2PrqryKMxTSA9dSvzv1mW-IUz8BZvoFoCIAurkDSUhxLMtTF0aSlALlzg5MT-dnPnyLyyo6rI3cweDJDkeyvRKq5XiwJrtH32n8OX_Sl8SHmw/3fo/S2c2E1waSYKHlEODLHiJPQ/h5/bPM4E1Q-qn2RDbHC3Uh3dtvrj6TLeU8AuCn3NDbTh8Y)
[ Donate other ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvg36pZ0Hq-XST_S9xnmi39I9RJyqIWjOKaQz6FR9h764xdeikLFySoxSfbbPyNaLoOAEhgXAggBkbfLDMsXVyVw12rMv1o0fXTYeTyazaev2YLjuygzWKrxym94I_duINGkeUjhkMnCm794TxoqtPD3ugR9UE_Yi81dyPPNIs6dfd-Wmt92NB8jg0tH70rtM84Q91szbIxjHKIjeEL1HfywWA-d5Y7cLXbE0gyHUDCz843tjTjhbBOfHyGcd-4ZhvDwFxGFlZPRhMUt1JGU_fbuNPyIhftKZMOaU0d9Ulnt2kKTJn6DBTIJVmPxI0AYJA/3fo/S2c2E1waSYKHlEODLHiJPQ/h6/w2q6-flReIEeEtdmd8ZhqebY9GM0XReeGuMuCYmJwHI) ** Nevada races are _always_ close, Derek: just 2 percentage points decided my race in 2016, and just 2 percentage points separated President Biden from Donald Trump last year.

Now that the GOP’s dark-money allies have a far-right, Trump-supporting extremist to throw their money behind and flip the only seat they need to regain Senate control, this race could be the most expensive in Nevada history.

I really mean it when I say the Senate majority will be decided in Nevada – and the only way I can win is with grassroots supporters like you.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you personally, Derek. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. But defending the Senate will take considerable resources – and right now I’m falling short of my emergency rapid-response goal. **[Please, before it’s too late, will you split a donation between my campaign and Common Good VA to help me win and defend the Senate majority?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4misVJqoYYv96WDbNd4mRZCGvg36pZ0Hq-XST_S9xnmi3_cY2jTqdY9bPhGH5zIrx4EQ9pCB4uSDGWW5pJOHooue93j8X03Bh8mPxnqE4Fj1SKU-QbXm5GzQUuWNuaVT6SIghSX1_7EzEpi6HbspEnOyre6JZHSfnOKuXmEEFvVi07-BXMV_Bt4d3373pIBudI1e4ElD3gAqGFYaMBMEWLHowMvU-HJApnyiFAFPuv9bLNmRu7qDK1KpK-CIbkW8UZlufp4r0mz-2P5OBDGiB8BVGaR814uNd2R-BNT5dJvzCvbQBW4kDvDnBcXx8SezGBAerJBCcbJzWRgFLQrVRxVAg/3fo/S2c2E1waSYKHlEODLHiJPQ/h7/zHja7lRsneic_G6HwObIWSHUS1or18pu8UrofzPde04)**

name: Wilmot HQ
subject: We have BIG news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Whole Lot of Folks for Wilmot Collins
body:
We have BIG news! Mike Cooney has ENDORSED Wilmot in his race against his opponent for Mayor of Helena. | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=e17031043582484a9d2d8244b9d008ff&_e=p3Vo7zAB0GXE60ukbTha0wz9m2b-a0dqPPccInC_jEYNP4s--vO7bzI6qEyQorXLJhL-nq4bU6sOBYBVyUdHWWRXEEm6tlP3UzmK9GPOAhAXMwxSmuDwwKfTP3P88YdkckfsFLbPszcjS6dGV9Fiz9PTNybP8bqN1vl4ClygzsNIWMMDZ2n5u4bqMuZ6vLPuiS84Mdw-uUa-ItlgWLbxn8We4hRv3Q8gZQhn0k9J_nT0YwMa0V61hEUZwsBzuDKBPuGoWmTQT7H-AZw5Y4V4eXTXEAH-n0GQWiveQmOt6z7fqJ5LME8SSAe125ZqV3TL_vsxw6KwNfLqLHiqlJqXucP0L-5T3No3EafCfMtSDaNMy65SKcVbY6y4jCU3WN0Aw-TAWO0GUJqr0Kriq_KcY-7IbEROozqulRXRTo9onRdvOJ3rhUSW3HjxhB0FMsFNrRDT4ffsmBuZ9TwWuq3eWDSwiRxV-MQkW_lVtThdsLo%3D) Hey friend,

**We have BIG news!**

Mike and DeeAnn Cooney have ENDORSED Wilmot in his race against his opponent for Mayor of Helena. As a former District Court judge and the previous Lieutenant Governor of Montana Mike and DeeAnn know the importance of having a strong leader and after having worked with Wilmot for years, they know that he is the right person for the job.

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: I'll Always Fight for Your Freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
| | Friend, **Ohio first means putting Ohioans, their families, and their FREEDOMS first.** When I’m elected Governor of this great state, I will always fight to protect your freedoms. That starts with saying NO to mask mandates.
---
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJw9jkuOgzAQRE8DO1t24--CRRJm7mHsNvGInwxMlNuPQdFIrS7pqbuqQqt6G1SdWmDAmQXNmARpKKdfWkvo2F2BErbrbpVgE_1JU8bZeZ-oX6b62YIBI4PjgRvBbeQqCPTCy6YooFH12D73fd2q5lbBd5kN_ZGRvtKcMZwmhX0sSVwyGZZfzPOSC45peO4XjBkxlLzchvWVxjFtSpc-w-TSeBVx0zqm-G4rfa8AjiOFIlcm2Aa908KT0qgnQjNHrBSRKCN75nlUksfzGB5l7-8V_z8_phTPmJPq7g94ulqy)

We can’t afford to lose a single seat -- Republicans only need to flip _five seats_ to regain control of the House. And we certainly can’t afford to lose Elaine.
Elaine has already earned a reputation as a representative who delivers results. She was ranked the second most effective Member of the House, and was integral in passing the American Rescue Plan, advancing the bipartisan infrastructure package, and she’s one of the leading Democrats fighting for accountability for January 6.

name: INDems HQ
subject: Indiana, we are with you.
body:
Hi there, This year, the Indiana Democratic Party has got to work and we proudly celebrate the track record Democratic champions like U.S. Congressman Andrè Carson and Frank Mrvan and state leaders like Greg Taylor, Phil GiaQuinta, Eddie Melton, David Niezgodski, J.D. Ford, Jean Breaux, Shelli Yoder, and Fady Qaddoura delivering for Hoosier families in all 92 counties. Even in this off year, Democrats were able to still create a better future for Hoosiers because we believe in solutions to today's problems, not extreme partisanship or conspiracy theories. However, we're close to beginning the start of the 2022 election year, and we'll need all your help to stand up against INGOP incumbents who were handed a new set of legislative maps that benefit their self-serving interests, not Hoosiers. I'll get more into specifics shortly, but Indiana Democrats are in for tough races for three big reasons:
1. Gerrymandering
2. The INGOP's seismic war chest
3. Indiana Republican's extreme partisanship and misinformation campaign

If we lose ANY Indiana House seat, we fall further behind from our goal to break the INGOP's supermajority for good. [_**Donate right now to help re-elect the Indiana Democrats that will fight for you like the Indiana Black Legislative Caucus who continues to call for reforming the state criminal justice system next year, Peter.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36528721/308356449/624230061?refcode=FR.09.27.21.&FR.09.27.21.=FR.09.27.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDQ5ZWI5NC04YTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZTNz90U-OOFBagmp3422xm_8-owI2Qv9TLoImnAXOg=) Let's break this down a bit more. First, the Indiana Republican Party has once again manipulated the redistricting process, choosing to back up their self-serving interests ahead of creating a better future for Hoosier families. Indiana Republicans hired a Washington D.C. Republican consultant to solidify this partisan process, and it means that they will further prioritize a form of extreme partisanship that diminishes Indiana's future. Second, while we don't know or cannot say yet who will run against Indiana Republicans in the general election, the INGOP will make the fight that much harder using a war chest that will outspend Democrats by double or triple the rate. Instead releasing their for Indiana, they will use millions of dollars to further stoke unnecessary culture wars that divide our families and communities across the state. Their actions show they've lost their identity and they'll issue carpetbagging media campaigns to distract voters from this very fact. Which brings up to the third reason we're worried: The new gerrymandered maps will embolden Indiana Republicans to abide by their extreme partisanship and efforts that are only rooted in fear, misinformation, and conspiracy theories. They'll use their large war chest to deploy this strategy to voters with the goal to make Hoosiers vote out of fear rather than for more common-sense policies that create better opportunities for our families, like expanded broadband access, fully-funded public schools, and jobs that provide workers a livable wage. Everything we said above may seem dark, but there's one thing Indiana Republicans do not have: a record of delivering for families. Indiana Democrats firmly believe that when we come together as a Party and campaign on the American Rescue Plan, President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda, and issues at home like teacher pay and fully-funding public schools, Democrats will win. We will strongly support Democratic candidates and they are counting on every one of us to have their backs in 2022. Let's show our dedicated Democratic fighters that same fierce dedication, Peter! Donate to support and elect Democratic candidates up-and-down the ballot in next year's pivotal general elections: [**Donate Now**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36528728/308356456/624230061?refcode=FR.09.27.21.&FR.09.27.21.=FR.09.27.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDQ5ZWI5NC04YTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DZTNz90U-OOFBagmp3422xm_8-owI2Qv9TLoImnAXOg=) Thank you so much, INDems HQ Indiana Democratic Party

name: Eddie Geller
subject: Let’s flip FL-15 blue and help Democrats hold the House
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
If you’re anything like me (cares about the future of our country, invested in Democrats’ success up and down the ballot, a User of the Internet), you’re probably getting a million emails about the end-of-quarter deadline coming up in just 3 days. | Hey friend. If you’re anything like me (cares about the future of our country, invested in Democrats’ success up and down the ballot, a User of the Internet), you’re probably getting a million emails about the end-of-quarter deadline coming up in just 3 days. But I wanted to make sure you saw the one my team sent you on Friday, because everything they said is true, especially and most importantly this: With help from grassroots supporters like you, we can win this race. [_**So, contribute now to make your impact and flip this seat blue in 2022!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36530042/308359030/-1145359469?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210927eoq2_EG_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjkwMDJiMS04ZjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EgVtFdo3rMs5KicXCwj-2s6FRpBH4ywyTKlwdZde6o=) [_****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36530043/308359031/-1145359469?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210927eoq2_EG_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjkwMDJiMS04ZjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EgVtFdo3rMs5KicXCwj-2s6FRpBH4ywyTKlwdZde6o=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36530044/308359032/-847830491?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210927eoq2_EG_all_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjkwMDJiMS04ZjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EgVtFdo3rMs5KicXCwj-2s6FRpBH4ywyTKlwdZde6o=)

Also, this deadline is a real thing! It’s the first time that the FEC (the federal agency that regulates campaign finance) releases fundraising totals to the public, which makes it the first time that allies and opponents alike will be able to gauge our strength.
It has Massive ImplicationsTM for the months ahead. We’ve laid a strong foundation in the first month of this campaign, so I’m not worried (just kidding, I’m _always_ worried because, well, have you seen the state of our planet? Also, I’m Jewish and a worrier by nature), but [if you make one $10 or $20 donation to help us get to our goal of _500 small-dollar donations_ (we’re at 283 so far), we’ll be that much closer to beating Scott Franklin and flipping this seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36530045/308359033/-1145359469?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210927eoq2_EG_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjkwMDJiMS04ZjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_EgVtFdo3rMs5KicXCwj-2s6FRpBH4ywyTKlwdZde6o=)

name: Jasmine Beach-Ferrara
subject: Here's why we organize:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
Organizing is real work. And it takes real resources. Honestly, that’s why not every campaign prioritizes it.

|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36531147/308362755/459488397?refcode=jas_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjQ5Y2ZkMS05MjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tltBZiLzRaI6w24IK1llzT0aNWtH7p15WxvluS_Aqnk=)

| | _I’m hoping you’ll**[chip in $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36531149/308362767/1030732756?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_210927_FR_EOQ4OrganizingToWin_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjQ5Y2ZkMS05MjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tltBZiLzRaI6w24IK1llzT0aNWtH7p15WxvluS_Aqnk=) **to our grassroots campaign to replace Republican Madison Cawthorn. **Here’s how we’ll win:**_ Folks, I’m an organizer and a minister. I know that listening is just as important as talking -- usually more so. I know that leadership means walking and working alongside people -- not keeping distant. I know that trust builds through relationships and over time -- and once it’s there, it binds us to each other forever. That’s why I know that our organizing-focused campaign can win. We’re going to walk alongside people who are struggling and feel left behind, listen to those who feel unheard, and empower as many people as possible to make their voices heard by casting a ballot. Organizing is real work. And it takes real resources. Honestly, that’s why not every campaign prioritizes it. But it’s non-negotiable for us. And I’m ready to get started. clean_body: Organizing is real work. And it takes real resources. Honestly, that’s why not every campaign prioritizes it. | = | | I’m hoping you’ll= to our grassroots campaign to replace Republican Madison Cawthorn. Here’s how we’ll win: Folks, I’m an organizer and a minister. I know that listening is just as important as talking -- usually more so. I know that leadership means walking and working alongside people -- not keeping distant. I know that trust builds through relationships and over time -- and once it’s there, it binds us to each other forever. That’s why I know that our organizing-focused campaign can win. We’re going to walk alongside people who are struggling and feel left behind, listen to those who feel unheard, and empower as many people as possible to make their voices heard by casting a ballot. Organizing is real work. And it takes real resources. Honestly, that’s why not every campaign prioritizes it. But it’s non-negotiable for us. body:
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c4ebb4b035d2c516/bcfa42c7e3d2408ac3d6b838967d376c/34143) Peter, America has seen Joe Biden’s true colors – he's certainly no uniter, as he proclaimed he would be, and he has FAILED the American people. His “leadership” has been disastrous and this White House is in full-on spin mode. **From his _pathetic handling of the Afghanistan withdrawal_ to the _border crisis_ to his _tyrannical and unconstitutional vaccine mandates_ , Joe Biden has proven that he is UNFIT TO SERVE as our nation’s President and Commander-in-Chief!** I’m leading the charge in Washington to stop the Biden agenda and hold him accountable. _And I’m counting on YOUR HELP to fuel our fight at this critical time!_ **[Please rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 End-of-Quarter donation to help us reach our goal.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c4ebb4b035d2c516/13964b93f1d82140c3d6b838967d376c/34143)** [**PITCH IN HERE >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c4ebb4b035d2c516/38cb066a265f9699c3d6b838967d376c/34143) Joe Biden’s vaccine mandates are an assault against small businesses, when so many are already struggling to recover after being crushed by the pandemic. His executive order will hinder productivity and efforts to rebuild our workforce, and OSHA is circumventing normal rule-making procedures to force it on us. This federal overreach cannot be tolerated – I’m pursuing legislative action to STOP Biden’s mandates from taking effect, including stripping funding from the Department of Labor, and I’m weighing legal action as well. I’m counting on top supporters like YOU to support our efforts, and we still have a way to go to reach our grassroots goal before our deadline this Thursday. So please, pitch in what you can today. Even just a few dollars will be a big help. Together, I know we can get the job done to DEFEND OUR FREEDOM! Sincerely, Kevin Hern [**PITCH IN HERE >>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c4ebb4b035d2c516/df61007a232e6e5ac3d6b838967d376c/34143) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c4ebb4b035d2c516/e90d3e592235465ac3d6b838967d376c/34143) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/282e4263e04f74c17c94c760ea83e7c0/34143/c4ebb4b035d2c516/f1feef7764d56fc9c3d6b838967d376c/34143)

| | Hello Derek,

I’m afraid Donald Trump is back.

Less than a year after grassroots donors and volunteers across the country delivered a resounding defeat to Donald Trump in the 2020 election, Trumpism has reared its ugly head once more — this time in Virginia.

Four times now, Donald Trump has announced a full-throated endorsement of Glenn Youngkin, the self-funding extreme Republican nominee for the Governor’s race who has already spent millions of his own dollars buying the primary election.

**_[Let me tell you, Trump's extreme Republican cronies will stop at nothing to get his hand-picked candidate elected Governor. Help my friend Terry McAuliffe take on Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate by making a $20 donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36532452/308368645/-2023814932?refcode=20210927.1_HRC_9FR&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ5Y2ZkMS05MjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l-HVyaR1zJ_9pjFrFIuB9KY_xxiWaYTTOp0_bhzPaTw=)_**

As we saw during the events of January 6th, leaving Trumpism unchecked in any corner of our country is not an option.

It’s on us to fight back against the return of Trumpism. We must unite behind a proven leader like Terry McAuliffe, who has taken on Republican extremism before — and won.

**_[Please, pitch in $20 or whatever you can to help Terry defeat Trumpism in Virginia for good.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36532456/308368648/-2023814932?refcode=20210927.1_HRC_9FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ5Y2ZkMS05MjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l-HVyaR1zJ_9pjFrFIuB9KY_xxiWaYTTOp0_bhzPaTw=)_**

Believe me — I know a dangerous, self-funding, Republican extremist when I see one.

– Hillary | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36532462/308368655/-2023814932?refcode=20210927.1_HRC_9FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQ5Y2ZkMS05MjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l-HVyaR1zJ_9pjFrFIuB9KY_xxiWaYTTOp0_bhzPaTw=)

subject: Mark Pukita Zoom Town Hall On Wednesday @ NOON!!
body:
Hey, Patriot!

Are you glad that you don't have Rob Portman as your Senate candidate choice in 2022? Would you like to meet the candidate that was willing to primary him- and take him on? Would you like to be able to vote for a fighter?

This is your invite to come **meet Mark Pukita** Wednesday, September 29th noon- on ZOOM or on your phone- **right from the comfort of your home or on your lunch break.** We are calling it Brown Bag lunch with Mark.

If you have already met Mark and agree that he IS THE CANDIDATE, please share this and invite others. Let's make patriotism cool again!

<https://us02web.zoom.us/j/8272648268>
Meeting ID: 827 264 8268
One tap mobile
+13126266799,,8272648268# US (Chicago)

God bless America and draw her back to her roots and Him,

Linda Kelly

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Our majority in the House of Delegates is at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/c_YpEloqN5tICScGcvvQx8lhH3D1xRHPz_GcoGYrPX8=/7QFXtvaZdA1WxzIyY-Klws6KacYBAltiUBApbGFMnb4=)
---
Friend, The incredible progress we've made over the past two years is on the ballot this November, and in order to protect our narrow majority in the House of Delegates, we must re-elect Delegate Rodney Willett in Henrico County. From advocating for mental healthcare initiatives to protecting our environment, Rodney has worked tirelessly for the interests of everyday Virginians. It has been a pleasure to have him in the legislature, and we must do everything we can to make sure he is able to continue serving the people of his district. In 2019, Rodney had one of the closest races in the Commonwealth, and his same opponent from two years ago is challenging him again in what will surely be one of the closest races this year. [**That 's why I'm asking you for your support today! Will you stand with me by supporting Rodney Willett?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/c_YpEloqN5tICScGcvvQx8lhH3D1xRHPz_GcoGYrPX8=/7QFXtvaZdA1WxzIyY-Klws6KacYBAltiUBApbGFMnb4=) Glenn Youngkin and out-of-state Republican groups plan to spend thousands of dollars to turn out their base in Rodney's district, putting our narrow majority at risk. [**Please chip in what you can before our September fundraising deadline so we can re-elect Rodney Willett and secure our Blue Majority this November!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/c_YpEloqN5tICScGcvvQx8lhH3D1xRHPz_GcoGYrPX8=/7QFXtvaZdA1WxzIyY-Klws6KacYBAltiUBApbGFMnb4=) Thank you for your support. Take care, Ralph Northam

subject: Did you see this? Critical Race Theory is a poison

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JKdc29aHH57lOZefUSFRZnuw7C8_Op66I6yNSPUXA-wXuQIPTYxrK02iw9mbND1Hc6ZktDqQ6fzXr8iSvZ_7OPnlwRl9H1RBcp1MWBmZLc49il7EMhu0orOrfUvSeiNpcTSq6cv-Vn8dHUfeAUL9qSLINC8JwgcFvZtimXnui-8qEpSQgE9phw==&c=xdl8OXDq1eRkPoJ4bzox5fAGqeUwYfFln9iXGGAcbuMTQ97Jq8JXag==&ch=NI2zDZkusKyefRmXu7PO1d5TWtApIHzb18ar0Y-m4jjCh4-R5EvNEQ==)

---
| Peter,
---
| Critical Race Theory is a poison that has NO PLACE in our schools, in our military, or anywhere else in the country for that matter...
School boards are actively pushing to indoctrinate our children with this nonsense, and disgraced general and attempted coup leader Mark Milley even wants America's heroes to be forced to read up on CRT!
Dividing Americans along racial lines was despicable in the past, and it's just as despicable now...[let's stop their Marxist ideology dead in its tracks!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JKdc29aHH57lOZefUSFRZnuw7C8_Op66I6yNSPUXA-wXuQIPTYxrK02iw9mbND1Hc6ZktDqQ6fzXr8iSvZ_7OPnlwRl9H1RBcp1MWBmZLc49il7EMhu0orOrfUvSeiNpcTSq6cv-Vn8dHUfeAUL9qSLINC8JwgcFvZtimXnui-8qEpSQgE9phw==&c=xdl8OXDq1eRkPoJ4bzox5fAGqeUwYfFln9iXGGAcbuMTQ97Jq8JXag==&ch=NI2zDZkusKyefRmXu7PO1d5TWtApIHzb18ar0Y-m4jjCh4-R5EvNEQ==)

| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JKdc29aHH57lOZefUSFRZnuw7C8_Op66I6yNSPUXA-wXuQIPTYxrK02iw9mbND1Hc6ZktDqQ6fzXr8iSvZ_7OPnlwRl9H1RBcp1MWBmZLc49il7EMhu0orOrfUvSeiNpcTSq6cv-Vn8dHUfeAUL9qSLINC8JwgcFvZtimXnui-8qEpSQgE9phw==&c=xdl8OXDq1eRkPoJ4bzox5fAGqeUwYfFln9iXGGAcbuMTQ97Jq8JXag==&ch=NI2zDZkusKyefRmXu7PO1d5TWtApIHzb18ar0Y-m4jjCh4-R5EvNEQ==)

| The Left wants our children, our workers, and even the brave soldiers who risk their lives for America to hate themselves and the color of their skin.
Don't let them divide us, or even for one second tell us that this great nation is some irredeemable, racist dystopia...
The only thing that would make that the case is more spread of their CRT propaganda! Hey Peter.
Almost exactly one month ago, we launched this campaign to bring new leadership to Tennessee.
At every step of the way since then, I’ve been humbled by the response from Tennesseans like you — whether you’ve come to one of the stops on our 95 County Tour, or responded to our survey to tell us what matters most to you in Tennessee’s next governor, or gave your hard-earned dollars to fuel this campaign, I’m so proud to have your support.
I’ve said it a hundred times already, but it never gets old: This is _**our**_ campaign. It’s a collective movement of people all across our great state to reclaim what is ours and bring dignity, compassion, and honesty back to the governorship.
[**Our first big fundraising deadline is coming up at the end of this month — exactly a week from now — and we’ve got to make sure we show how strong this grassroots movement is by gathering as many small-dollar donations as possible. Can you pitch in $10 or $20 to fuel this grassroots campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36544136/308400967/-1314262958?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210927eoq2_TM_all_xx_l2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmUzMTA5NS1hMjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ewguQ7bnjLZU5aJQ2vOfCjGEFA637Q9pUACrmbQD8b4=)

For far too long, our elected leaders — especially Gov. Bill Lee — have pushed aside the needs of real Tennesseeans. Families like yours and mine have been completely abandoned in favor of lies, culture wars, and conspiracy theories.
**If we’re going to make Tennessee a place where everyone thrives — no matter where you’re from, what you look like, or how you’re raised — we’ve got to bring power back to the people. That’s what this campaign is all about.**

name: Eden & Megan
subject: Are you still with us, Peter?
body:
We’re far from a mega-donor super PAC.

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36544279/308401791/1300596418?refcode=210927_FR_nondonorsfirsttime_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczOWQ1ZjJiLWEzMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k3vZZRZ3OeIgGzfJT3n3ik-DEk9ujThIQQvj1o5jK8k=)
---
Peter,

Thank you so much for being a part of our email list and listening to our messages about why it’s so critical that we break the socioeconomic barriers to entry for the working class.

This is a small, scrappy organization created as a passion project by three progressive women, including two women of color, who are tired of seeing working-class candidates left behind when it comes to running for public office or becoming successful in the professional world.

Our fight starts with providing financial assistance, training, and support to Democratic candidates and campaigns seeking to run for public office, as well as ensuring that ethical labor practices are being implemented in the Democratic political space by demanding paid internships and livable wages.

We’re so proud of the work that we’re doing and all of the achievements we’ve made for our working-class candidates and their campaigns who come to us with little to no resources.

**But we’re not some mega-donor super PAC -- we rely solely on grassroots donors like you to continue building our people-powered movement. And we need to know you’re still with us in this fight.**

[**We’ve noticed that you’ve engaged with our emails and seem to support our cause, but that you haven’t had the chance to make your first contribution yet. Will you take the next step and make your first contribution of $10 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36544280/308401792/1300596418?refcode=210927_FR_nondonorsfirsttime_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczOWQ1ZjJiLWEzMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k3vZZRZ3OeIgGzfJT3n3ik-DEk9ujThIQQvj1o5jK8k=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **______[DONATE $10 →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36544281/308401793/1300596418?refcode=210927_FR_nondonorsfirsttime_EL&expres_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczOWQ1ZjJiLWEzMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k3vZZRZ3OeIgGzfJT3n3ik-DEk9ujThIQQvj1o5jK8k=)** **______[OTHER AMOUNT →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36544282/308401794/1300596418?refcode=210927_FR_nondonorsfirsttime_EL&expres_lane=true&amount=othr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczOWQ1ZjJiLWEzMWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=k3vZZRZ3OeIgGzfJT3n3ik-DEk9ujThIQQvj1o5jK8k=)** This is people-powered movement that can only work if you're in it with us. **_Eden & Megan_**

clean_body: We’re far from a mega-donor super PAC. | | | = Peter, Thank you so much for being a part of our email list and listening to our messages about why it’s so critical that we break the socioeconomic barriers to entry for the working class. This is a small, scrappy organization created as a passion project by three progressive women, including two women of color, who are tired of seeing working-class candidates left behind when it comes to running for public office or becoming successful in the professional world. Our fight starts with providing financial assistance, training, and support to Democratic candidates and campaigns seeking to run for public office, as well as ensuring that ethical labor practices are being implemented in the Democratic political space by demanding paid internships and livable wages. We’re so proud of the work that we’re doing and all of the achievements we’ve made for our working-class candidates and their campaigns who come to us with little to no resources. But we’re not some mega-donor super PAC -- we rely solely on grassroots donors like you to continue building our people-powered movement. And we need to know you’re still with us in this fight. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ____= __= This is people-powered movement that can only work if you're in it with us. With Mitch McConnell and the national GOP already targeting Michael, we can bet they’ll pore over our fundraising numbers with a fine-toothed comb.
Your support is key to Michael’s people-powered grassroots campaign. So, even if you donate just to help me win this bet — _which I hope you do!_ — you’ll also help Michael win re-election and continue fighting for Colorado.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
If we fail, Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy will turn Washington over to an authoritarian cult of personality beholden not to our democracy, but to a man in Mar-a-Lago — Donald Trump. |
#
Derek, Washington has been busy lately — as we negotiate over voting rights, reconciliation, and a budget deal to keep the government open. That doesn’t leave much time for campaigning. But it is absolutely critical that we don’t fall short of Thursday’s FEC deadline goal. And if I’m being honest, as a party, we’re not where we need to be right now. We saw an absolute tidal wave of donations come through earlier this month before the California recall — I know it’s hard to imagine feeling that same urgency for midterm elections more than a year away. But here is the truth: Early investment gives a decided advantage in winning the key races we need to build on our House and Senate majorities. With just a one seat advantage in the Senate and a handful in the House, we have no margin for error. **If we fail, Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy will turn Washington over to an authoritarian cult of personality beholden not to our democracy, but to a man in Mar-a-Lago — Donald Trump.** That means we can’t afford to fall short of Thursday’s deadline. We just can’t. **Can you rush a donation of $3, $10, or whatever you can afford right now? These donations may not seem like much, but when thousands of people are pitching in together, we are a force to be reckoned with. Please chip in today.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36545010/308405398/581033598?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20210927_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjVmOWM4MS1hMzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCbGdqxtxT4LQw9WeN8_l1Dx43m1PAbyBuRlcTRDDvQ=)

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: a small price to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
I can’t stress this enough:
#

Folks,
From day one, I’ve been adamant that I wouldn't take a penny from corporate PACs, corporate lobbyists, or the fossil fuel industry. And there’s a reason for that.
It’s because I’ve experienced first-hand how awful and terrifying it is to be sold out by a government meant to protect us.
I realize that we’ve sent a lot of messages recently, especially about our upcoming FEC deadline.
**But folks, I can’t stress this enough: your support is critical to our work — because this campaign belongs to working people and families.**
[So can you pitch in today to keep our Senate blue? $3 is a small price to pay to give Pennsylvania working families the champion they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36545208/308406661/-353695395?refcode2=1392bc5a-a41f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&refcode=em210927-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzkyYmM1YS1hNDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=am8i_9J05vL1ImBcbmvo7BIopfeJQAMntHY9xoN8VVw=)

And there’s a reason for that. It’s because I’ve experienced first-hand how awful and terrifying it is to be sold out by a government meant to protect us. I realize that we’ve sent a lot of messages recently, especially about our upcoming FEC deadline. But folks, I can’t stress this enough: your support is critical to our work — because this campaign belongs to working people and families. = = If you didn’t know, FEC deadlines are federally mandated. And after they pass we must publish a public-facing report that shows how much our campaign has raised over a certain period of time. Once our opponents get their hands on our report, they’re looking for one thing, and one thing only: If we have what it takes to beat them. body:

Folks,

**_I have hope for my Liberal friends ...jellyfish have survived for more than 165 million years without a brain, so there is hope for a few of them._**

Just going over the numbers so far and it's looking like it could be one of my worst months in recent memory. I'm not asking for much, but a few dollars would go a long way in gearing up for the 2022 Election cycle.

**[If you are on my team and have a brain, unlike the D.C. Radicals, then I'm asking for a quick donation to get us situated for this month. We just might beat out Chuck Schumer if we hurry!](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58869824:W2AykNHXN:m:1:1155937413:1B2C54A28C4F2F40C294F8A774291C58:r)**

name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Leaders can fight climate change and create jobs with the CCC.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721]

Dear Friend,

Our partners, ReImagine Appalachia and Appalachian Voices, are working to create a more sustainable future for our region. To do this, they are asking Congress to pass the Revive the CCC Act. It will revitalize and modernize the Civilian Conservation Corps (CCC), which was originally created as part of the New Deal in 1933 as an environmental work relief program. This new legislation was introduced by three Democratic members of Pennsylvania’s congressional delegation — U.S. Reps. Dwight Evans, Susan Wild, and Conor Lamb — as well as Rep. Ann M. Kuster from New Hampshire.

While America is suffering from employment loss due to the pandemic and increasingly intense natural disasters due to climate change, we believe this is a smart and necessary solution to tackling both pressing issues.

A modern CCC could play a vital role in the future of Appalachia in the following ways:

- Studies have shown that revitalizing and updating the CCC into a modern-day employment, job training and conservation program could employ tens of thousands of people in the Appalachian region alone.

- If crafted correctly, it could be an important source of living wage jobs and apprenticeship prep training, building pathways towards family sustaining careers for underserved communities by prioritizing employment to Black and Indigenous people of color, low-income workers, rural workers, and returning citizens.

- It would assist with carbon absorption by restoring wetlands, planting millions of diverse, native plants and trees, and removing invasive trees and shrubs, potentially absorbing over 20% of all carbon emissions from the Appalachian region alone.

Current support of the CCC is driven by legislators in western states ravaged by fires, but our area of the country is flooding. We want to make sure the legislation recognizes both challenges. Read ReImagine Appalachia's letter [https://reimagineappalachia.org/civilian-conservation-corps-memo-to-congress/] to Congress for more ways the act can help our area of the nation.
Now is the perfect time to make sure our region is a priority in CCC discussions. Below are several resources and ways for you to get involved today:

- Reach out to your congresspeople to tell them that you support the CCC.
- Follow @newdeal4us or the hashtag, #REVIVEtheCCC to join in the conversation.
- Retweet this op-ed that was published by Braddock Councilwoman Tina Doose about the ways in which a revitalized CCC would help her community and beyond.
- Read and share this new issue brief by Ted Boettner, Senior Researcher for the Ohio River Valley Institute and Stephen Herzenberg, Executive Director of Keystone Research Center. This blog explores the many facets of CCC legislation and the opportunity that stems from revitalizing this program in the Appalachian region.

Please also join ReImagine Appalachia at noon on Tuesday, September 28, for a webinar to learn more about what’s happening in Congress and how you can take action to influence the outcome.

Register for this event [https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A__secure.everyaction.com_pJq29KFis0KjVi-2DxL1RWpw2&d=DwMDaQ&c=euGZstcaTDllvimEN8b7jXrwqOf-v5A_CdpgnVfiiMM&r=naj0pmAHUY1PS-bdTfK9QzCbLsEk5pxua6PScpjaTAU&m=7cKD8d2YTMVnO7XYmiFO6fDidrBeOUNULkLEcpy2Vtk&s=LJmDMHKJ7AAXI63AnlJKZyCofQIAusV949leR45WR08&e=] here [https://secure.everyaction.com/pJq29KFis0KjVi-xL1RWpw2] .

In solidarity,

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

That's why this fundraising goal might be the most important one of our campaign. This report will be our first major fundraising filing with the FEC after our campaign launch July 30, 2021. We need the strongest possible showing to build momentum to oust Matt Gaetz and Desantis next November. We're asking now that you match what you've previously given, if you're able, and that you get two friends to share and donate, too. | | | | | | | You can also donate via , or shop for merchandise at our To keep from bombarding you with fundraising notices, I'll only ever send these emails near the end of the quarter if we're still less than 65% of our way to meeting our goal. name: =?utf-8?Q?Allison=20Russo?=
subject: It's the LAST WEEK before voting begins, !
body:
Help us talk to voters before they cast their ballot ⏰ | | | |
---
---
|
### UNTIL POLLS CLOSE ON ELECTION DAY
---
| | | Hi ,

We only have **one weekend left before early voting begins** in the OH-15 special election. We don't have any time to waste between now and Election Day, and we need your help.

We've knocked on over 30,000 doors so far, but we have a big goal coming up this weekend and we won't be able to reach it without you. **, can you help us knock on 10,000 doors this weekend before early voting begins?**
---
|
---
| [TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=dcfbcc90e2&e=400a181d5a "TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS")
---
| Research shows that field programs are especially important in special elections, where turnout is typically low and there is not incumbency advantage. **But we can't take advantage of the unique dynamics of this special election without your help.**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3478400463&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=f384643a13&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"
|
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=167542c54c&e=400a181d5a)
---
### SIGN UP: [Adopt a Precinct](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=46f03f3df1&e=400a181d5a)
When you adopt a precinct, you become a trusted local messenger for the campaign in your community. **This is a great way to keep canvassing safely during Covid-19 if you aren't comfortable with big launches. **You can adopt a precinct on your own or claim one with a friend! We also do group trainings for those who want their organization to claim a couple precincts! _The deadline to adopt a precinct is October 5th_.
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5edf353cc4&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Veterans Roundtable in Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=999bf86570&e=400a181d5a)[, Monday at 6pm](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=eecb6096e6&e=400a181d5a)
Join State Rep. Allison Russo, the ODP Veterans Caucus, and fellow veterans for a conversation on issues impacting veterans and military families in central Ohio. Panel discussion with Q&A to follow.
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=92b777e45d&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")
---
| |
### _**We need you to help spread the word, .**_
_**Can you forward this email to ten neighbors, get a group of friends together to come to a meet and greet, or help us talk to voters soon?**_
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4ada894f26&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=3a5ba2deb9&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=5db37cc330&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](AllisonRusso.com)
---
|
---

**Our mailing address is:**
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=568b0c62e3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=568b0c62e3).

name: Team Palmer
subject: What happened in Texas...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Palmer for Illinois
body:
Nancy Pelosi called it “the most extreme, dangerous abortion ban in half a century, and its purpose is to destroy Roe v. Wade, and even refuses to make exceptions for cases of rape and incest. This ban necessitates codifying Roe v. Wade.” And she’s right. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36550066/308426958/-2098736573?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzRlM2E0Ny1iMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IgSpfrdg-_WvEMtFM14ck2oHaniGYutK1hKbYjNnlEU=&emci=d7fe2eba-a81f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=634e3a47-b01f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=21852952) | Peter, It’s always been clear that we need Democrats in charge. **But after the unconstitutional abortion ban in Texas was passed, it became clearer than ever.** Nancy Pelosi called it “the most extreme, dangerous abortion ban in half a century, and its purpose is to destroy Roe v. Wade, and even refuses to make exceptions for cases of rape and incest. This ban necessitates codifying Roe v. Wade.” And she’s right, Peter. That’s why we are incredibly grateful to Rep. Pelosi and her House colleagues for passing a bill on Friday to protect a person’s right to abortion. It was disappointing (but not surprising) to see that Rodney Davis voted against codifying Roe v. Wade into law. name: Chief James Craig Team
subject: they stormed our event
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) Peter, **It 's official: Gretchen Whitmer has a challenger for Michigan Governor that has the Democrats shaking in their boots.** Someone who is not a politician. Someone who has a record of serving the people of Michigan and getting real results. Someone even the Detroit News is talking about as a challenger that will leave the Democrats flat-footed. So who is this candidate? **It 's Chief James Craig, the former Detroit police chief and Michigan's next governor...** How do we know they're scared?****_They sent a group of thugs to rush the stage and try to disrupt our announcement event in Detroit. _ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) **That 's right, on national television they tried to take over our event and tried to shout the chief down.** _Believe me, as Chief of Police in Detroit, Chief Craig has taken on much tougher groups than this._ There is no way they're going to deter him from taking on Gretchen Whtimer, and there is NO WAY THEY ARE GOING TO STOP US FROM MAKING REAL CHANGES to the way things are run.
This chief is going to stand up. **[Will you make a donation right now and stand up with him?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r)**
Let us tell you a little bit about why his entry into the race this month is turning heads across Michigan... and across the country.
Before he had even declared that he was running, Tucker Carlson invited Chief Craig on his show. They talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and you should see what Tucker had to say about his time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020: _" When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters."_ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) His 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order. See, the Chief grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, seeing tanks rolling down the streets and snipers on the roofs. He was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. He saw that happen. **Since he 's been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated.**
When he came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. The Chief started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. He made it an example. The police mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, they cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) Then, the Chief went into the city and met with every group he could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, **_Detroit did not burn_**.
Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that?
Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership.
You don't see much of that out there. **That 's why he crisscrossed the state this month announcing his candidacy for Governor of Michigan. ** The Chief believes in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why we're inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. **[Contribute today and you will be a part of our team from Day 1.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r)** [**LEAD FROM THE FRONT WITH CHIEF CRAIG**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) Sometimes people are surprised to hear that the Chief is a Republican. He grew up a Democrat. But then he watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. He watched as they pushed handouts that increased dependency on the government for political gain. **And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT his values. He voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly.** _**And we 're pretty sure you can guess HIS position on "Defund the Police!"**_ Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front. **Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join us in supporting Chief James Craig for Governor?** _**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**_ [**JOIN CHIEF CRAIG NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421785:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) [**DONATE NOW: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421786:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) [**DONATE NOW: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421787:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) [**DONATE NOW: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421788:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) [**DONATE NOW: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421789:6Dgiz22NL:m:1:3253819041:9395D218BC5DEC74586E89EB038929FF:r) __**If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**__ | |

They talked about why Michigan needs real leadership - and you should see what Tucker had to say about his time leading the Detroit Police Department through the unrest of 2020: " When the crisis came, you rose to it. And your city didn't burn... when it came down to it, you kept it safe. And I think that really matters." His 40+ years serving as a police officer taught me a lot about leadership - and a lot about the importance of law and order. See, the Chief grew up in Detroit during the '67 riots, seeing tanks rolling down the streets and snipers on the roofs. He was with the Los Angeles Police Department when the Rodney King riots happened. The police retreated, and let their city burn. He saw that happen. Since he 's been Chief of Police in Detroit, the police have never retreated. When he came home to run the Detroit Police Department, it was in shambles. Morale, equipment - it all needed help. The response time to 911 calls was an hour, if you were lucky. The Chief started with Colony Arms - the epicenter of crime in Detroit. He made it an example. The police mounted an assault. Twenty to thirty arrests later, they cleaned it up. It showed that the police force was back in Detroit and that we never again would allow criminals to rule our city. That is leading from the front. Then, the Chief went into the city and met with every group he could find. Developed trust, showed what leadership could do. So, when the unfortunate situation happened with George Floyd, and outsiders came here to try and burn us down, Detroit did not burn. Leadership - real leadership - matters. Living within the rules we set for others, instead of within some special rules for the elite. No "rules for thee, not for me!" Michigan has had enough of that. There are no kings and queens in America. Leading from the front. Why don't politicians get that? Bringing our state back from the front. That's leadership. You don't see much of that out there. That 's why he crisscrossed the state this month announcing his candidacy for Governor of Michigan. The Chief believes in leading from the front - and I think you do too, Peter. That's why we're inviting you to be a Lead from the Front donor. Sometimes people are surprised to hear that the Chief is a Republican. He grew up a Democrat. But then he watched as Democrats allowed our cities to riot, to burn, and to fail. He watched as they pushed handouts that increased dependency on the government for political gain. And what the Democratic Party stands for today - liberal wokeism and a perpetual victimhood mentality - those are NOT his values. He voted for President Trump in both elections - proudly. And we 're pretty sure you can guess HIS position on "Defund the Police!" Michigan Republicans need a candidate that can bring our message into areas that aren't traditionally Republican voters. And all of Michigan needs a governor that leads from the front. Lead from the front. Keep our people safe. Solve problems. That's what Michigan needs. Will you join us in supporting Chief James Craig for Governor? By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.** | | - Chief James Craig Team Contributions to Chief James Craig for Governor Exploratory Committee are not deductible for Federal income tax purposes. No corporate contribution checks or cash please. State law requires political committees to use their best efforts to obtain and report the name, mailing address, employer and occupation for each individual whose contributions exceed $100 in an election cycle. But, unlike the Democrats, he won’t deny that his fellow Americans are facing REAL problems. He doesn’t care about lining the pockets of massive corporations who send jobs abroad. Instead, JD is laser-focused on making the lives of everyday Americans better. Our nation is under the tight control of radical Liberals. But JD will bring his strong conservative, Ohio values to the Senate. JD will fight for life. JD will fight to bring jobs back to the heartland. JD will fight to make our communities safe. Back JD’s run for Senate. Send a fighter to Washington for Ohio. JD is a political outsider. He is a Conservative. He is a patriot.
**[Will you donate NOW to send him to fight for America in Washington?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztdhpdcd3rpk0lvepdq4p09o7i5741gacahb98t8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cthm8pj0cdh2bs)** Friend, our communities are facing real problems. Democrats in power all over the country are caving into a mob mentality. Defunding our police forces who keep our communities intact. Crime rates are skyrocketing. Drugs are flooding across our border. No child deserves to grow up in a community riddled with violence and addiction. JD knows this better than most. The good news? He has NO PROBLEM calling attention to these issues and he won’t stop until we have solutions that make our communities stronger. We can’t let our communities be left behind.
In the Senate, JD will give a voice to everyday folks like you. He will tackle the tough problems. [**SUPPORT JD VANCE FOR SENATE NOW >> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjqi0nk9f3tqv8hkehlar12v5kcji8nealbbh9fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2cthm8pj0cdh2bs) Here’s the bottom line. Our country can’t afford another second of Democrat control. We have to take back the Majority. The key to that? **THE conservative candidate JD Vance. ** JD is a political outsider. His unique perspective and All-American background will shake things up in Washington and deliver wins for Ohio. JD Vance needs your support. The future of our American way of life is at stake. Will you join JD’s fight and donate today? We’re in this together, -JD’s Friends at Protect Ohio Values | |

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Law Enforcement and our Safety is Under Attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Since left-wing efforts began to defund the police, there has been an alarming increase in the amount of crime nationwide, and especially here in Houston. Last week we lost the fifth active duty Officer in just 16 months, killed by a man who was out on PR Bond after committing numerous felonies. Sadly, this was not an isolated incident, and ten's of thousands of criminals have taken advantage of liberal bond policies to evade prison. __

[](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=742c68d68c4b437abfe44b2f0bcea622&_e=VwS1jNfQ_ggDZcerleHHfI2r-FMVDZ2lY9xgdO-YxXLOHrEKuAV1Hh5QhTVQuWSit1Mr4UQ6Q9mXxJRm5vdUYg1h36qqVUuoJKYc-tl4A91p_8kbvGJOOYoSnpiWqmKP6qts1Ftv50rHMmnDePDzzLt4Rx-2A1s3cHdl2gy4SdpqsKwmQ9b6N4DrOIWZ0i7Gi3OFA92oh76-hrKgqRvv-JYgeARvFhKbCuHU477gHX5uCSsXN1f8-T_9frCuA9--ClE_xxzaahomiFL_OdClGzZdbZTTWQm2eJrDoyC5l9k%3D)
[Click here to watch _Law Enforcement and our Safety is Under Attack_](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=742c68d68c4b437abfe44b2f0bcea622&_e=VwS1jNfQ_ggDZcerleHHfI2r-FMVDZ2lY9xgdO-YxXLOHrEKuAV1Hh5QhTVQuWSit1Mr4UQ6Q9mXxJRm5vdUYrenxBc0FjqIKa3KIxyi72GLYP6DQHGodVXNCteS7BZPvCSUv1rfKyNWa572E5FgUQ9Sp9gT03cEgirbXPTVRC0GvuS6PvTLkioZlMHQFLgvHWxDkxSeSqbbl7PqfWxybOtooQoWlbjQC0lfXz69t438Z2guY5NHImLzWFNyajwb671wOXvzuJMFK4SE-3HyF1t_fxYWdzeB2OxMTvLzrq4%3D)

Over the last 18 months, 119 murder suspects in our city were facing multiple felony charges and were able to walk free on PR Bonds. And since 2015, 63,000 defendants out on bond were charged with new crimes, which exceeds the capacity of Minute Maid Park and the Toyota Center _combined. _

As we take time to pray for Officer Jeffrey's family and his loved ones during his funeral service today, we should also take the time to stand up for our men and women in blue, and thank them for their heroism they display each and every day. Houston needs to do better and now is the time to come together as a city and let our leaders know that enough is enough.

Sincerely,
Wesley

Fellow Conservative,

**I’m in an all-out dash to raise as much cash as possible ahead of next Thursday’s end of quarter fundraising deadline.**

I’m stressed for a number of reasons:
1. I’m actively trying to discourage other Republicans from hopping in the race; no one wants a contentious primary
2. I have to make my fundraising numbers public – meaning everything we brought in as a campaign between July 1st and September 30th. My Democrat opponent is going to use this to gauge how much of a threat I really am to her.

**So, we’re hitting on all cylinders and that means placing ads on Facebook in an attempt to introduce myself to a wider audience**.

I wrote a personal check for $6,000 to pay for them up front;** with a newborn I don’t have the cash to spare, but this seat is a MUST WIN if we’re going to flip the House Republican – so it’s worth it**.

**[Will you take 45 seconds to watch my ad here? clean_body: I’m in an all-out dash to raise as much cash as possible ahead of next Thursday’s end of quarter fundraising deadline. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, I’m in an all-out dash to raise as much cash as possible ahead of next Thursday’s end of quarter fundraising deadline. I’m stressed for a number of reasons: 1. I’m actively trying to discourage other Republicans from hopping in the race; no one wants a contentious primary 2. I have to make my fundraising numbers public – meaning everything we brought in as a campaign between July 1st and September 30th. My Democrat opponent is going to use this to gauge how much of a threat I really am to her. So, we’re hitting on all cylinders and that means placing ads on Facebook in an attempt to introduce myself to a wider audience. I wrote a personal check for $6,000 to pay for them up front; with a newborn I don’t have the cash to spare, but this seat is a MUST WIN if we’re going to flip the House Republican – so it’s worth it. | Thank you John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia

name: Liz Hall, Finance Director
subject: We're going to need everyone to step up if we want to reach our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

While Derek is in Washington, D.C., working hard to pass legislation to help us build back better, I'm running the numbers to make sure our team stays on track.

The 2022 election is nearly a year away, and multiple potential challengers from the right are already making noise. Our team set a goal to raise $7,000 before this week's FEC end-of-quarter deadline, and I've been combing through our supporter record files to make sure we don't leave any stone unturned.

**Here 's what I have for you:**
**Quarter 3 Supporter Record for Peter

Donor Status: NON-DONOR
Suggested Donation: $5**

According to our records, you have not yet given to Derek's campaign this quarter. **[Make your first donation of $5, or whatever you can, right away to help us hit our most important goal yet.](https://act.myngp.com/el/_T0CH5FH7nPGFw28YZQk16LERE7ICtDPC6p3TW9dEg4=/QaUVJZWEpmmUsdpjJ2IgpF8CWpHuVST4uOljmbKvHbc=?refcode=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_medium=email)**
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/_T0CH5FH7nPGFw28YZQk16LERE7ICtDPC6p3TW9dEg4=/QaUVJZWEpmmUsdpjJ2IgpF8CWpHuVST4uOljmbKvHbc=?refcode=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_medium=email)
_If you 've recently donated, thank you! Your online record may not be up to date, but don't worry -- we update these records regularly. _
After the deadline this week, we'll be filing our fundraising reports with the Federal Election Commission (FEC), and then our numbers will go public. **We need to show the strength of this grassroots team.**

Will you rush a donation before our FEC end-of-quarter deadline? **[Make your first donation of this quarter to help us reach our goal»](https://act.myngp.com/el/_T0CH5FH7nPGFw28YZQk16LERE7ICtDPC6p3TW9dEg4=/QaUVJZWEpmmUsdpjJ2IgpF8CWpHuVST4uOljmbKvHbc=?refcode=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Thank you,

Liz

Liz Hall
Finance Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/_T0CH5FH7nPGFw28YZQk16LERE7ICtDPC6p3TW9dEg4=/QaUVJZWEpmmUsdpjJ2IgpF8CWpHuVST4uOljmbKvHbc=?refcode=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210925_EOQ2_fndd_gq_ndn___LH_ettx&utm_medium=email)
