name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Peter, This is bad. Really bad.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Coming to you with a humble request...

Peter, It's Dan Crenshaw. I just got this text and my heart sank:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421865:JXYbB22NI:m:1:3253819041:CBED6148E6E95E70BCADE693C903526C:r)
This is bad. _Really bad._

I know this isn't what you want to hear right now: **_but Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left have BUCKETS of money at the ready. Falling short of our goal simply isn't an option - falling short means we lose the House Majority for good._**

[**300% MATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421865:JXYbB22NI:m:1:3253819041:CBED6148E6E95E70BCADE693C903526C:r)

I REFUSE to sit back and allow the Radical Left to take over our country. I know you won't either, which is why today I'm coming to you with a humble request:

[**Can I count on you to rush a 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 minutes? $5, $10, $25, or even just $1 will go a long way to ensuring we close the fundraising gap.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421865:JXYbB22NI:m:1:3253819041:CBED6148E6E95E70BCADE693C903526C:r)

I can't extend this offer to everyone and I can only offer it to you for a limited time - but it's critical you rush support before the deadline. _If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it 's indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball. _

[**BUT, if every patriot who gets this email chips in, we 'll crush our fundraising goal and leave the Radical Left in the dust. Remember, all donations made in the next 45 minutes will be 300% matched >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421865:JXYbB22NI:m:1:3253819041:CBED6148E6E95E70BCADE693C903526C:r)

[**300% MATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421865:JXYbB22NI:m:1:3253819041:CBED6148E6E95E70BCADE693C903526C:r)

We're in a great position to take back the House from Nancy Pelosi - we're just FIVE SEATS AWAY from restoring an America First Agenda in Washington. But Pelosi knows it, just as well as we do, _and she 's panicking.

She's dialing up dark money donors.

She's depositing max-out checks._

_And last month she outspent and outraised us by MILLIONS._**

Pelosi's working day and night to ensure we fail. If we fall short of our goal, the Left will BURY us. We can't let Pelosi win, simply because she outspent us. **

There's no way we make our mark without you, Peter.

[**I can 't extend this deadline again - even for Top Patriots like you. So please, rush your 300% matched donation before the link closes in 45 min.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421865:JXYbB22NI:m:1:3253819041:CBED6148E6E95E70BCADE693C903526C:r)

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58421865:JXYbB22NI:m:1:3253819041:CBED6148E6E95E70BCADE693C903526C:r)
Dan Crenshaw

With early voting officially underway and polls showing a virtual tie, I'm asking you to do everything you can, right now, to help my friend Terry McAuliffe win.

****
Terry needs our support right now because his Trump-backed opponent has a huge resource advantage. Terry's opponent has already written millions of dollars in checks to his campaign. In fact, he's promised to spend up to $75 million to win.

An election this important shouldn't be auctioned off to the highest bidder. That's why I'm so proud of how Terry's running his campaign.

Unlike his opponent, Terry is building the largest small-dollar donor army in Virginia political history. People like you chipping in $15, $25, or anything they can afford are who power his campaign.

And in a race against a self-funding opponent trying to buy his way into office, your support is giving Terry a real chance to win.

Look, we have to win. We have to send the message that extreme Republicans like Terry's opponent who spread Donald Trump’s big lie will be held accountable. We have to show the entire country that Democrats are still fired up to fight for our democracy and our future.

_**[So please, donate anything that is meaningful to you to Terry’s campaign right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36556373/308448703/-2023814932?refcode=20210927.3_SA_9FT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGViNDJiYy1iYzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4wv8Itl4ceOnBNele5IAhAr7eUtOsyyFu5cW_Ia3-K8=)**_

Thank you so much,

Stacey Abrams

clean_body: President Trump is ALL IN for the 2022 Midterm Elections. | Not interested? . Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, Did you see President Trump’s EPIC Save America Rally this weekend? Now, we need to know where you stand. Are you with President Trump and Republicans, or are you planning to sit on the sidelines while America drifts towards socialism? | | | | | | If there’s one thing that President Trump made clear this weekend it’s that he refuses to sit by and do nothing while the Left destroys our great nation. We hope you feel the same way, Peter. Democrats are mobilizing in record numbers to fundraise for their socialist candidates and flip “red” states in their direction. Will you fight back, or do nothing? | Thank you. State Republicans

name: Conor Lamb
subject: We need to beat them here
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36556957/308450872/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQ4ODNlNy1jMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwN2QiizcZ_E4F5uwm5JJ2_vo1mF4OFBZGxP8jJfZnU=)

Friend,

**The Big Lie. The lawsuits. January 6th. Attacking Republican election officials and Republicans in Congress who tell the truth.**

On countless levels, Republicans have shown _all of us_ that they're unqualified to run this country.

Now, the party that claims Democrats are coming for your freedoms and privacy are demanding that Pennsylvania voters provide them with their social security numbers, all in the name of a sham #Fraudit. There's no other way to say it: They are attacking our democracy and our entire system of government on all fronts.

**That's why we need to beat them here in Pennsylvania next year, build on our majority, and put an end to this election fraud nonsense. There's too much on the line, and I intend to do everything I can to secure the future of every Pennsylvanian -- and of our country.**

**[This is our chance to turn the tide, friend, and we're counting on supporters like you to help show that we have the grassroots momentum necessary to win this race. Can you donate $5, $10, $15, or more to help us save our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36556958/308450873/773704285?refcode=em21_210927_eoq3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQ4ODNlNy1jMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwN2QiizcZ_E4F5uwm5JJ2_vo1mF4OFBZGxP8jJfZnU=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36556959/308450874/773704285?refcode=em21_210927_eoq3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQ4ODNlNy1jMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwN2QiizcZ_E4F5uwm5JJ2_vo1mF4OFBZGxP8jJfZnU=) The other side is still spewing this anti-democratic rhetoric and attempting to smear me because they know that if we make it to the Senate, their charade is over. They're out of new ideas, and poll after poll shows that the majority of Americans support Democrats' policies -- policies that will grow our middle class, protect our elections, save our warming planet, and address the issues that _really matter._

Pennsylvanians are pragmatic and resourceful -- we do what needs to be done, friend. We don't like distractions, yet that seems to be all Republicans care about these days.

**Our campaign is here to put a stop to it, and I hope I can count on your support to help us do it.**

**[We set an ambitious fundraising goal of $100,000 to reach by the end of this month to show everyone that this campaign is here to win, and we're down to $61,274 left to go. Can you help us get there by the end of the month with a donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36556960/308450875/773704285?refcode=em21_210927_eoq3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQ4ODNlNy1jMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dwN2QiizcZ_E4F5uwm5JJ2_vo1mF4OFBZGxP8jJfZnU=)**

Your support means the world to me, friend. I won't let you down.

| | Friend,

This is an email about who I am and what’s at stake in the next election.

**[_(But if you’re pressed for time and can’t read the whole email right now, can you make a quick donation to my urgent end-of-quarter goal? 2022 will be the hardest election I’ve ever faced, and a Trump-allied candidate is already attacking me. If you can chip in, I’d deeply appreciate it.)_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557055/308451278/-774258439?refcode=20210925_em_f_9B&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWEzOWM1OC1jMTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n8yUOn0HDWlXpHq8XRb8yrIXgqp-asc2zzs6QQ2w3zs=)**

I’d like to tell you about _why_ I’m in Congress.
* As a child, my family escaped communism and immigrated to the United States. My parents worked during the day and cleaned offices at night so my brother and I could have a fair shot at the American Dream.

* I had no intention of running for Congress ... until the horrific Pulse nightclub shooting. After my own congressman took a NRA donation just days after the tragedy, I knew I had to do _something._ So I ran against him later that same year and flipped his seat from red to blue.

* Ever since, I’ve worked with both parties to improve health care, invest in schools, and create better-paying jobs -- and _**I’ve been consistently named one of the most effective and most independent members of Congress.**_

Unfortunately, Florida Republicans don’t want effectiveness or independence. They want someone who’ll toe the party line, even if it hurts Floridians.

_**Someone like Anthony Sabatini.**_

**[_He’s a Trump ally who’s running to unseat me, and we know he’ll throw everything he can at us. It’s absolutely crucial we hit our upcoming end-of-quarter goal. If you can, please make a contribution to help me defend this seat._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557056/308451279/-774258439?refcode=20210925_em_f_9B&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWEzOWM1OC1jMTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n8yUOn0HDWlXpHq8XRb8yrIXgqp-asc2zzs6QQ2w3zs=)**

Thanks for always having my back,
Stephanie Murphy | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557057/308451280/-774258439?refcode=20210925_em_f_9B&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWEzOWM1OC1jMTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n8yUOn0HDWlXpHq8XRb8yrIXgqp-asc2zzs6QQ2w3zs=)**

subject: Our biggest test yet:
body:
We need to make sure that none of these far-right seditionists in Congress get one more chance to betray our country. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557192/308451573/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFhZTRhYy1jMTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UsaINiQG-AEabQACZGkizXl8MX9BmDLL-70o6t4Nvm0=)
Friend --

In a moment I'm going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557193/308451574/-109236511?refcode=em-92721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFhZTRhYy1jMTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UsaINiQG-AEabQACZGkizXl8MX9BmDLL-70o6t4Nvm0=)** before my first end-of-quarter deadline. But first, let me tell you a bit more about why I’m running and why your support is important.

I'm a combat veteran who served two tours in Iraq. I enlisted when I was 19, and by age 22, I had earned my Combat Infantry Badge and survived multiple IED and mortar attacks.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557194/308451575/-109236511?refcode=em-92721-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmFhZTRhYy1jMTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UsaINiQG-AEabQACZGkizXl8MX9BmDLL-70o6t4Nvm0=)
**I didn't fight for this country and join the Foreign Service just to come home and see our democratic institutions weakened by right-wing radicals like Doug LaMalfa. Doug took an oath to protect our democracy. Instead, he’s spreading misinformation about election fraud.**

I'm running to hold LaMalfa accountable and get Congress refocused on working people in CA-01. But right now, we're staring down our biggest test yet -- our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

This one is important because the bigger the number we put up, the better the shot we have to prove to political pundits, the press, and yes... even our opponent Doug LaMalfa, that we have what it takes to win this election.

Friend, I'm no stranger to meeting goals under pressure, but we're going to need to do this together if we're going to hit this one:

**[Will you chip in $3 toward my first end-of-quarter deadline today? Any amount gets you on the list of my public supporters. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Eric Swalell just endorsed my opponent
body:
Peter -- Democrats have made me their #1 target to defeat and remove from Congress next election! **Which is exactly why Eric Swalwell just endorsed my Democrat opponent who has already raised over $2 MILLION dollars to defeat me in 2022**. . . .
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r) **[_HELP MTG DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS DONATE BEFORE THE END-OF-QUARTER DEADLINE_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r)** Every single day, I'm fighting to hold the radical Democrats in the DC Swamp accountable. My plan is simple: **Defeat Nancy Pelosi in 2022.** **Take back the House. ** **Fire Fauci. ** **Impeach Joe Biden.** And because I refuse to back down and shut up, Democrats have painted a big red target on my back. . . **In fact, they're on pace to spend TENS OF MILLIONS of dollars to take me out and install a radical Democrat in my seat.** You see, Marcus Flowers is an open-borders socialist who supports stimulus checks to Illegal Immigrants. . . . . .**teaching our children to hate America through dangerous Critical Race Theory indoctrination**. . . . . ._supports violent BLM and Antifa mobs, and wants to strip away our gun rights_! The Democrats are prepared to unleash MILLIONS of dollars to take me out. Some political experts even expect $15-$20 million spent against me. . . And not just the Democrats. **The Never Trump Lincoln Project and the Liz Cheney wing of the Republican party want me gone**. **[This is exactly why I must ask you to rush an emergency donation of 17.76 right away before the September 30th End-of-Quarter Deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r)**. ([**I'll even automatically enter you to win the 50 Cal Rifle I'm giving away**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r)!) **[WATCH & ENTER TO WIN MTG's 50 CAL:](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r)** [****](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r) In just three (3!) days, I have one of the most critical fundraising deadlines in my political career: the End-of-Quarter reports. **These reports are what Democrat operatives and Fake News "journalists" comb through just to see how strong my support is amongst the people**. They use these reports to allocate Democrat resources amongst the most vulnerable Republicans in Congress. **They even deploy Democrats from across the country to knock doors, make phone calls, write emails, and spread Fake News on social media**. . . All in an effort to defeat me in 2022! **As you can see, I strongly need your help, Peter. You've stood with me before**. **[I must ask you to stand with me again right now by chipping in 17.76 to help me DEFEAT THE DEMOCRATS](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r)**. [**Please hurry, the deadline is just three days away**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58870538:WXB-ANHLN:m:1:2365227053:EDB73DBF092761A9D758434EDADEFBA1:r)! The bigger my campaign warchest, the bigger chance I have to fend off these well-funded Democrats. I am fighting every single day to stop these socialists in Congress who want to rip this country a part and rebuild it into their socialist hellhole. I will never stop fighting. I will never give up. I will never back down. I hope I can count on you! \-- Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
So I wanted to share some key updates about our race and what we need to do before the FEC deadline in 3 days.
#

Hey team -
It’s been a big month for Team Beasley! So I wanted to share some key updates about our race and what we need to do before the FEC deadline in 3 days.
**FIRST:** Earlier this month, Public Policy Polling released a new poll of our primary that showed Cheri with a commanding lead. After voters learned about the candidates, Cheri led by 30 points!
**THEN:** On Friday, CNN released its latest analysis of 2022 Senate races, and ours is one of the top five most likely to flip. They highlighted the enthusiasm for Cheri’s candidacy as a key reason Democrats can turn North Carolina blue.
**NOW:** We’re racing toward our second official FEC deadline on Thursday. It’s clear that this race is winnable for Democrats, and Cheri is the candidate who can do it. But we must make clear that we have the momentum and resources necessary to flip this seat and expand the majority.
After outraising every other candidate last quarter — including failed former Governor Pat McCrory — the media and Republicans are going to be looking closely to see if we can do it again.
But the truth is we need a lot more people to chip in if we’re going to get there. So I’m hoping some of our top supporters can help. What do you say?

clean_body: So I wanted to share some key updates about our race and what we need to do before the FEC deadline in 3 days. Hey team - It’s been a big month for Team Beasley! So I wanted to share some key updates about our race and what we need to do before the FEC deadline in 3 days. FIRST: Earlier this month, Public Policy Polling released a new poll of our primary that showed Cheri with a commanding lead. After voters learned about the candidates, Cheri led by 30 points! THEN: On Friday, CNN released its latest analysis of 2022 Senate races, and ours is one of the top five most likely to flip. They highlighted the enthusiasm for Cheri’s candidacy as a key reason Democrats can turn North Carolina blue. NOW: We’re racing toward our second official FEC deadline on Thursday. It’s clear that this race is winnable for Democrats, and Cheri is the candidate who can do it. But we must make clear that we have the momentum and resources necessary to flip this seat and expand the majority. After outraising every other candidate last quarter — including failed former Governor Pat McCrory — the media and Republicans are going to be looking closely to see if we can do it again. But the truth is we need a lot more people to chip in if we’re going to get there. So I’m hoping some of our top supporters can help. What do you say? = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you so much! name: Val Demings (personal)
subject: nothing about the road ahead is easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead -- taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting -- is easy.
#
Team -- it wasn’t exactly easy growing up as a Black girl from a poor family in the South – the youngest of seven children who went to segregated schools.
It wasn’t easy for my parents -- Dad a janitor, Mom a maid -- but they did whatever they could to support us. While none of it was particularly easy, I’m very proud to have been the first in my family to graduate college.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557466/308452441/-1352455959?refcode=jr_em_nd_210926_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDE4MTE4Yi1jMjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qTLnB47_6tdGN2KG4J0fTRxgnb8allZa5D4dWBRcVw=)
Much like my past, nothing about the road ahead -- taking on an incumbent like Marco Rubio, whose seat the entire Republican establishment is pouring millions into protecting -- is easy. But I’m never one to tire from a challenge, and I know that if I have grassroots support from people like you, we’ll win.
**[That’s why I’m personally asking when it matters most: Will you make a grassroots donation to my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help me win this battleground Senate race and keep the Senate blue? Whatever you contribute will build up our resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557467/308452442/-1352455959?refcode=jr_em_nd_210926_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDE4MTE4Yi1jMjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qTLnB47_6tdGN2KG4J0fTRxgnb8allZa5D4dWBRcVw=)**
I'm proud of this team for the momentum you've helped me build so far, but I'm counting on supporters like you to **[contribute just $5 or more now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557468/308452443/-1352455959?refcode=jr_em_nd_210926_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDE4MTE4Yi1jMjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qTLnB47_6tdGN2KG4J0fTRxgnb8allZa5D4dWBRcVw=)** if we're going to keep going -- together.
Thank you as always for your support,
Val Demings

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36557469/308452444/-1352455959?refcode=jr_em_nd_210926_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDE4MTE4Yi1jMjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7qTLnB47_6tdGN2KG4J0fTRxgnb8allZa5D4dWBRcVw=)**

name: Peter Franchot
subject: I’m building a coalition of grassroots volunteers
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/logo.png]Dear Peter,
As I continue to travel across the state to meet with Maryland’s diverse communities, I’m often met with a similar refrain, whether I’m at a park, a festival, a restaurant or a neighborhood street: “We know you. We trust you. We’re with you.” The excitement and enthusiasm that I’m getting from voters on the campaign trail has been truly heartwarming -- and it’s a testament to the growing strength of the people-powered movement that we are building together.
And boy, is our strength growing. Since I announced my candidacy for Governor, I’ve received the endorsements of more than 100 current and former elected officials -- and over the past several months, my team has been hard at work recruiting volunteers to help reach thousands of voters through door knocking, phone banking and digital efforts.
https://www.franchot.com/action [https://www.franchot.com/action]Volunteers are critical to the success of our campaign, which is why I am personally reaching out to ask you to join our growing ranks. Every weekend, Team Franchot volunteers are out pounding the pavement to speak to voters about the kitchen-table issues. And every day, our coalition of support grows just a little bit stronger thanks to their work.
We can only win this competitive election by mobilizing a broad coalition of grassroots volunteers. Together, we’re going to build a movement to change the way that government does business in 2022. Click here to sign up to volunteer with my campaign. [https://www.franchot.com/action]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em092721&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States

Peter, we wish we had better news to share ‐‐ _but this is vitally important:_ | **BREAKING: Cook Political Report moves Virginia’s governor’s race from ‘lean Democrat’ to ‘toss‐up’**

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Here’s why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36559523/308459557/-793144256?refcode=dpva-em-210927-tfvawhy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjI1ODQzMy1jNzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_TSN9DjPchFrkASpxoiD1I6dXwGT5zNr-plpP3gS3E=&emci=5af31c79-ab1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=b2258433-c71f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek, Before our end-of-September deadline, I wanted to tell you directly why I’m running to be Virginia’s next Governor. We are running an historic campaign here in Virginia. Not only are we building the largest grassroots movement in Virginia history, but we’re running a campaign that speaks to the issues that matter most to Virginians. And that’s exactly why I’m running. I’m running because every single Virginia child deserves a **quality education** — which is why I will make the largest-ever investment in education in the Commonwealth’s history. I’m running because every Virginian has a right to **affordable, quality health care** and prescriptions medications. I’m running because we need a leader who will champion initiatives to **curb gun violence** in Virginia. I’m running because the time has long passed for innovative strategies to secure our **clean energy future.** **And Derek, I’m running because every single person in our Commonwealth deserves to live in a state where they have opportunities for success.** **[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll support the Democratic Party of Virginia today by chipping in whatever amount makes sense for you. I can’t do this without you, Derek:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36559524/308459558/1865081792?refcode=dpva-em-210927-tfvawhy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjI1ODQzMy1jNzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R_TSN9DjPchFrkASpxoiD1I6dXwGT5zNr-plpP3gS3E=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Why haven’t you accepted your offer, yet? | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, Chairman Michael Whatley, here. I want to thank you for everything you’ve done to support our Republican Movement. In honor of your hard work and devotion to our cause, I want to offer you an exclusive chance to join the Chairman’s Club : a select group of Republicans, hand-picked by me. This is a special honor, Peter, and I am not offering to every Republican. But your efforts stood out above the rest, and so I’d like you to join this exclusive grouop. | CHAIRMAN’S CLUB MEMBERSHIP OFFER EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | I’m going to be reviewing the list of members tonight, Peter. I hope your name will be at the top. Congratulations! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

name: Marisa Wood (personal)
subject: David and Goliath
body:
McCarthy said that the Biden budget will only pass "over his dead body." |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36559602/308459828/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE4OTZkOC1jNzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7FlIfuKICK_TP79Tl2y3UDhr3a1xq6fvoT8HMdDFrU=)
I'll be direct, friend.

**[Will you make a $3 donation toward our end-of-quarter fundraising goal to defeat GOP Leader and career politician Kevin McCarthy? Only five seats stand between him and the House majority. If you want to 1) give him the toughest fight of his career, and 2) stop him from getting the Speaker's gavel to roll back our progress -- chip in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36559603/308459829/-686739743?refcode=em-92721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE4OTZkOC1jNzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7FlIfuKICK_TP79Tl2y3UDhr3a1xq6fvoT8HMdDFrU=)**
| **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36559604/308459831/-686739743?refcode=em-92721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE4OTZkOC1jNzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7FlIfuKICK_TP79Tl2y3UDhr3a1xq6fvoT8HMdDFrU=)**
---

The Central Valley is one of the most underserved communities in California. For some kids, getting into college can feel like a David and Goliath battle -- especially when politicians who should have their back are actively working against them.

One of the major reasons I wanted to run against Kevin McCarthy is because he's not looking out for the kids I teach. **He said Biden's spending bills would pass "over his dead body."** The budget would make historic investments in the Pell Grant, and make community college tuition-free through America's College Promise -- something the kids I teach who are looking for a shot at a better life sorely need.

I dare him to look one of my kiddos in the face and say that.

We need to make sure more voters know I'm the viable Democrat running against McCarthy. These end-of-quarter deadlines may feel arbitrary, but it's a chance to show the political pundits and press that we truly mean business.

**We are coming up $52,131 short of our $75,000 end-of-month goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just right now, we'd meet our goal TODAY. I know we can do this, but only if we all step up and do it together:**

**[Can you chip in $3 before 11:59 PM tonight to help us close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36559612/308459832/-686739743?refcode=em-92721-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MDE4OTZkOC1jNzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z7FlIfuKICK_TP79Tl2y3UDhr3a1xq6fvoT8HMdDFrU=)**

There are a ton of people in my district who want to show Kevin McCarthy the door. They would appreciate it.

Thank you,

Marisa Wood
Teacher and Democrat for Congress

clean_body: McCarthy said that the Biden budget will only pass "over his dead body." | = I'll be direct, friend. = | = The Central Valley is one of the most underserved communities in California. For some kids, getting into college can feel like a David and Goliath battle -- especially when politicians who should have their back are actively working against them. One of the major reasons I wanted to run against Kevin McCarthy is because he's not looking out for the kids I teach. He said Biden's spending bills would pass "over his dead body." The budget would make historic investments in the Pell Grant, and make community college tuition-free through America's College Promise -- something the kids I teach who are looking for a shot at a better life sorely need. I dare him to look one of my kiddos in the face and say that. We need to make sure more voters know I'm the viable Democrat running against McCarthy. These end-of-quarter deadlines may feel arbitrary, but it's a chance to show the political pundits and press that we truly mean business. We are coming up $52,131 short of our $75,000 end-of-month goal. If everyone reading this email chipped in just right now, we'd meet our goal TODAY. I know we can do this, but only if we all step up and do it together: = There are a ton of people in my district who want to show Kevin McCarthy the door. They would appreciate it. Thank you, Marisa Wood Teacher and Democrat for Congress If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. body:
Hey Peter, it’s James.
The end of this month is our second end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, which means our campaign will file a report detailing the strength of our campaign. Everyone’s FEC reports are publicly available, which means folks will be looking to see how strong of a grassroots campaign we are running with a full quarter under our belts.
We want to make sure Stewart looks strong in that report, so we’ve set an aggressive goal for our end-of-quarter fundraising of $8,000 by the end of September. We need 200 folks to give $20 TODAY to get us off to a strong start! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210927-email&amount=20]
This is just our second FEC filing since we launched the campaign and it’ll set the tone for how our campaign is viewed heading into 2022. Let’s make sure we send a strong message! You can make a donation of any amount through this secure link: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210927-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2109-q3-sn-eoq?refcode=210927-email]
Thanks in advance, folks!
-- James
Finance Director
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.

name: Patty Murray
subject: I’m counting on you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I’m doing everything I can to defend our Democratic majority -- from defending this seat in Washington state to supporting Democratic Senate candidates across the country.
#
Peter,
Senate Republicans have not been shy about making their plans to win back control of the Senate. We saw what the GOP majority had to offer the last go round -- obstructing Democratic progress for our families while stacking the courts with far-right justices -- and I don’t even want to think about what they’d do if they flip the Senate.
**I’m doing everything I can to defend our Democratic majority -- from defending this seat in Washington state to supporting Democratic Senate candidates across the country.**
**[In just a few days, we’re facing the most important deadline yet in this fight -- and our results will determine which races the GOP target in 2022. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 toward my $19,120 end-of-quarter fundraising goal before the Thursday deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36560031/308461243/-1246566971?refcode=pm_em_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQxZmIxOS1jOTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cxFM8GU9diW3bbKjUrSx3pVN0jl-TaqFIIEaG3kJn8=)**
Peter, I’m sure you’re getting a lot of emails about this deadline -- I know I am -- but right now, there’s one thing we all have to keep in mind: the Republicans only need to win _ONE SEAT_ to flip the Senate. We have to stop them.
In the other Washington, I’m making sure our government helps families, not corporate interests, but Republicans are trying to block our progress every chance they get.
**[Please -- contribute $5 or anything you can now to help us hit this must-reach goal!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36560032/308461244/-1246566971?refcode=pm_em_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjQxZmIxOS1jOTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1cxFM8GU9diW3bbKjUrSx3pVN0jl-TaqFIIEaG3kJn8=)**
Thank you,
Patty
** **

name: Ed Rendell
subject: Will you help me protect our democracy?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
I'm Ed Rendell, former DNC chair and governor of Pennsylvania. I'm reaching out to you today because I have exciting news to share: I have just been named chairman of Never Again PAC's Strategic Advisory Committee. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36560191/308461740/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNjc4NTRlLWM5MWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iaq5CrL8pgTZF2FCAh9OzP2Ust7WF8hpRkpT9CL0piU=&emci=b16341b6-ae1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=ef67854e-c91f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=16335001) Hello -- I'm Ed Rendell, former DNC chair and governor of Pennsylvania.

I'm reaching out to you today because I have exciting news to share: **I have just been named chairman of Never Again PAC's Strategic Advisory Committee.**

Never Again PAC's mission to protect our democracy by holding the most dangerous Republicans accountable is one I'm proud to be part of.

Republicans like Scott Perry, Jeff Van Drew, and too many others incited the attack on the Capitol that left five dead, then continue to shamelessly spread lies all in the name of politics and fealty to Trump. It's time for their constituents to learn about the danger they're causing this country.

I'm looking forward to working alongside the rest of the committee -- and all of you -- to hold the 147 members who voted against certifying the fair and legal 2020 election results after Trump-incited terrorists attacked the Capitol on January 6 accountable for their attack on our democracy.

But protecting our nation's democracy and defeating these Republicans won't be an easy task -- it's going to take all of us working together. So team, I have to ask: **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal and join me and the rest of the Never Again PAC team in working to defeat the most dangerous and radical Republicans in Congress?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/36560192/308461741/341608513?refcode=em21_210927_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___er_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210927_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___er_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVmNjc4NTRlLWM5MWYtZWMxMS05ODFmLTAwNTBmMjcxYTFhMiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iaq5CrL8pgTZF2FCAh9OzP2Ust7WF8hpRkpT9CL0piU=)**

Thank you,

Ed Ed Rendell
Chairman
Never Again PAC Strategic Advisory Committee | [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/neveragain-sept21-eoq?refcode=em21_210927_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___er_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210927_eoq2_fnd_gq_act___er_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brencia=20Berry?=
subject: Happy National Voter Registration Day!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Friends,

National Voter Registration Day is tomorrow! We would love for you to join us in expanding the voting base across the country. You can make a difference by amplifying the voices of your community through the ballot box. We invite you to join Chair Jaime Harrison and youth activists across the nation for the DNC National Voting Registration Day Kickoff Event on Tuesday, September 28th! You can sign up for this event [here.](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=9e93596b51&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Below, you will also find tools and resources that can ensure that those close to you can exercise their right at the polls in the upcoming elections. Let's make sure that we're registered and ready to turn out in 2022!

Thanks,

Brencia Berry
Director of Coalitions and Community Engagement
Democratic National Committee
---
|
---
|
---
**National Voter Registration Day Kickoff Event**

The DNC is hosting a NVRD Kickoff Event on 9/28! This will be a national virtual voter registration rally highlighting how the DNC is protecting the vote and the importance of proactively verifying your voter registration and election laws ahead of the 2022 midterms. This event will also highlight the important role that Historically Minority Colleges and Universities have played in protecting and expanding the vote for all communities. Chair Jaime Harrison will speak at the event alongside youth activists from all across the country!
| [Sign Up Here](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6fa3c97cfb&e=d6c5c7d7ec "Sign Up Here")
---
|
---
|
---
**Friendbanking and IWillVote.com**

Host a friendbank and ask your friends and family to check their voter registration status. You can find more information on how to host one [here!](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=1dd876d75e&e=d6c5c7d7ec)

Don't know your voter registration status? You can check online now at [IWillVote.com!](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3036bfd34c&e=d6c5c7d7ec) You can also find your nearest polling locations and more important information about voting.
| | | _Copyright © 2021 DNC Community Engagement, All rights reserved._
This is a test distribution list.

**Our mailing address is:**
DNC Community Engagement430 S Capitol Street, SEWashington, DC 20003
[Add us to your address book](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=9205bdeb51) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=acfdb5d126&e=d6c5c7d7ec&c=9205bdeb51).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&afl=1)
---

name: Team Ryan
subject: JD Vance & Peter Thiel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1007%2E3611125%2EPQ0ubG ][IMG]

Folks,

The most recent poll in our race has Tim leading Republican JD Vance by
just one point.

Here are the facts: Vance called for “mass civil disobedience” over mask
mandates and declared affordable childcare “class war against normal
people.” He said GOP Senator Josh Hawley “did the right thing” by
encouraging the insurrection on January 6th.

Now, JD has the backing of billionaire Trump-lackey Peter Thiel’s $10
million super PAC.

JD Vance and Peter Thiel think they can buy this open Senate seat.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4517?t=1007&akid=1007%2E3611125%2EPQ0ubG ]Let’s show them how wrong they are. Can you chip in to our
grassroots-powered campaign to help us reach our FEC end-of-quarter goal?
Anything you give will help us break the 50-50 tie in the Senate and
expand our Democratic majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4517?t=1008&akid=1007%2E3611125%2EPQ0ubG ]Count me in >>

workers in on the deal.

You can always count on Tim to roll up his sleeves and do what needs to be
done to give workers a fair shake.

Tim isn’t relying on billionaire backers, he’s accountable to the good
people of the great state of Ohio -- and no one else.

But Tim can’t do it alone -- and that’s why we’re so grateful that you,
a critical member of our team, are in this fight with us.

name: ConservativeFWD
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zc064f21t89ortkeq97c87qkq4t2nk44n44kr1ro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkorr7djl69pn8cbkmdqj6drh6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8o5kcjgj2crhm6p6cd3gmdi70t736hj62pplm4rrccji6pj7csjgsgqn6shlc3jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eap6ccbimmoe0tr1coob1cj26pp238h1e8he4933cph6epr4cji68oh5u)
_*This is a sponsored message*_
[](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z65pr487nsd78bi8fljh1j1396npepev0388td4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm8p74chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z20s42erhm1g8qoh7mm8rldpuk9f2ibnjm9715s8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm8p74chh2bs) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zl0gvpjfc6kgsb5jn31o97tm8p0br438lsvm1htg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm8p74chh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Erica Smith HQ
subject: Even better than fall-themed drinks…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
What is flipping North Carolina worth to you?
#
Happy Fall! 🍁
This is our favorite season at Erica Smith HQ. From the pumpkins, to the fall-themed drinks, to the cozy sweater-weather. We’re here for ALL of it. 👏 Just like most folks, we love to get our daily dose of coffee or tea.
[_**T********oday we’re humbly asking for you to donate just $5 — about the price of a cup of coffee or tea from your favorite coffee shop — to our campaign today so we can reach our $100,000 online fundraising goal before midnight on September 30.** ](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17330?t=1&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17330?t=2&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17358?refcode=em20210927-492&amounts=5&t=3&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)**
Instead of a latte or tea, your $5 today will go towards building our grassroots people-powered movement. We depend on small-dollar donations like this to help us build a campaign that is fit to win our rapidly approaching primary and **flip North Carolina blue**.
We can’t afford to miss out on this golden opportunity to expand our narrow Democratic majority. **Progressive policies that can’t wait any longer hang in the balance like a Green New Deal, criminal justice reform, universal Pre-K, and more.**
If you’re fed up with politicians that have continued to leave working families behind, [_**please consider making a $5 contribution today.**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17330?t=4&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)
If just **600 people** who read this email donate the price of their morning coffee or tea to our campaign right now we’ll reach our FEC fundraising goal **today**. So what do you say? [**_Are you in to donate $5 right now? What’s flipping North Carolina blue and passing progressive life-changing policies worth to you?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17330?t=5&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)
Thank you for your support,
Erica Smith HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210927-492-footer&t=6&refcode2=492_3698_DJ1b6t&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=492%2E3698%2EDJ1b6t)

| | | **[Quickly: Michelle Obama has called us to action in a BIG WAY. She just launched a MASSIVE effort to register HISTORIC numbers of voters nationwide. But we know Republicans will stop at nothing to SABOTAGE her plans and suppress our voting rights. That's why we MUST answer Michelle's call and help elect pro-democracy House Democrats. Will you rush in $3 before our critical End of Quarter Deadline to PROTECT our House Majority and DEFEAT anti-voting rights Republicans? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Did you hear the news?!?!

**FIRST:**

Republicans introduced 400+ voter suppression bills to **ATTACK** our right to vote in nearly every state.

**BUT THEN:**

**Michelle Obama responded in a BIG WAY and launched a MASSIVE voter registration campaign to SAVE our democracy from Republican sabotage!

[](https://links.e.dccc.)**

**SO NOW:**

****[We're calling for an overwhelming wave of support -- 17,000 more gifts before our End of Quarter Deadline -- to stand with Michelle, protect our democracy, and elect pro-voting rights House Democrats nationwide.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQVb_~)****
| [END OF QUARTER DEADLINE: 09/30, 11:59PM
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)

Republicans are STILL engaged in a ruthless campaign to suppress voting rights all across the country.

**And luckily, our Democratic hero Michelle Obama is fighting with everything she has to STOP them and PROTECT our democracy!**

**[But it's more important than ever that we give our democracy its best shot by protecting our House Majority. So will you stand with Michelle and rush $3 before our crucial 72-hour deadline to defend our pro-voting House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)**

We are so lucky to have you on our side, _Peter._

I’m Bryan Hood, Dean’s campaign manager, and I’m sure you’ll hear from me quite a bit during the course of this race.

_You know Dean._ He’s a family man. Proud husband, father, and Duke to his grandkids. He is passionate about racing, ranching, fishing, and hunting. His faith drives him. He is the right leader for Nevada.

I know you have Dean’s back. Take your support one step further and become a _Founding Donor_ of Dean’s campaign for Governor.
[**Become a Founding Donor >>> $30**](http://links.deanheller.com/u/click?_t=1ca3cf9eff954af6abde4c492f66d1d2&_m=44faf33459314e6fa4a4408417cb93da&_e=B7cDe4o_4MAhJ43K2FRhs3mkCItlswGzBf1d5J2Zj4Oiv3vIYlPIFRH-a2g89lU9lI-i-CkhCCXDtqX-Sgax3LG8z97shUDUoRS1ngHJ3efnC4nN3oLtmXMMIqn59eKCcMxi8uWolQwSoDQIjUUXNsB3ZA3jfVC_i9QPAFzOfsyypdigVraqgrNPfYVgE4-QhWpzlw7KOPXaQVu4uGTxDHqAGWuoJNl38rf4Iqbwlc-6koFpmdGHSKIBPDRazvpeNPdtf7caW4DMs1nJvNYvasmlyor3XRzEXyUs4IMZorvPWPxp5xcyvfx4jVeSrwzttBbXxnMpx7Rdtq4nKBf0msbp2yULB2ATjvFKu5HzfEtujH4_QKHqzivxegepgY7ZwldOvAOa5jLnEIEDA6ir3a8Hu-jcFfcaEmoacxE6RJwYqE8Mo7SIlYMRzsX6uDfKN1wRInVBMO19vObIUcMUKllYwR_n9FyLnyOpdsUC4tV0cmZSW7BDmwgUU180cMO5)
**_All donors who contribute at least $15 will also receive an exclusive_**** _Heller Pit Crew _****_membership card delivered right at your doorstep._**

You know the Dean loves Nevada. I know you do too.

The truth is we need a Governor who is working for Nevadans, not special interests.

Dean is dedicated to:
* Funding our police
* Lowering taxes
* Improving Nevada's economy
* Fighting for the unborn
* Supporting gun rights
* Ensuring safe and secure elections

**If you want to see Nevada back on the right track, make a strong commitment to the future of the State today.**

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: I'm going to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
Will you join me? | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mihG2-M7AB3dkcwwbh_95NDOZCfRo8XN4534ZNDpRLVGHNp9ePlQ_Wh9apCruE8gAgcTp1WghcN49-4UuQqGzSvdXpznkXbuSopmSrsR6t8YTW4zxZBQCec7v0j729yaV6gdDWcNhfaJ-x65xeyYJ2NS4xSMogtaSL11Mi-DTOMim-mi2dnlp2btV1YjROmOAiBvlXDOY4eoNR0Qb6TeHbVaJttYHiSqP7gd_Gzr3gaqIKoF3BOgmkVpKF9oo8ZUJSKslRuCTcryNzg72h_hlqN3qstRgNKpIU_GuQ0Dt_hwXNoWyc3RrxkbfddbJoCFAKW0mSfexwtE1Ru1Qi85Ml-NlnbONOHNma1pUQP7pjE1giCn7QGI65lRei5YUc5LcJ/3fo/6gvEelfWR_KHLWnIozPxjg/h0/0U-tF9EtTKetxpPn1QISW1Kzv9jfUV5YubT0pl14PP4)
My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

clean_body: Will you join me? | | | My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to beat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. Greene is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:
This is coming down to the wire. Don’t sit on the sidelines >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/4316bd31866716a1c3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, The race for North Carolina’s open Senate seat is heating up big time. Liberal Democrats are working day and night to flip the Tar Heel state to keep their one-party control in Washington.
The Biden Administration’s radical policies are no longer about Democrats versus Republicans.

Peter, this is spiritual warfare for the heart and soul of our country and I’ll put it plainly - **I need your help to save our nation**. We still need to raise $5,783 by our End-of-Quarter deadline. Make no mistake about it, failure to hit our goal means the Biden Administration can continue wreaking havoc on our lives unchecked. Will you rush a donation of $5 or more to help close the gap?[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/4c6799d3a05d7b4dc3d6b838967d376c/35903)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/173e4a8eb846b78bc3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**RUSH $5 DONATION NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/2af2c7f295b339f7c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**RUSH $10 DONATION NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/a465f8508905b7b9c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**RUSH $25 DONATION NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/8e06e56a77f98966c3d6b838967d376c/35903) [**RUSH $50 DONATION NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/0731a9d409b6afddc3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, the Biden presidency has been an unmitigated DISASTER for our country. His _**gross mismanagement of the Afghanistan withdrawal**_ is the worst national humiliation in living memory. His _**out-of-control government spending**_ is burying our nation in massive debt. His _**leftist economic policies**_ are leading to higher prices at the grocery store and the gas pump.

And his _**rubber-stamp cronies**_ like Kamala Harris, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer stand by calling to defund the police while our cities burn. Peter, our country just can’t take another two years of an unchecked Biden White House. We need a conservative Senator with a BACKBONE who will do what’s right, not cater to the special interests that run The Swamp.

**Will you help me send a message that America has HAD ENOUGH of the radical socialism, defunding the police, “woke” curriculum in our schools, and censorship of conservative ideals?** **[By sending your generous patriotic gift right now](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/aa8d1b22d2427fbcc3d6b838967d376c/35903)** , you will help give me the resources needed to continue this fight. Peter, EVERYTHING is on the line this election. The Democrats have taken us down this path, and only true leadership in the Senate can lead our country through it. But please don’t wait – we’re just hours away from our critical End-of-Quarter deadline. _**Hesitating now could mean the end of our country as we know it**_. Thanks for your support,
Mark Walker [**Chip in before the deadline >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/acc2d0e595017cbfc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/de6b74d690043f74c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/234a248d3b88b58ac3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/fd1b43ac64356eddc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/e80ea0e88eb7d93ec3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/15312bdcfe40c721/d13b87cca2261960c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Give students the courage to stand up
body:
Students across the nation — young Americans who love our nation, our flag, and our freedoms — are heading back “behind en
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9uu5ipo9eaigd7calajenk04ivfo5a85trnkoh0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm2or4c3h2bs) | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zliaghfbdikv71oioar13i2pbkp0i214r6j54bt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm2or4c3h2bs) Fellow American, Students across the nation — young Americans who love our nation, our flag, and our freedoms — are heading back “behind enemy lines” to college campuses dominated by the radical Left. These vicious campus Leftists will do all they can to indoctrinate the next generation with toxic lies; push dangerous, anti-America, socialist ideologies; and try to censor or “cancel” any Conservative students who dare to speak up against them. [**America-loving young people need to hear from Real Americans like you! Will you sign this note of support to students returning to liberal campuses?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z77cj5kll26408arr306gcraf3bkobg6c7samqio_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm2or4c3h2bs) Conservative students must know that the leftist professors and administrators they hear every day on campus do not represent the views of most Americans and that the majority of Americans are rooting for them. That’s why, this fall, Turning Point USA will activate and train EVEN MORE young Conservative activists this year ... will share our winning, pro-America message on EVEN MORE campuses ... and will build an army of EVEN MORE than 400,000 student activists who believe in American Greatness and who are ready to fight — and win — the American Culture War against the Left. [**Let these patriotic young Americans — the Turning Point Generation — know that YOU are with them!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1lp99sfs4bgnj23o31s6bfj2vg7qr05t9t45log_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm2or4c3h2bs)
---
[**Sign The Note of Support**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs01niv7d2kll9bbfohooslm60k4srp2b6jdjj20_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm2or4c3h2bs)
You and I must remind these America-loving students not to be intimidated by the viciousness of the radical Left.

We must ensure the next generation isn’t poisoned by lies that would teach them to hate our great nation and all that it stands for.

We must let these students know that while they may be tested for standing true to their Conservative principles, values, and beliefs ... they are not fighting alone and they WILL win in the American Culture War against the campus left.

[**Please add your name RIGHT NOW to this note of support to Turning Point USA students so they return to campus knowing Real Americans support them.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq0ri8bs4ot7pmtk34kvc6jqg3iceejn415dl3m8_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm2or4c3h2bs)
[**Sign The Note of Support**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkqvs0rnpdn332jcb6unvfgcji7mr8m5ildfi6jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctjm2or4c3h2bs)
For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell, Giffords.org
subject: This fight is personal to me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
When I was 24 years old, my life was forever changed due to gun violence.
#

Hi there — my name is Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and I’m a Senior Advisor at Giffords.
[**I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 donation before our September 30th fundraising deadline.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210927-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)
But first, let me tell you a little more about my background and how I got involved with Giffords.
As a former congresswoman, I served as the Vice-Chair of the Gun Violence Prevention Task Force, and I worked tirelessly in the House to pass universal background checks in 2019. However, then-Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell refused to sign the Bipartisan Background Checks Act of 2019. He left it untouched on his desk for almost two years.
I joined the team at Giffords because I want to finish what I started and see background checks signed into law. We can do it -- _I’m not giving up_ \-- but we will need your help to counter the strong influence of the gun lobby in Washington. That’s why I have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 donation before our September 30th fundraising deadline? Your support, regardless of the amount, will go a long way towards helping us finally pass background checks and save lives. Contribute here:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210927-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210927-1-15&t=21&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210927-1-15&t=22&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210927-1-15&t=23&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210927-1-15&t=24&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210927-1-15&t=25&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210927-1-15&t=26&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)**
---
****
There’s a reason I care so deeply about this issue. When I was 24 years old, my life was forever changed due to gun violence. My father didn’t have the chance to walk me down the aisle or meet my beautiful children because his life was taken far too soon.
I don’t want any other families to have to experience the pain that my family went through. That’s why I’m working as hard as I can to pass background checks and end gun violence in our communities.
I hope you are in this fight with me.
All my best,
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
Senior Advisor, Giffords
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-sept21?refcode=em210927-1-15&t=27&refcode2=1023_3935704_nTAjDy&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=1023%2E3935704%2EnTAjDy) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Alicia Pardo, Team Nikki
subject: We can’t afford to fall short
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

We’re coming up on a critical end-of-month fundraising deadline Thursday at midnight, and I’m concerned. As of right now, we’re on pace to miss our digital fundraising goal by 10%.

Before I go any further, I’m asking directly for your support. Your donation today will help us get back on track, so please click here to chip in now if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom]

I know you’re worried about defeating Ron DeSantis, team. He’s the most dangerous governor in America—and he’s growing more radical and authoritarian by the day as he prepares to run for President in 2024.

Here’s the bottom line: Nikki is the only candidate who can stop Ron DeSantis. But this will be an uphill battle against DeSantis’ massive warchest, so we need to start building now.

I know Democrats are all in on the fight to defeat DeSantis, so it just doesn’t make sense to me that we’re falling behind on our fundraising goals. So friend, I’m really hoping you can step up with a contribution.

Team, your donation of $3 or more could help us get back on track. If you’re in a position to give any amount, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom]

Thursday’s deadline is real, friends, and I’m worried about the consequences of falling short.

Ron DeSantis will spend $150 million on his reelection campaign, so every penny we raise matters in the fight to defeat him.

I hope you can chip in $3 or more to keep us on track in our mission to defeat DeSantis. Please click here to donate now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-september-eom]

Thanks,

Alicia Pardo
Finance Consultant

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Katie Porter Update (via info@unitedemocrats.org)
subject: Here’s what you need to know, Peter:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| _Here’s what you need to know, Peter:_
1. **_Republicans have been attacking Katie Porter nonstop._** They’re spewing lies about our progressive champion and funnelling millions into Katie’s district to take her down.

2. **_Katie has three days before her fundraising numbers go public._** That means after her End of Quarter Deadline, Republicans and media pundits will scrutinize her fundraising numbers.

name: Ethan Zorfas, Lead Strategists (via Team Josh)
subject: Mandel leads Vance by 24; Timken drops to 4th place
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
To: Interested Parties
From: Kristin Davison & Ethan Zorfas, Lead Strategists - Josh Mandel for US
Date: September 27, 2021
Subj: Mandel leads Vance by 24; Timken drops to 4th place

We thought you’d want to see the most recent polling in the race for US Senate in Ohio, conducted last week by WPA Intelligence. The full results of the poll are below. **Josh Mandel maintains Consistent and Commanding Double-Digit lead in Ohio Senate race**

**_Vance calling Trump voters Racists continues to haunt him; Timken drops to 4th place_**
A new poll conducted September 20-23 by WPA Intelligence shows that Marine Corps veteran and Conservative Trump warrior Josh Mandel holds a commanding lead in the race for Ohio’s Senate seat. JD Vance is in second place, 24-points behind Mandel, and Jane Timken is now in a distant 4th place. The results released September 27th are:
Josh Mandel – 37%
J.D. Vance – 13%
Mike Gibbons – 8%
Jane Timken – 6%
Matt Dolan – 3%
Bernie Moreno – 1%
Other – 6%
Undecided – 26% _**Mandel’s Consistent and Commanding Double Digit Lead**_
Mandel is the clear and wide frontrunner in the U.S. Senate race, in large part due to his full-throated, consistent and unwavering support of President Trump and the Trump America First agenda. As Ohio’s largest newspaper The Cleveland Plain Dealer recently said, “Unlike other major Senate candidates, Mandel has no public history of criticizing or distancing himself from Trump.”
_**Vance’s Never-Trump History**_

JD Vance’s poor showing in the poll is a result of a botched campaign rollout where it was revealed that he called Trump supporters “racists” and gave dozens of interviews to the left-wing media where he said he was a “Never Trumper” and that he thinks Trump is “noxious and reprehensible”. Vance even said he was strongly considering voting for Hillary Clinton before he eventually voted for Evan McMullin over Donald Trump. Then recently, after announcing his candidacy, Vance told Time Magazine that in order to support Trump at this point he would have to “suck it up.”

In an attempt to overcome Vance’s Never-Trump background, his super PAC has already spent over $2 million, but his candidacy is not gaining momentum as he is widely known as a “Never Trumper” in Ohio.

_**Timken drops to a distant 4th place**_
Jane Timken has spent over $700,000 on television and radio ads, only to see her polling numbers plummet. Republican voters will never forgive her for defending Anthony Gonzalez’s vote to impeach President Trump and that she called the impeachment “rational” and that she “didn’t know” how she would vote on impeachment. Timken was then booed at President Trump’s recent rally in Ohio when the President polled the crowd on the Ohio Senate race.
**METHODOLOGY**
WPA Intelligence conducted a study of Republican Primary Voters in Ohio.
WPA selected a random sample of registered voters from the Ohio voter file using Probability Proportionate to Size sampling (PPS) using a primary turnout model. The sample for this survey was stratified based on geography, age, gender, and cells (61%). This methodology allows us to avoid post-survey “weighting” which can reduce the reliability of survey results.
Respondents were contacted by phone via a live operator September 20-23, 2021. The study has a sample size of n=510 Republican Primary Voters, a margin of error of ±4.3%.
**About WPA Intelligence ** Since 1998, WPA Intelligence has been a leading provider of survey research, predictive analytics and technology for corporations, educational institutions, public affairs programs, non-profits, and campaigns from President to Governor, U.S. Congress, and local elections in all 50 states and multiple foreign countries. In the 2017-2018 and 2019-2020 cycles, WPAi’s polling and analytics plotted the course for multiple winning Senate, Governor, and House campaigns.
WPAi’s data and analytics continue to lead the industry. In the 2016 Republican Primary for President, arguably the most unprecedented presidential contest by way of turnout and political environment volatility, WPAi accurately projected turnout and the ballot score in 42 states using predictive analytics. In 2018, our predictive analytics tools were a key element of the RNC Voter Scores program and predicted the margins in numerous races with unmatched accuracy. Again in 2020, WPAi had unparalleled accuracy helping propel several candidates to victory in U.S. House and Senate elections.

WPAi has been nationally recognized for providing cutting-edge intelligence to help our clients win. The American Association of Political Consultants (AAPC) awarded WPAi “Pollies” for our Predictive Analytics and Adaptive Sampling techniques and our groundbreaking, data-focused social media application “Leonardo.” For our work in 2018, WPAi received “Reed Awards” for Best use of Data Analytics/Machine Learning, Best Use of Online Targeting for a Gubernatorial Campaign, Best New Research Technique, and Best Application of AI Technology to Optimize Targeting. In 2019, Chris Wilson, CEO, won Technology Leader of the Year by Campaigns & Elections and Matt Knee, Director of Analytics won AAPC's 40 under 40; in 2020, Trevor K. Smith, Ph.D., Research Director, won AAPC's 40 under 40 as well.

Full poll [here.](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=c6936c271da34826ab6f5d72d9de025c&_e=o9Z7PQ7N8hc-gFBaVVW28uQCz2ABZ3gfHBG2jHHNsQfXDd5KckDAvV5FQ7UDeFUUmp7Y8v9W4DB59OkcRMs_9RVC5uUok_yMU9zyN4TAtwTfx0XAsM_97hzDVMEbo8ajfLqlRuUPJi_EIbm_50-cXtpL29iAgU1WbGSUKs8j3oMAR30Ao22FZZnKTWLa7PcePnaVM_JoXl-3GQ8QygWZxnhm0fx_T1lPaN7PWkFl3krt7i6wM1x6yBTOha129p078Ws494SvAjtVqvXN0986DGA5l5sizkAn_cGe6JEUY7Dpuv8ZBk7uGjXQyFuU5g0IOA_7DTt58wjNwKDKeuVXj5SmMAWhrQpVJTi1eNxBEtqBA6O_6rLXbDp7NnSnPOes2dkoiDyihp2Lz-CRbGr-9A%3D%3D) Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account.
