name: Jeff King
subject: “We’re coming for you”
body:
Christians in Afghanistan are getting calls from the Taliban saying "We're coming for you." [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c453%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8OZ%2bEDgyMG%2fsO%2bIEHmeM4A&sysid=1)
Dear Faithful Friend, ** ** **Christians in Afghanistan are getting calls from the Taliban saying "We're coming for you."** ** ** **They are knocking on doors looking for those who don't come to mosque to find the Christians.** ** ** Afghanistan was already a very dangerous place for Christians but the Taliban takeover has made the situation critical for the incredibly brave believers that live there. You see, almost all Christians in Afghanistan are converts from Islam, making them apostates under according to Islam and Mohammed. That means they are under a death sentence. So most of them live out their Christianity "underground" but some of them have been open about their faith. These are the most vulnerable. And while their fate seems hopeless, we are committed to save every brave Christian we can from being killed at the hands of the Taliban. This is the work we do. To rescue, to bandage, and to build the persecuted Church. [**Which is why I am asking you for a $30 gift that will help us serve these Christians in Afghanistan and other places that are under severe threat.**](https://secure.anedot.com/45edbc85-7b17-4620-af5b-74d6b064fa52/c2423b550d83e8772be73?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20210924_BDG_ICC_AA_REV_AMS-GAU&utm_campaign=20210927&utm_content=gau) Let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Jeff King, and I'm president of International Christian Concern. [](https://secure.anedot.com/45edbc85-7b17-4620-af5b-74d6b064fa52/c2423b550d83e8772be73?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20210924_BDG_ICC_AA_REV_AMS-GAU&utm_campaign=20210927&utm_content=gau) Every year, 200 million Christians face persecution - but the press is silent about them. Therefore, many pastors and lay people don't even know that there is a war being waged on the church worldwide. ICC is like no other group helping persecuted Christians today. We go where no one else can or will go, where missionaries know they will be murdered. We work underground with indigenous Christians who have already put their lives on the altar knowing they may be killed for what they do. When a pastor is murdered, we rescue his family, getting them to a safe place with food and shelter and the ability to provide for themselves for the long term. When a church is attacked, we help to get it back up and functioning. We work in the most dangerous places in the world including Afghanistan, Nigeria's Middle Belt, and even North Korea. _Months before the American withdrawal from Afghanistan, we were rescuing Christians behind the scenes. We knew what was coming and we removed some of the most vulnerable Christians._ _ _ _Since the fall of Kabul, our work goes on._ _ _ _For those who escape we will be there. For those who stay, we will help them hide and also to spread the faith for those know they have the message of life for the dead and dying around them._ _ _ **But the total cost for rescue and ongoing care for these survivors in Afghanistan alone will be well over $1 million, and we're going to need all the help we can get.** ** ** [**So please, if you are able, donate $30 today to help us provide hope for persecuted Christians around the world.**](https://secure.anedot.com/45edbc85-7b17-4620-af5b-74d6b064fa52/c2423b550d83e8772be73?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20210924_BDG_ICC_AA_REV_AMS-GAU&utm_campaign=20210927&utm_content=gau) Persecution is a complex problem that can't be solved with just a handout, so we go deeper. Most organizations "parachute in" during a crisis. They throw money around and then leave when the headlines dry up. That's not ICC. We stick with persecution victims and work with them for the long term. We don't simply offer a bandage to "the wound" of persecution. We seek to break the cycle of persecution entirely. [ **Will you donate just $30 today to provide us with the resources we desperately need to bandage the survivors of persecution or to build the church in the toughest places in the world?**](https://secure.anedot.com/45edbc85-7b17-4620-af5b-74d6b064fa52/c2423b550d83e8772be73?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20210924_BDG_ICC_AA_REV_AMS-GAU&utm_campaign=20210927&utm_content=gau) ** ** In Afghanistan, $1000 allows us to care for a Christian family rescued from being murdered by the Taliban, but we help victims of persecution all over the world.
* In Nigeria, Islamists steal the land of farmers at gunpoint. For only $30 we can get that farmer back to farming and feeding his family again.
* In India, $100 allows us to equip a church planter with a new bicycle that will double or triple the number of churches he can plant.
* In North Korea, $200 allows us to send multiple gospel messages in via radio.

I know you can't walk into a village in India to supply a church planter with a new bicycle or 100 Bibles. You can't rescue a pastor in Afghanistan about to be murdered by the Taliban or stream the gospel into North Korea. But working together, you and I can do all this and more! [**Your donation of $30 or more today could literally save the life of a Christian in Afghanistan or another persecuted area.**](https://secure.anedot.com/45edbc85-7b17-4620-af5b-74d6b064fa52/c2423b550d83e8772be73?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20210924_BDG_ICC_AA_REV_AMS-GAU&utm_campaign=20210927&utm_content=gau) And you can't even imagine how grateful these survivors are to be touched by the family of God across the ocean after losing everything. They see the Father in action, working through you, and rescuing them against all odds when they are at their lowest. Watching our donors care for their brothers and sisters, I am continually reminded of Matthew 25:40: "Truly I tell you, whatever you did for one of the least of these brothers and sisters of mine, you did for me." Thank you in advance for your support and God Bless, Jeff King President, International Christian Concern P.S. [**Christians in Afghanistan are facing extreme danger. Those in hiding in the country or out need emergency life support. Please partner with me today as we Build and Bandage the church in the most dangerous places in the world.**](https://secure.anedot.com/45edbc85-7b17-4620-af5b-74d6b064fa52/c2423b550d83e8772be73?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20210924_BDG_ICC_AA_REV_AMS-GAU&utm_campaign=20210927&utm_content=gau) [](https://secure.anedot.com/45edbc85-7b17-4620-af5b-74d6b064fa52/c2423b550d83e8772be73?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20210924_BDG_ICC_AA_REV_AMS-GAU&utm_campaign=20210927&utm_content=gau) | | [](https://www.facebook.com/persecuted) | [](https://twitter.com/persecutionnews) | [](https://www.youtube.com/user/iChristianConcern) | [](https://www.instagram.com/internationalchristianconcern/)
---|---|---|---
[**www.persecution.org**](https://www.persecution.org/)

2020 Pennsylvania Ave. NW, # 941
Washington D.C. 20006-1846

**[Privacy Policy](https://www.persecution.org/privacy-policy/) **
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c453%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8OZ%2bEDgyMG%2fsO%2bIEHmeM4A&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c453%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8OZ%2bEDgyMG%2fsO%2bIEHmeM4A&sysid=1)

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of September 27th: Tyranny never sleeps – we can’t either!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* Watch a video from Truth for Health Foundation & share it online
* Local: Sign up to let us know you are interested in running for local office
* National: Call your Senators
* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
**Watch this Truth for Health Foundation video & share it
**
[**This is such an important video for every American to watch.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ydW1ibGUuY29tL2VtYmVkL3ZrNzQ4YS8_cHViPWN3NzZuJm1pZD00NDM3OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=7DCqRMLZJmixPYVXZ81YcQ) You need to be aware of what is happening in hospitals to Covid patients. Please watch it and share it online. It is a little on the longer side, so one thing you can do is watch it at a slightly faster speed. We recommend watching it at 1.25x speed if you need it to go a little faster.

Also, do you have a Covid story to tell about how the hospital treated you, or were you unable to get a prescription for treatment medicines from your doctor or pharmacy? If so, [**please tell us your story.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy5nbGUveE40bnR2c3k4WnBrREhiazg_bWlkPTQ0Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=eV4-GFlxhOgRYWA97egMmg) We need stories for the media, but will not share your name unless we have explicit permission from you to do so.
|
---
As an indicator of just how badly President Biden has mishandled the border crisis, he’s now getting heat from his fellow Democrats in Congress. More than 10,000 illegal immigrants from Haiti [have been holed up under the international bridge in Del Rio, Texas](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY25uLmNvbS8yMDIxLzA5LzIzL3BvbGl0aWNzL2RlbW9jcmF0aWMtcmVhY3Rpb24taGFpdGlhbi1pbW1pZ3JhbnRzLWJvcmRlci9pbmRleC5odG1sJTIwP21pZD00NDM3OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=jaYsbDFzlX6Am-9cyFBxUw), having crossed our border with Mexico. Democrats are furious with the administration over its treatment of the Haitians and are demanding answers. On top of that, the U.S. Special Envoy to Haiti appointed by Biden [resigned in protest](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY25iYy5jb20vMjAyMS8wOS8yMy91cy1zcGVjaWFsLWVudm95LXRvLWhhaXRpLXJlc2lnbnMtb3Zlci1taWdyYW50LWV4cHVsc2lvbnMuaHRtbD9taWQ9NDQzNzkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=OdAtG7-D9vlBj2-vKi2k8A) over the administration’s “inhumanity” in the border crisis.

The tragic human suffering could have been avoided with more effective border security and America-first immigration policies. Meanwhile, _The Washington Examiner_ [notes](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2FzaGluZ3RvbmV4YW1pbmVyLmNvbS9vcGluaW9uL2VkaXRvcmlhbHMvam9lLWJpZGVucy1zaGlwLWhhcy1zdGFydGVkLXRvLXNpbms_bWlkPTQ0Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=eN70C1y5g_owNbOTxcm3MQ) that Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (D-N.Y.), who was “[horrified](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGhlZ3VhcmRpYW4uY29tL3VzLW5ld3MvMjAxOS9qdWwvMDEvYW9jLWJvcmRlci1mYWNpbGl0eS1ob3JyaWZ5aW5nLWNicC1vZmZpY2Vycy10d2VldHM_bWlkPTQ0Mzc5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=v3-2Ad-VIdohWByg2JqEjQ)” by what she saw when she visited the border in 2019 during the Trump administration has yet to pose for another “grief-stricken photo like the one she set up when the president was a Republican.”

**Local: Sign up to let us know you are interested in running for office
**
Think about the school boards that force children to wear masks all day... still, even though actual science shows us this is crazy; that allow graphic gay porn into the school libraries; that support schools teaching students to hate each other based on skin color. Think about the local elected officials who locked us down, killed small businesses, mandated masks for all citizens, are now mandating vaccines in order to participate in society, all the while ignoring the rules for themselves.

Local officials from school board members to state legislators have so much power over our day to day lives, as we found out with Covid. With the federal government being run by dictatorial Democrats, it is more important than ever to take over local government.

You don’t have to start with state legislator. You can start with school board or other, smaller positions. These are also, in most cases, easier to win. Please consider running for local office. Now is the time, and we are working on candidate training, so that you won’t be running unprepared.

[**Use this form to let us know you’re interested.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZm9ybXMvbG9jYWwtb2ZmaWNlLWNhbmRpZGF0ZS1zdXJ2ZXkvP21pZD00NDM3OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=iiIEkFh68WbBRMezDT8lUA) You’re not committing to run by filling out the form, you’re just telling us you’re interested, so that we can email you information about the training.
|

Americans already know that Gen. Mark Milley usurped the chain of command, according to the newly released book _Peril_. The Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman twice called Chinese officials – without consulting then-President Trump – to assure them that America wasn't planning to initiate a strike at China, authors Bob Woodward and Robert Costa contend.

But what Americans might not be aware of is that as late as July 21, Milley was walking in lockstep with the Biden administration in [dismissing any likelihood of a Taliban takeover of Afghanistan](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucG9saXRpY28uY29tL25ld3MvMjAyMS8wNy8yMS9tYXJrLW1pbGxleS10b3AtZ2VuZXJhbC1hZmdoYW5pc3Rhbi10YWxpYmFuLTUwMDQ0NSUyMD9taWQ9NDQzNzkmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=IGhbOBVbVbR88lKGmAQAOw). “I don’t think the end game is yet written,” he told reporters. “A negative outcome, a Taliban automatic takeover, is not a foregone conclusion.”

To date, calls to hold hearings to investigate the matter have been ignored by congressional Democrats, and Milley has not had to account for his words or actions. And eager to avoid embarrassment, President Biden has not called for his resignation.
|

**National: Call both of your Senators
**
We need to all be calling our Senators again this week. It is a tedious task, we know. We’re sick of doing it too. The problem is... that’s what they want. They want you to be so sick of it that you stop. Remember, it really takes less than five minutes of your day to make these two calls – and they don’t want you making them. So, let’s do the opposite of what they tyrants want and let’s keep calling!

There are five short messages you will want to give when you call, whether Democrat or Republican. Also, below the messages to give, there is a list of articles and summaries so that you understand the issues better, though you don’t have to argue anything on the phone. When you call, just keep it super short and simple. The reading is so that _you_ know what’s going on.

**When you call, simply say...**
* Vote no on the reconciliation bill.
* Vote no on S. 2747 (the Democrats are calling it the “Freedom to Vote Act,” but we all know it’s really the “Freedom to Cheat Act.”)
* Remove the provision from the NDAA that will require women to sign up for the draft.
* Support and vote yes on Sen. Rubio’s TREAT Act (“Treatment Restoration for Emergency Antibody Therapeutics”)
* Support and vote yes on S. 1932, the “No Vaccine Passport Act,” and oppose all medical mandates.

President Bidens’s mismanagement of Afghanistan, the worsening border crisis, his far-left economic policies and ineffectiveness against COVID-19 [have left his approval rating in a freefall](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjcwLTdjNTM0ZTQyYzUwMjQyZjVhZWIwM2U0MjdhMjE4MjIx%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMTU%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudXNhdG9kYXkuY29tL3N0b3J5L25ld3MvcG9saXRpY3MvMjAyMS8wOS8yMi9iaWRlbi1hcHByb3ZhbC1yYXRpbmctbG93ZXN0LWVpZ2h0LW1vbnRocy1nYWxsdXAtcG9sbC81ODE5ODMxMDAxL8KgP21pZD00NDM3OSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=9lrSMFcGOi4vnrOaXIu6Ng), new polling information reveals. In just one month, Biden dropped six points to a 43% approval and 53% disapproval according to a Gallup survey. Its August poll pegged Biden with a 49%-48% approval/disapproval rating.

Another indicator of Biden’s political trouble is that the souring views of independent voters are the biggest reason his polling numbers are now underwater.

If Biden is unable to quickly and dramatically reverse his falling popularity ratings, he will become a lame-duck president with little chance of advancing his radical agenda, while congressional Democrats would become increasingly vulnerable in the midterm elections.

The Joint Chiefs of Staff Chairman twice called Chinese officials – without consulting then-President Trump – to assure them that America wasn't planning to initiate a strike at China, authors Bob Woodward and Robert Costa contend. But what Americans might not be aware of is that as late as July 21, Milley was walking in lockstep with the Biden administration in . “I don’t think the end game is yet written,” he told reporters. “A negative outcome, a Taliban automatic takeover, is not a foregone conclusion.” To date, calls to hold hearings to investigate the matter have been ignored by congressional Democrats, and Milley has not had to account for his words or actions. And eager to avoid embarrassment, President Biden has not called for his resignation. | National: Call both of your Senators We need to all be calling our Senators again this week. It is a tedious task, we know. We’re sick of doing it too. The problem is... that’s what they want. They want you to be so sick of it that you stop. Remember, it really takes less than five minutes of your day to make these two calls – and they don’t want you making them. So, let’s do the opposite of what they tyrants want and let’s keep calling! There are five short messages you will want to give when you call, whether Democrat or Republican. Also, below the messages to give, there is a list of articles and summaries so that you understand the issues better, though you don’t have to argue anything on the phone. When you call, just keep it super short and simple. The reading is so that you know what’s going on. When you call, simply say... Vote no on the reconciliation bill. Vote no on S. 2747 (the Democrats are calling it the “Freedom to Vote Act,” but we all know it’s really the “Freedom to Cheat Act.”) Remove the provision from the NDAA that will require women to sign up for the draft. Support and vote yes on Sen. Rubio’s TREAT Act (“Treatment Restoration for Emergency Antibody Therapeutics”) Support and vote yes on S. 1932, the “No Vaccine Passport Act,” and oppose all medical mandates. Recommended reading about the reconciliation bill Recommended reading about S. 2747 Recommended reading about women in the draft (follow this issue through Family Research Council) Recommended reading about Sen. Rubio’s bill | President Bidens’s mismanagement of Afghanistan, the worsening border crisis, his far-left economic policies and ineffectiveness against COVID-19 , new polling information reveals. In just one month, Biden dropped six points to a 43% approval and 53% disapproval according to a Gallup survey. Its August poll pegged Biden with a 49%-48% approval/disapproval rating. Another indicator of Biden’s political trouble is that the souring views of independent voters are the biggest reason his polling numbers are now underwater. If Biden is unable to quickly and dramatically reverse his falling popularity ratings, he will become a lame-duck president with little chance of advancing his radical agenda, while congressional Democrats would become increasingly vulnerable in the midterm elections. | Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do September is and is September 28th. The links will take you to websites with resources like how to register people to vote, state laws, and more. | Keep attending the monthly meetings of your local school board! You can use our again before you attend, and if you haven’t yet watched, you can view the two training webinars we recorded on attending school board meetings. You can find , and . | If you didn’t contact the medical boards and associations to reprimand them for threatening doctors who prescribe medicines like Ivermectin, please do so this week! to help you know who to contact and what to say when you email or call. These doctors are risking their careers for us, the least we can do is send an email or make a call on their behalf! | | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes. © 2021 80 M St SE, First Floor, Washington, D.C. 20003 | ******

Patriot,

I hope you had a great weekend!

I’m feeling amazing this morning and we made so much progress yesterday!

I hate to keep asking, but I’m not doing my job as a candidate if I don’t: **[will you make a donation today?](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Z3huPWniY9hbob8t5YHcnA/zg6L763G6mDnZu763kLjFuUw6A)**

---

We’re halfway to our goal but with only three days left, I still have so much work to do to hit my goal, and [I’m relying on you to pitch in whatever you can in these last days](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Z3huPWniY9hbob8t5YHcnA/zg6L763G6mDnZu763kLjFuUw6A).

I read every email that comes back and there are so many folks on fixed incomes or those who have recently lost their jobs. Some still donate while others feel bad because they can’t.

**Don’t feel bad for a second!** If you’re [in a position to contribute](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Z3huPWniY9hbob8t5YHcnA/zg6L763G6mDnZu763kLjFuUw6A), I’m extremely grateful.

In the end, you, me and thousands of other patriots are all one big team working together to do the best we can!

There will be no lobbyists or industries supporting my campaign and I’m totally fine with that, because once elected, I won’t be beholden to any group or special interest.

**I can AND WILL put America First as it should be!**

Thanks again, and only if you’re able, [please help me hit our quarterly fundraising goal before Midnight on the 1st](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Z3huPWniY9hbob8t5YHcnA/zg6L763G6mDnZu763kLjFuUw6A)!

Thanks so much,

Laura Loomer

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our FEC fundraising deadline. This is an all-important test of our momentum -- which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain? Every three months, candidates for federal office must report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our public FEC report will show the amount of money we have raised and most importantly, the number of people who have chipped in to help. Democrats have a 50-50 majority in the Senate right now. We need to protect and expand it, and that starts by flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeating Ron Johnson. That starts with _you._ It’s going to be a steep climb to raise as much as we can in the next few days, but I believe we can do it if enough of us come together before we close out the quarter. That’s why I have to ask: [**Will you add a contribution of $10 or more to my campaign for the United States Senate in Wisconsin? clean_body: In a few moments, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin before our FEC fundraising deadline. This is an all-important test of our momentum -- which is why I’m reaching out. Will you let me explain? Every three months, candidates for federal office must report their fundraising details to the Federal Election Commission. It’s a way of ensuring transparency in our elections. Our public FEC report will show the amount of money we have raised and most importantly, the number of people who have chipped in to help. Democrats have a 50-50 majority in the Senate right now. We need to protect and expand it, and that starts by flipping Wisconsin’s Senate seat and defeating Ron Johnson. That starts with you. It’s going to be a steep climb to raise as much as we can in the next few days, but I believe we can do it if enough of us come together before we close out the quarter. | | Hi Peter,

My name is Faith Winter, and I’m a Colorado State Senator.

I’ve served alongside Dr. Caraveo in the Colorado legislature for nearly three years, and I know that she is the kind of leader we need in Congress.

I have seen her time and time again put working families first. As a pediatrician, we can trust Dr. Caraveo to follow the science and work to protect our community.

This will not be an easy fight. Although the redistricting maps aren’t finalized yet, we know it’s going to be a competitive district, and Dr. Caraveo is going to need a lot of support from our community.

In the Colorado legislature, I have watched her win many difficult battles, and I know this won’t be any different. Right now, she’s facing her first end-of-quarter deadline — the most important of her campaign — and she really needs our support.

clean_body: We’re teaming up to deliver real results to Colorado families. | | Hi Peter, My name is Faith Winter, and I’m a Colorado State Senator. I’ve served alongside Dr. Caraveo in the Colorado legislature for nearly three years, and I know that she is the kind of leader we need in Congress. I have seen her time and time again put working families first. As a pediatrician, we can trust Dr. Caraveo to follow the science and work to protect our community. This will not be an easy fight. Although the redistricting maps aren’t finalized yet, we know it’s going to be a competitive district, and Dr. Caraveo is going to need a lot of support from our community. In the Colorado legislature, I have watched her win many difficult battles, and I know this won’t be any different. Right now, she’s facing her first end-of-quarter deadline — the most important of her campaign — and she really needs our support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | | = ---|---|--- = | | = = | | = With gratitude, Sen. name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: All of our progress is under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear -- especially now that Virginians are already voting.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36567461/308488043/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjczMTM3ZS1kYzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KD9tOBKWc51a7QNL4pSzPiqUpZwIKt_GEgrFRRjLMzY=&emci=9478f993-a11f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=1673137e-dc1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, I’m sorry to bother you, but it’s important. Early voting is already underway in Virginia, and **_a recent poll shows my Trump-backed opponent Glenn Youngkin ahead by 2 points._** It’s the first poll he’s led all campaign and it’s coming at an awful time. Our fundraising has completely stalled out over the last couple days and I need your help so we can kick it into high gear -- especially now that Virginians are already voting. **_[Will you split a contribution between Mark Warner and my campaign? Your contribution goes directly toward our efforts to turn out voters, defend Virginia’s progress, and stop Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36567462/308488044/-116611833?refcode=mw_em_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjczMTM3ZS1kYzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KD9tOBKWc51a7QNL4pSzPiqUpZwIKt_GEgrFRRjLMzY=)_** If you’re like me, you’re getting a lot of fundraising emails right now. I don’t doubt the urgency of those races, but let me tell you why no race is more important than Virginia in 2021. For the last decade, Virginia Democrats have led the nation by delivering victory after victory for working families. Right now all of that progress is under attack. If my opponent Glenn Youngkin becomes Virginia’s governor, he’ll roll back every inch we fought so hard for. Moreover, Donald Trump has endorsed Youngkin three separate times. If Youngkin wins, Trump’s 2024 presidential run will get a huge momentum boost heading into 2022. **_[So I’m asking -- will you split anything you can right now between me and Mark Warner to help us deliver a huge victory for Democrats this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36567463/308488045/-116611833?refcode=mw_em_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjczMTM3ZS1kYzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KD9tOBKWc51a7QNL4pSzPiqUpZwIKt_GEgrFRRjLMzY=)_** Thanks for your time, Terry McAuliffe **[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36567464/308488046/-116611833?refcode=mw_em_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjczMTM3ZS1kYzFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KD9tOBKWc51a7QNL4pSzPiqUpZwIKt_GEgrFRRjLMzY=)**

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Rally for Ohio with Governor Kristi Noem & Jane Timken!
body:
Can't miss opportunity to meet Gov. Noem [](https://) **Ohio, Governor Kristi Noem is headed our way!** This will be huge. Peter, This Wednesday, September 29th, South Dakota's unstoppable Governor will be rallying Jane Timken's America First army here in Ohio...and we want you to be in the room when it happens! As crime and inflation rise across the state due to the weak leadership from Democrats in our cities, it is more crucial than ever we reverse the horrific policies the left is ramming through every day. From the crisis at the border, to the attack on our law enforcement, we must stop their agenda. Governor Kristi Noem knows Jane Timken is the strongest person in the race for Ohio's Senate seat, which is exactly why she endorsed her, and will be rallying troops in less than 48 hours! clean_body: Can't miss opportunity to meet Gov. Noem https:// Ohio, Governor Kristi Noem is headed our way! This will be huge. Peter, This Wednesday, September 29th, South Dakota's unstoppable Governor will be rallying Jane Timken's America First army here in Ohio...and we want you to be in the room when it happens! As crime and inflation rise across the state due to the weak leadership from Democrats in our cities, it is more crucial than ever we reverse the horrific policies the left is ramming through every day. From the crisis at the border, to the attack on our law enforcement, we must stop their agenda. Governor Kristi Noem knows Jane Timken is the strongest person in the race for Ohio's Senate seat, which is exactly why she endorsed her, and will be rallying troops in less than 48 hours! Click the button below to RSVP. Space is extremely limited. You must RSVP to be let into this event. Rally for Ohio featuring Governor Kristi Noem Date: Wednesday, 9/29 Time: 3:00PM Location: 921 Chatham Ln. Columbus OH 43221 See you Wednesday! -Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

If we can’t hit our goal, we could be giving the green light for more Republican opponents to jump in the race. Given that Steve already has to battle five Trump cronies at the same time, we have to step up to the plate and play our role. **The single best way you can help right now is by chipping in to our end-of-quarter goal.**

clean_body: | | | | | Team, the countdown is officially on to hit our $30,000 end-of-quarter goal! This will be one of the most important goals we have ahead of 2022 and it’s crucial that we make waves by reaching it. We don’t have much time to reach it so we’ll get straight to the point. | | | | | | | | | | | | | The reason we’re marking this goal as urgent is because it’ll show Steve’s Republican opponents exactly where we stand. Whether or not we hit this goal could determine how strong they view our campaign. And folks, we simply cannot risk coming across as vulnerable this early into the race. If we can’t hit our goal, we could be giving the green light for more Republican opponents to jump in the race. Given that Steve already has to battle five Trump cronies at the same time, we have to step up to the plate and play our role. The single best way you can help right now is by chipping in to our end-of-quarter goal. | | | | | | | | | | | | Together, we can show the Republican Party that Steve’s grassroots team means business. Thanks for your support, \- Team Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Folks,

This Thursday at midnight is the Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline.

That means our fundraising numbers will go public, and _everyone_ will be able to see just how fired up our grassroots supporters are to unseat Kevin McCarthy.

**But to truly make a statement, we must report the strongest numbers possible. That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise another $20,000 before the deadline, and we’re relying on you to help us close that gap.

[Please, rush a donation of any amount right now to help us send Kevin McCarthy packing and bring true leadership back to CA-23. This FEC deadline is clean_body: This is when we’ll prove to the country that CA-23 can go blue. | | | Folks, This Thursday at midnight is the Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline. That means our fundraising numbers will go public, and everyone will be able to see just how fired up our grassroots supporters are to unseat Kevin McCarthy. But to truly make a statement, we must report the strongest numbers possible. That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise another $20,000 before the deadline, and we’re relying on you to help us close that gap. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. I’m counting on all of you, Bruno Amato | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

clean_body: | | | | The ** has hit the fan. Dear Peter, In one-party, D.C. rule, Republican attorneys general are the firewall against the vast excesses of the Biden Administration. I’m West Virginia AG Patrick Morrisey and one of the leaders of the GOP Attorneys General fighting against Biden’s unconstitutional actions. We’ve defeated Biden and Obama on huge issues in court when they’ve crossed the line. But Biden is now moving very aggressively and we need more help. We need more lawyers, grassroots, and money to stem the tide against Biden’s efforts. With no apologies to Warren Zevon, and his famous song, “Lawyers, guns, and money,” the shit has hit the fan. It’s important for us to not only win in court. We need to win over the hearts and minds of the American people to turn the tide against socialism and the destruction of our republic. Thanks. | | | | | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media **|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. subject: Rematch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates:
body:
Eugene is thinking about running against Scott Perry in 2022, and we need your input today. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36568735/308492432/-1129432161?refcode=EM_PET_210927rematch_N_TE_FULL_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZmYzVhOS1kZTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4-9MvGVn-9mN98UCTpWbsIMyEs6MWc1vsTI0tNJw8Q=)
---
Friend,

When Eugene ran for Congress in 2020, he came close to defeating Scott Perry and putting the people of central Pennsylvania ahead of partisan politics and the special interests. **Since then, the discourse in America has turned increasingly violent and hateful, officials like Perry pander to extremists and conspiracy theories, and partisan gridlock and obstruction have only gotten worse.**

America faces significant challenges on multiple fronts -- the continuing threat of the COVID pandemic; an economic recovery that demands real leadership and accountability; the worsening climate crisis; and a relentless assault on our voting rights, reproductive freedoms, and the very principles of democracy itself.

The people of Pennsylvania deserve better, and Eugene is committed, now more than ever, to holding Congressman Perry accountable for his dangerous actions.

**[Eugene is strongly considering a rematch against him in 2022, and we’re asking you to add your name to draft Eugene to run again. It’s time we deliver a real leader to Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36568736/308492433/1806343626?refcode=EM_PET_210927rematch_N_TE_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZmYzVhOS1kZTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4-9MvGVn-9mN98UCTpWbsIMyEs6MWc1vsTI0tNJw8Q=&emci=add76891-c21f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=cb6fc5a9-de1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=10203249)** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36568737/308492434/1806343626?refcode=EM_PET_210927rematch_N_TE_FULL_4_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjZmYzVhOS1kZTFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4-9MvGVn-9mN98UCTpWbsIMyEs6MWc1vsTI0tNJw8Q=&emci=add76891-c21f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&emdi=cb6fc5a9-de1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&ceid=10203249) ** Thank you,

Since then, the discourse in America has turned increasingly violent and hateful, officials like Perry pander to extremists and conspiracy theories, and partisan gridlock and obstruction have only gotten worse. America faces significant challenges on multiple fronts -- the continuing threat of the COVID pandemic; an economic recovery that demands real leadership and accountability; the worsening climate crisis; and a relentless assault on our voting rights, reproductive freedoms, and the very principles of democracy itself. The people of Pennsylvania deserve better, and Eugene is committed, now more than ever, to holding Congressman Perry accountable for his dangerous actions. name: Jenna Henry, Keystone Progress
subject: Abortion rights under attack.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b]

Dear Friend,

All across the country, abortion rights are under attack in increasingly cruel and awful ways.

Take S.B. 8, Texas’ draconian law that restricts abortions to 6 weeks of pregnancy -- before most people know they’re pregnant -- and allows bounty hunters to sue anyone in Texas who helps someone get an abortion. Because of this ban in Texas, the Guttmacher Institute found that Roe v. Wade is effectively meaningless for one in ten women of reproductive age in the U.S.

How terrifying is that?

The worst part is that other states, like ours, are following Texas' path. The only thing keeping legislators from banning abortion right here in PA is the Governor’s veto. These bans overwhelmingly harm low income earners, people of color, and young people -- all who already face extreme barriers to healthcare access.

We are fighting to keep abortion accessible and legal in PA for ALL who live here. Our work costs money -- and we need your help to get it done.

Please support us in meeting our end-of-month goal with a donation today.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b&amount=10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b&amount=10.00] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b&amount=20.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b&amount=20.00] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b&amount=50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b&amount=50.00]
Whatever you can afford [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=092721b]

Together, we can protect our rights.

Thank you,

Jenna Henry
Keystone Progress

clean_body: We deserve fair districts that follow the law. | Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team -- the newly drawn districts rigged in favor of Republicans are being challenged in the Ohio Supreme Court by the ACLU of Ohio, the League of Women Voters of Ohio, and former U.S. Attorney General Eric Holder's National Redistricting Action Fund. There’s no time to waste. Ohio Republicans could use extreme gerrymandering behind closed doors to make Democrats like Marcy Kaptur vulnerable to a Republican flip -- instead of doing the hard work and earning voter’s support. We deserve fair districts that follow the law and accurately represent the people of Ohio. That is why it’s more important than ever that we send Rep. Marcy Kaptur back to Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for your support, \-- Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: One of the most consequential weeks I’ve seen in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s not an exaggeration to say that this week will be one of the most consequential I’ve seen in Congress. I’ll be fighting for you every moment of it.
#
**Peter, big news:** Today’s scheduled vote on the smaller infrastructure bill was postponed.
**This is a**** _huge_****victory for our progressive movement and a testament to our grassroots organizing. Here’s why:** Corporations, Big Pharma, and a few Conservative Democrats wanted a vote on the smaller bill today to move it forward WITHOUT investments in our priorities — from economic relief to climate action.
But progressives organized inside and outside of Congress to demand that we not leave behind working families and communities by leaving behind investments in health care, universal child care, pre-k, paid leave, climate action, housing, health care, and a roadmap to citizenship for Dreamers, TPS recipients, and essential workers.
**I even took our movement’s case to the Oval Office, and now the vote is being delayed to ensure we have the time necessary to pass the full Build Back Better Act WITH our priorities included.** A deal is a deal, and we’re sticking to it.
But Peter, this win is only a first step, and we know that corporations will only increase their spending blitz to defeat us. [**We have to hold the line and deliver this transformative agenda — can you chip in $3 or more to help me keep the pressure on my colleagues to finally deliver on the change we promised working people?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6660?refcode=em20210927-670&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=670%2E420207%2Ehs_GCJ)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/6660?refcode=em20210927-670&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=670%2E420207%2Ehs_GCJ)**
It’s not an exaggeration to say that this week will be one of the most consequential I’ve seen in Congress. I’ll be fighting for you every moment of it. Let’s get this done.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210927-670-footer&t=22&refcode2=670_420207_hs_GCJ&akid=670%2E420207%2Ehs_GCJ)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Mark Jefferson - Executive Director
subject: RPW Local Race Initiative
body:
Help us support local candidates!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend \-- **For some time, liberals have been infiltrating our local governments and school boards with radical socialist ideas and Critical Race Theory, and they MUST be stopped.** Having experienced the effects of far left liberal policies in their own communities, many conservative activists around the state have decided to put matters into their own hands by running for local office. The Republican Party of Wisconsin, along with county party leaders, have been working hard to ensure that these brave candidates have the resources and training they need to be effective leaders in their own communities. [**But they need your support!**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVEhIWMoAFHND7Yaq3LO6KJv-SEXSSxdU7e22-AX-TUj8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=2) Starting off this past year, the Republican Party of Wisconsin**launched a 6-figure initiative to help take back many of our local offices throughout the state**. The initiative helped **recruit, train, and support 100+ local candidates in over 80 local races throughout the state.** [**This effort to take back our local offices couldn’t have been made possible without your support.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVEhIWMoAFHND7Yaq3LO6KJv-SEXSSxdU7e22-AX-TUj8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=3) **By donating to our Local Elections Fund, you will help us recruit, train, and support local, motivated leaders who want to make a difference in their communities by running for local office.** Your donation will help us provide training, tools and data to help common sense conservatives run and win local elections. **Can you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help us build a coalition of local conservative leaders? We can’t do it without you!** [****](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVEhIWMoAFHND7Yaq3LO6KJv-SEXSSxdU7e22-AX-TUj8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=4) Thank you for your continued support to the Republican Party of Wisconsin. Mark Jefferson
Executive Director
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=5).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=6) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=7).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=local_election_0927_v3&n=8), software for leaders.

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I always want to be honest with you, even when it isn't good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
| |
---
| | | | Peter, it's Marco here.

I know that by now you have probably seen the new poll that shows me statistically tied with my Trump Impeachment Manager Opponent:
**MARCO RUBIO (R-FL): 48%
VAL DEMINGS (D-FL): 46%**
I've sent you messages about how important this is, but it seems like you think it doesn't matter. I haven't seen your name on the list of supporters who have stepped up to protect the successes we made under President Trump's leadership. I'm starting to think you've given up.
---
| | | [STAY IN THIS FIGHT >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423187:68T0q22Nv:m:1:3253819041:A25B8B36490072C54990481B349C6B59:r "STAY IN THIS FIGHT >>")
---
| I know that things may look tough right now, but giving up now is exactly what liberals want you to do. To show you just how important this is, I want to remind you what all is at stake.

Here's what President Trump and I accomplished that Democrats are trying to erase:
* We cut taxes for hard-working families
* We fully funded our military to eliminate threats coming from other countries
* We fought to secure our borders and stop illegal immigrants from bringing crime into America
* We supported small businesses when COVID shut the country down
* We took on China and the big businesses living in their pocket
* We fought for American jobs to stay right here in America
* **But above all, we fought for YOU, Peter**

The fight for all the progress we made under President Trump is separated by just 2%.I don't want my next update to be that we're losing by 2%. This is where you come in.

My team and I decided that in order to stay in this race and stay competitive, we need to raise $20,000. **[If you can spare even just $10 today, you can help us reach that goal by midnight, so please, please, send in whatever you can as soon as possible>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423187:68T0q22Nv:m:1:3253819041:A25B8B36490072C54990481B349C6B59:r "If you can spare even just $10 today, you can help us reach that goal by midnight, so please, please, send in whatever you can as soon as
possible >>")**

My opponent has spent $3 MILLION to keep her ads up and running. Can you believe that? $3,000,000 SINCE HER CAMPAIGN STARTED. When I found that out, I thought there was no way, and I even checked myself. I can report that she is indeed spending that and has her Democrat allies spending even more.

I always knew I'd be outraised and outspent. Fox News even said this would be "the most expensive race in U.S. history." However, I never thought the polls would show us this tight this early. Even that took me by surprise, but I guess with how much she's spending, I should've known this would happen.

I hope this extremely tight poll is a wake up call. If we don't step things up now, we will fall behind. I know it seems early, I really do. I never planned to be reaching out like this in September of 2021. Summer just ended and the kids have headed back to school (we're going through the same thing here at our house), so **I understand you 're busy, but sending in a donation on our online checkout system will only take a minute tops:**
---
| | | [MAKE A DONATION >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423187:68T0q22Nv:m:1:3253819041:A25B8B36490072C54990481B349C6B59:r "MAKE A
DONATION >>")
---
| I know you haven't donated yet since the poll came out, which is why I had to personally reach out. I know this news is disheartening, but I'm nowhere near giving up yet, and I wanted to let you know why you shouldn't either.

Thank you for your time,
Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423188:68T0q22Nv:m:1:3253819041:A25B8B36490072C54990481B349C6B59:r "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423188:68T0q22Nv:m:1:3253819041:A25B8B36490072C54990481B349C6B59:r "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | [DONATE](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423188:68T0q22Nv:m:1:3253819041:A25B8B36490072C54990481B349C6B59:r "DONATE")
---
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

P.O. Box 661537
Miami, FL 33266

[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423189:68T0q22Nv:m:1:3253819041:A25B8B36490072C54990481B349C6B59:r)
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system March 29, 2021.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i68T0q22Nv). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o68T0q22Nv)

body:
Nancy stands up to the Left and the status quo on issues impacting South Carolinians, from vaccine mandates and inflation to resources for veterans... [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=508a1dc1abdd4bbe90b8ce03192ce925&_e=0m5Xcc8h6bdmmVRCWzADLzRFlokH9EP5sbBY9bSpZlccCzmy1e5gKEV5lxLJSegNzQW_8RJRSEXEXem3DEOSrBkQKYGEaREIg_I9ukHxogaxIQg9M7hx0ZmoF1FZaO1ndRqkCQlZe-xqaGS5bgYqcxCrmgZqcZbshIgTTCgpJM7rF17vI57xOKMTNnouA-7Hdn87swPiWIz2hTec3nowaCWBSb6gtL75HvEIegHWkDtdXufIEqvJAqcTM4XHO8K_T3J2Q90Ds1vhJLrcG8p1IDG08So1cpzp450VWH4B-IWywrenKWLAo31cw_K8F7q7gURCX9g5GTuBpd5ogRNRgpLa7Lc6ZRjK7A4ycHeEdeXyiYBai9vjZ9Vp0xff3N2LcfG_ihwbPJJimJpLNKJ_qz7cb0Bx1YRWPMIrNvXeTxiJJ0xvrqvuKPCsfDB9sV90) Nancy Mace is working hard in Congress to deliver for the Lowcountry and America.
Nancy stands up to the Left and the status quo on issues impacting South Carolinians, from vaccine mandates and inflation to resources for veterans and the disaster in Afghanistan.
**The bottom line is Nancy delivers.**

With polls showing Glenn Youngkin ahead and Virginians already headed to the polls, it’s more important than ever that we reach our two million dollar fundraising goal.

**_[Can I count on you to do your part by rushing a $25 contribution right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36572422/308502412/-2023814932?refcode=20210827.5_TM_9FV&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTNkMDlhNS1lNjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T1cxRQbSkIuIHAvSatKtpw1Yxao-uDvEb0krSH0fy14=)_**

clean_body: no time to waste | | | = | | Derek, we have three days until our end-of-September filing deadline. With polls showing Glenn Youngkin ahead and Virginians already headed to the polls, it’s more important than ever that we reach our two million dollar fundraising goal. = Reaching our goal matters because of one number: 75 million. Glenn Youngkin has promised to spend $75 million from his personal wealth to buy the Governor's office and we expect him to report a HUGE number on filing day. If we don’t hit our own fundraising goal, Youngkin will have a huge advantage for the entire month of October — and we might not be able to recover from that. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for being on my team, Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

| | **Protecting the right to vote, fair wages for workers, investing in our failing infrastructure, addressing climate change and spurring our economy forward should not be controversial or partisan. But here we are.** Democrats want to move our country forward and address the most critical issues of our time. And with 2022 only 90 days away there is a serious threat of returning to a Republican majority in the House - devastating any progress we make. [**We are counting on your grassroots support to maintain our slim Democratic majority. Please take a moment and chip in before September's critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36572805/308503375/1596212816?refcode=2021-09-27-eoq&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9425f242-e81f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDI1ZjI0Mi1lODFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrARHb23zNM25Lb7NsvVSXEV9lUROspGQsXZL2jYja8=) It is an unfortunate and unprecedented time for government, where good ideas and caring for your fellow citizens are looked at as progressive luxuries. clean_body: | | | Protecting the right to vote, fair wages for workers, investing in our failing infrastructure, addressing climate change and spurring our economy forward should not be controversial or partisan. But here we are. Democrats want to move our country forward and address the most critical issues of our time. And with 2022 only 90 days away there is a serious threat of returning to a Republican majority in the House - devastating any progress we make. = It is an unfortunate and unprecedented time for government, where good ideas and caring for your fellow citizens are looked at as progressive luxuries. But despite Donald Trump no longer serving as President, Republicans in leadership refuse to move forward — some going so far as to continue to insist the election was stolen, further weakening public faith. We must fight to maintain trust in our institutions , and that can only happen through sound investment and increased participation that includes all of our voices. I am committed to a better future for all of us, and that road includes ensuring Democrats maintain our majorities in the U.S. House. = Rick Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. ---|--- | This email was sent by . name: Cory Booker
subject: LOVE
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
We will never defeat hate with spite. We cannot defeat dishonesty with more lies. We will never defeat cruelty with malevolence.
#

Love.
Throughout my career in politics, I’ve had one guiding principle: Love.
Because we will never defeat hate with spite. We cannot defeat dishonesty with more lies. We will never defeat cruelty with malevolence.
We need love.
And we need truth. And we need decency.
Those are the values I’ve seen from Mark Kelly in the Senate.
And if we are going to bring people together and move this country forward through these difficult times, we need more Mark Kellys in the Senate, not fewer.
And that is why we need to do everything possible to make sure he wins re-election. But he cannot do it alone. He is already facing significant amounts of outside spending.
So I am asking:

name: John Fetterman
subject: I know these requests can sometimes start to pile up, so I want to take a moment to explain why your support is so crucial
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Basically, the momentum of our campaign is about to become public.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210927-2795-header&t=1&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)
Peter,
I'm coming to you today to ask if you'll please kick in [** _your first-ever $5 donation to our campaign to flip this Pennsylvania Senate seat before the FEC deadline this Thursday at 11:59 p.m. ET._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30712?refcode=em20210927-2795&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)
That said, I think my team and I owe you an explanation. Some context, if you will:
Every quarter, campaigns like ours are legally required to report out all our latest fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission. **Basically, the momentum of our campaign becomes public.**
So, as you might expect, reporters will be scouring these numbers — as will our opponents, including Donald Trump's handpicked candidate on the GOP side. Honesty, putting up a huge number at the conclusion of this quarter's deadline this Thursday is the single biggest test our campaign has faced since we launched way back in February.
**Peter, not only do we need to *look* like a strong campaign — we really need to raise the funds to build the kind of giant, inclusive field organizing operation that can reach every single voter in every single one of PA's 67 counties.**[**_We've still got a ways to go so, if you can afford it, I am asking you to please make a $5 donation directly to our campaign before Thursday's deadline to help reach our really important goal._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30712?refcode=em20210927-2795&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30712?refcode=em20210927-2795&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)**
It's not lost on me that you get a lot of requests from my team and me.
I know they can sometimes start to pile up.
But the reality is that, if we want to continue being *the* winning grassroots campaign in a crowded race for the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate seat of 2022, then we MUST raise as much money as possible before our Q3 FEC deadline happening this Thursday, September 30.
But here's what I know (and what I hope you know too, Peter): We absolutely have the team out there to make it happen. We're doing this the right way, no corporate PACs allowed. Just working people from Cresco and all across Pennsylvania.
**The only way we can win is with lots of online donations — big or small — from people like you.** [** _I've gotta ask: Will you donate your first $5 ahead of this Thursday's FEC deadline? It'd really make all the difference in this fight._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30712?refcode=em20210927-2795&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)
Thank you for everything. I'll reach back out soon.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210927-2795-footer&t=24&refcode2=2795_434096_WHbUPg&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=25&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=2795%2E434096%2EWHbUPg)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: THE IRS HAS NO BUSINESS FORCING YOUR BANKS TO HAND OVER PRIVATE FINANCIAL INFORMATION This kind of overreach is NOT OKAY, Peter. The IRS is going BEHIND the backs of American taxpayers (and our Constitution) in an attempt to put the government in the CENTER of YOU and YOUR finances. It’s time government agencies got back to serving Americans, NOT interfering with our private choices. I’m on a mission to create a smaller government that works FOR you, not against you. The IRS should NOT be allowed to act as ‘Big Brother’ and strip Americans of banking privacy -- it’s that simple. I also wanted to give you a quick campaign update -- right now, we are three days away from Elaine’s FEC deadline. That means national Republicans and election analysts alike will be analyzing Elaine’s fundraising numbers, looking for any sign of weakness.
Elaine’s numbers _need_ to be higher than her Republican opponent’s, otherwise Republicans will see her seat as any easy target to flip -- inviting more outside spending and attack ads against her.
We still have another $4,879 in the next three days to hit our goal. I know that with our grassroots team, we will.
Thanks for reading,
Kate

Elaine has already earned a reputation as a representative who delivers results. She was ranked the second most effective Member of the House, and was integral in passing the American Rescue Plan, advancing the bipartisan infrastructure package, and she’s one of the leading Democrats fighting for accountability for January 6.
Now that election experts have identified VA-02 as a _toss-up_ seat with a partisan rating of R+1, Republicans will be ready to pounce on any sign of weakness. That’s why it’s so important that Elaine reports strong fundraising numbers on her FEC report.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: (bump) Alex Padilla
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Now that we beat our recall attempt, the anti-mask, anti-vax, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to replace me are going to turn their attention to Alex.
#

Friends,
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to Senator Alex Padilla’s campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today and for Alex — is so important.
Here is the truth:
Thursday at midnight, Alex Padilla will close the books on an important official FEC fundraising deadline.
And now that we beat our recall attempt, the anti-mask, anti-vax, anti-immigrant, far-right forces that tried to replace me are going to turn their attention to Alex.
They would LOVE to take out California's first Latino Senator.
So when this deadline ends and Alex Padilla is legally required to report his fundraising numbers, they’ll be watching along with the press and everyone else.
That’s why I want to help Alex post a big number — one that will help keep him safe in the Senate. So I am asking:
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign for U.S. Senate? Do it before his official FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210927-1-15&t=1&refcode2=350_159979_RzUABb&akid=350%2E159979%2ERzUABb)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-sep21?refcode=em210927-1-15&t=2&refcode2=350_159979_RzUABb&akid=350%2E159979%2ERzUABb)**
The Senate is better with Alex Padilla in office. It’s up to us to make sure he gets to serve a full term.
\- Gavin Newsom

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=350%2E159979%2ERzUABb)

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I’m doing Ron DeSantis’ job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
And next year, I’m going to defeat him | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miaVGrM5QwkOP2EruowkycWjb6t31dMu1sOk0meKinPv986UerVLJ2ozyqhunHv9fOQ51SvXZULmI3RnH5twpDt4WIHXio485r_m787h6DuyQGkGy_ewsJPSpwqvp8yysM8J7cpQpnovEcRGM4zcVo7UroFxZO7fF0oFH7e0m-A7MStDz27fOKpEp0Zuuo5O0MJ7ESbu-qJmPH66rQsiy5EyPcTa3Iy7FOGwbxw9Z5LbJ8N_7EBwyNnum-y5PmErzxMIOusqM1HPvEt6p0bujuBqAv7EewfKGdUrMXkXH4iQTAy8r3bDPk61sTcS-NwpeO/3fo/u5DqaRwRRX-xspy706cN1Q/h0/q9wKe4YJKcbVK9kew4wToOV88MmYOrSOUmteDslU9C8)
Derek,

I’m running to defeat Ron DeSantis next year--and lately, I’ve been doing his job.

I want to tell you why.

**Here’s the deal: Ron DeSantis has failed to communicate truthfully with Floridians, failed to vigorously encourage vaccinations, failed to keep our children safe at school, and followed Texas’ lead on anti-choice legislation.

_So while he’s travelled the country raising money for his Presidential campaign, I’ve stepped up._**

The past few months have proved that DeSantis is the most dangerous governor in America. He’s put our children at risk by banning school mask requirements and played politics at every turn in this pandemic.

**Defeating DeSantis next year is incredibly important to keeping Floridians safe and making sure DeSantis can NEVER become President. That’s why I’m asking for your support today.**

**[Derek, if you can support our campaign, it would mean the world to me. clean_body: And next year, I’m going to defeat him | | | Derek, I’m running to defeat Ron DeSantis next year--and lately, I’ve been doing his job. I want to tell you why. Here’s the deal: Ron DeSantis has failed to communicate truthfully with Floridians, failed to vigorously encourage vaccinations, failed to keep our children safe at school, and followed Texas’ lead on anti-choice legislation. So while he’s travelled the country raising money for his Presidential campaign, I’ve stepped up. The past few months have proved that DeSantis is the most dangerous governor in America. He’s put our children at risk by banning school mask requirements and played politics at every turn in this pandemic. Defeating DeSantis next year is incredibly important to keeping Floridians safe and making sure DeSantis can NEVER become President. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. Ron DeSantis is attacking our rights, putting our health at risk, and continuing to erode our democracy. It’s on all of us to defeat him next year. Thanks for being on my team--we couldn’t do this without you. With Gratitude, Nikki | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

Peter, it's Congressman Dan Crenshaw.

I just had to reach out.

Nancy Pelosi's Majority is hanging on by a thread... _and she 's panicking._ We're in a great position to take back the House, but you know as well as I do that everything can change in an instant.

The Radical Left is already attacking us - they're spending millions against top conservative patriots and investing millions more in their grassroots activist networks.

With every member of the Radical Left determined to see us fail, it's absolutely critical we hit EVERY last fundraising goal. _**Falling short even one time could mean the difference between winning and losing.**_

**[That's why, today, I am coming to you with a humble request: Can I count on you to chip in $10, $25, or even just $1 to ensure we hit our critical mid-month deadline?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58423219:J0Qw522ON:m:1:3253819041:E25E0D10B38A94FFCD3D8BF5AC8C6CF8:r "That’s why,

Peter,

Joe Biden has created the worst national security and humanitarian crisis our country has ever seen.

But with hordes of unvaccinated migrants storming across our border, old Joe thought it would be a good time for a little beachside vacation.

[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=2d31814e2f1f46dc901d014a9ea1f6cb&_e=oAZ8lsi5i3L9ewu-gB0LlhM_R_rS4zkkM__R08-DDH1aaW5-_vYY7Tuir-RiHH2IjsZChFJjdJqrcxyheErb5Tq1NEBSkS4IbDFshfIjzVsJ4Jmgloa40o7UBOeDxE8I1J6RUoYlZWIP6c4jJX-494P7zM_WRpeF_GJjcPUCXL4W43setkES6hoFDxD5uSPG_4_UvEMW0QntZq1niZEMxweSNpDlXlgbvJlqnpVLp_yhSl4_7QbMB1O0sytQ5Swd0g3_iBy4iJTQpzPkAOfXuEwFB6mmILLiNPjKfOdKW-gbCtSSPFjIvXIlaIFj2nVUNpclwV3Jz75xPXxGCJ9p7KPsZXqoPn5Z_LVIZYMcT9cmWPCkq_r3NVyWCDclvOSgJoFJhVB_EFMGNENqlwfK889kK6VERUAknZIAHA5ItSVwR6q145hP5njU-cLHdsyOXpG9hCquzF9P9F7TBpH9wgglHeHQlWYT7xMK4Jq4eW16DVw70l4CabvsrcRbWmiS)

While Joe was enjoying some R&R, 14,000 migrants set up camp under a bridge in Texas...
* * _Without being tested for COVID_
* _Without masks_
* _Without bathrooms_
* _Without ample food and water_

Things have gotten so bad that even the ultra-liberal New York Times is talking about it! Take a look:
[](http://links.haroldearls.org/u/click?_t=1787314c8e75423e977ed0981a928c89&_m=2d31814e2f1f46dc901d014a9ea1f6cb&_e=oAZ8lsi5i3L9ewu-gB0LlhM_R_rS4zkkM__R08-DDH1aaW5-_vYY7Tuir-RiHH2IjsZChFJjdJqrcxyheErb5Tq1NEBSkS4IbDFshfIjzVsJ4Jmgloa40o7UBOeDxE8I1J6RUoYlZWIP6c4jJX-494P7zM_WRpeF_GJjcPUCXL4W43setkES6hoFDxD5uSPG_4_UvEMW0QntZq1niZEMxweSNpDlXlgbvJlqnpVLp_yhSl4_7QbMB1O0sytQ5Swd0g3_iBy4iJTQpzPkAOfXuP1r5UnbX0KqFp4InGMAeTMM7fILtuyUeDH4ColwSpN85UoysryE2cDKMJvBpSNovaF91n7hmHibXnE-G2Uet-IlKnuokSd713AdndTA19rXI8OF85x-kUiYGu8E6r3fdgvvQYUtP3SyHycRud28P_kodK2ZYHMS6r9VpngLMO6L7p8XFfGlEnbiqkWFK8RH4v1OcoMfssPlC42OMhPhhFeW6i-LSDA21ShPvIwkzpIt)
We’ve put up with this part-time president for long enough...

**If Joe is too weak and frail to DO HIS JOB and fix the crisis he created, we need to FIRE HIM IMMEDIATELY! **

name: Senator Jacky Rosen
subject: Why we need to keep Susie Lee in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
please read →
#
Hi folks, it's Jacky Rosen.
I’m going to ask you to **[chip in a split contribution to my friend and colleague Susie Lee’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36575318/308513760/-709327864?refcode=jr_em_nd_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWVhMjU4Zi1mMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maax1M2RVgo0gQJZiW6cVaLrSLRNKNSkijy0vSrFe00=) **\-- but first I want to explain why.
I used to represent NV-03 in the House, so this district and its constituents are close to my heart. That’s why I’m doing everything I can to make sure NV-03 continues to have a strong leader who’s willing to fight for folks across the district -- _and that person is Susie Lee_.
**I can’t overstate how close this race will be.** Susie won her last election by only 3 points, and this year NV-03 is set to be the most competitive district in Battleground Nevada.
**The GOP has already spent more than $1 million dollars to attack Susie this cycle** and we’re expecting that number to grow exponentially in the weeks ahead.
That means Susie’s Republican opponents will be searching for any signs of weaknesses in her upcoming public FEC fundraising report -- **so, it’s on us to make sure there aren’t any.**
I’m counting on you to stand with me and keep Susie fighting for NV-03 in Congress. **[Susie’s end-of-quarter public fundraising deadline is Thursday at midnight, and she needs our help to reach her goal. Can I count on you to pitch in a split donation now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36575319/308513761/-709327864?refcode=jr_em_nd_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWVhMjU4Zi1mMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maax1M2RVgo0gQJZiW6cVaLrSLRNKNSkijy0vSrFe00=)**
Thank you for your help,
Jacky

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36575320/308513762/-709327864?refcode=jr_em_nd_210927_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWVhMjU4Zi1mMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maax1M2RVgo0gQJZiW6cVaLrSLRNKNSkijy0vSrFe00=)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from this email list: [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/67fdc6bb-ee1f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2/eeea258f-f01f-ec11-981f-0050f271a1a2?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWVhMjU4Zi1mMDFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Maax1M2RVgo0gQJZiW6cVaLrSLRNKNSkijy0vSrFe00=&id=105090150)

Peter,
Our borders have been opened since Joe Biden took office. Inflation has been spiraling out of control since Joe Biden took office. Crime has increased to scary levels since Joe Biden took office.

Now, Joe has abandoned many Americans in Afghanistan, and we have become a laughing stock to not only our enemies but our allies as well.

_**Joe Biden’s presidency is a FAILURE!**_

It is up to us to hold the Biden administration accountable for the destruction it has caused thus far.

#
Peter,
Tonight, Senator McConnell and the Republican minority refused to raise the debt ceiling, effectively voting to “dine and dash” on the debt accumulated during the Trump Administration.
**[Each day, the Republicans make it more and more clear why we can’t let them flip the Senate.
