body:
Let’s support the 2021 Virginia House of Delegates candidates. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=56fda9b9f8&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| | **TINA RAMIREZ LAUNCHES WIN BACK THE SUBURBS PAC**
Friend,

I just launched the Win Back the Suburbs PAC to support Republican candidates running in competitive suburban districts.

As a suburban mother, I understand the issues that matter most to our neighbors in the suburbs. The Win Back the Suburbs PAC will work to put a check on Biden, Pelosi, and all the other Far-Left Democrats by supporting conservative candidates throughout Virginia.

Every day, I see the impact of the socialist policies being pushed by progressive liberals, from rising prices at the gas pumps and grocery stores, to the politicization of our schools, and skyrocketing crime rates. We can address these problems and support families in the suburbs, but it will take supporting great candidates with innovative solutions to do this. I’m thrilled to support these Delegate candidates, so that together we can win back the suburbs.

I’m committed to taking back Virginia in 2021 and taking back the House in 2022, and to do that we need to win the suburbs.

Thank you,

[](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=183f9eb646&e=ae0ea222da)
Tina Ramirez
Republican Front Runner
VA-07 Congressional Candidate

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: This is very personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
Kirsten Engel's campaign has been gathering steam this month. Will you join the team?
---
Earlier this month the Supreme Court decided not to block a new law criminalizing abortion in Texas. In her dissent, **Justice Sonia Sotomayor called the law “a plainly unconstitutional statute, enacted in disregard of the court’s precedents”**.
And just when we thought things couldn’t get worse, the Court announced they’ll soon hear a case relating to Mississippi’s new abortion ban. Given the now ultra-conservative court’s decision to allow the Texas abortion ban to stand, this case could **overturn Roe v. Wade** and criminalize abortions across the country.
As a woman, as the mother of a teenage daughter, and as a person who believes in the fundamental sanctity of bodily autonomy, I’m furious.
**If you agree that access to abortion is a fundamanetal right worth protecting, I need you to help send me to Congress to do something about it.**
**[Whether it’s $25 or $2,500, I need you with me today. Can I count on your help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36576543/308529164/41694283?refcode=X_092721_EOQ_E&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzgxNjdhZi1mNjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buUmtFs4UQcYghq1-69jFHb6O9LSEdxOTFz0iyQrzpc=)**

clean_body: Kirsten Engel's campaign has been gathering steam this month. Will you join the team? Earlier this month the Supreme Court decided not to block a new law criminalizing abortion in Texas. In her dissent, Justice Sonia Sotomayor called the law “a plainly unconstitutional statute, enacted in disregard of the court’s precedents”. And just when we thought things couldn’t get worse, the Court announced they’ll soon hear a case relating to Mississippi’s new abortion ban. Given the now ultra-conservative court’s decision to allow the Texas abortion ban to stand, this case could overturn Roe v. Wade and criminalize abortions across the country. As a woman, as the mother of a teenage daughter, and as a person who believes in the fundamental sanctity of bodily autonomy, I’m furious. If you agree that access to abortion is a fundamanetal right worth protecting, I need you to help send me to Congress to do something about it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = 25&refcode=X092721EOQE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzgxNjdhZi1mNjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buUmtFs4UQcYghq1-69jFHb6O9LSEdxOTFz0iyQrzpc= = 50&refcode=X092721EOQE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzgxNjdhZi1mNjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buUmtFs4UQcYghq1-69jFHb6O9LSEdxOTFz0iyQrzpc= = 100&refcode=X092721EOQE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzgxNjdhZi1mNjFmLWVjMTEtOTgxZi0wMDUwZjI3MWExYTIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=buUmtFs4UQcYghq1-69jFHb6O9LSEdxOTFz0iyQrzpc= = Appreciatively, Kirsten Paid for by Engel for Arizona Engel for Arizona PO Box 40721 Tucson, AZ 85717 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.

clean_body: | | | | Let’s CRUSH it Friend, We just got off the phone with Kelly about our online fundraising and she suggested we reach out to you, to help us with ourEnd-of-Quarter Deadline Goal. Before we reached out via email, we checked your donor file and were surprised to find out that you have yet to step up for this deadline. Take a look for yourself: | FEC END-OF-QUARTER DONOR FILE Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com Status: Top Supporter Deadline: September 30, 11:59 PM Contribution Status:MISSING | This is a very important FEC End-of-Quarter Deadline for us. We were tipped off that Lisa Murkowski and her D.C. Insiders were going to funnel thousands of dollars to her. That is why we set a goal of $20,000 to represent the 20 years she has been in the Senate. As a Top Supporter, you understand how important it is to Kelly that we reach our goals and how saddened she would be if we didn’t reach out. That is why we have activated a 3X-Impact on all donations made before our deadline. Kelly is counting on you, we are counting on you, and we both know you won’t let us down. Tomorrow morning, we are going to look at everyone who stepped up today, and we hope to see your name. Thanks, Kelly for Alaska Finance Team | | | | ==

subject: We’re both at risk

body:

But another thing we have in common is that we both represent two of the most-watched battleground districts in the country. _**We’re both up for tough re-election fights in 2022 and both our seats are essential to keeping the Democratic House Majority.**_ I’m reaching out on behalf of Susie and myself to see if you can split a donation between our campaigns to show us that you have our backs. Susie and I believe that every Nevadan deserves access to affordable, quality health care, equitable educational opportunities, and more. And we won’t be able to do that if Republicans flip the House -- and take our seats.
That’s why we’re both asking you to rush a split donation to both our campaigns. In races like ours, every dollar counts. clean_body: | | Team, My colleague Susie Lee and I are proud to represent both NV-03 and NV-04 and the diverse, hardworking residents that live in our districts. But another thing we have in common is that we both represent two of the most-watched battleground districts in the country. We’re both up for tough re-election fights in 2022 and both our seats are essential to keeping the Democratic House Majority. I’m reaching out on behalf of Susie and myself to see if you can split a donation between our campaigns to show us that you have our backs. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Both Susie and I are being targeted by Big Money Republicans who are determined to flip our two seats, which will flip the House. That can’t happen. In order to keep the progress we’ve made these past few years, we need to keep the House Majority in our hands. Susie and I believe that every Nevadan deserves access to affordable, quality health care, equitable educational opportunities, and more. And we won’t be able to do that if Republicans flip the House -- and take our seats. That’s why we’re both asking you to rush a split donation to both our campaigns. [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f5683816077475a96cfcb96ced1a2e0&_e=IgCRGv5ZM4piSmL4L3d_R5i_5lbm_Nx-YbKnxDHchLTHCNxk_0AuPr-ZPA65YvEu1wvWatl-aCWZgkZNs4CGG5YAVPXccmh2bfLWTvh0qq67219DUI8V1dKtFeq22rAvXUJlz_coh933ww6hybgpt_xmbKsBoehn-XstnMSI_uoadRQSCYiakbgiuRdrymfvx3rAm3nuKr7qWagbiZVr-OQhYBgLbpwJOzhfGQTxhrZ4hy8LGyjfYWG1Gc0VTKc2yLDhLgpwShoo90HHrRyXrIaDZCmiS2Ypo1aWY2vtKlasoCFozE_4YqJYMzeiYAaS5XM4YW9c8dLMMadoh8Xvx_xjh9gfvAszF7HGeDLUuhpYbGNn3zkjKMeB1qaekHauS0miYwziHu9Tv-IKk0pYoYPD3QJJLwYugFys6sBLEk5iywplKkP7Xn2X8_t73Nui)

| Peter- you’re seeing everything that’s going on in this country, right? Big government overreach. Democrat incompetence and socialist ideology driving food and gas prices sky-high. Runaway covid. A broken border with Mexico and a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan that has put us at greater risk of a terror attack than at any time since 9/11.

[**Are we just going to continue to allow the unraveling of our economy and national security, or are we going to come back in a red wave to take back Congress?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f5683816077475a96cfcb96ced1a2e0&_e=IgCRGv5ZM4piSmL4L3d_R5i_5lbm_Nx-YbKnxDHchLTHCNxk_0AuPr-ZPA65YvEu1wvWatl-aCWZgkZNs4CGG5YAVPXccmh2bfLWTvh0qq67219DUI8V1dKtFeq22rAvXUJlz_coh933ww6hybgpt_xmbKsBoehn-XstnMSI_uoadRQSCYiakbgiuRdrymfvx3rAm3nuKr7qWagbiZVr-OQhYBgLbpwJOzhfGQTxhra53rk3PaoY-awUyZdGbIwW5he_a9g1AIbZkFoVi7ZZp-W-FMjwbldKkolDhxtDJyRVYj4fnXeVkGNCEEZQMT_4DUmfE7hB9xRoArZNoXjgGt2CB0TK1sbWvM-1sE8Yiju7OdFCjG4tcwaj30j3SkVRuUkoaPlefgHZmuvttXmtk9ySo22cujXU2bEZWl-jktEGZPAsGqbzcW5K-ss2ARJd) I want the RED WAVE, but I need your courage, your character, and your capacity to lead this charge, especially if we want to kick liberals out of GOP seats.

**My name is Marc Molinaro, and I’m running to unseat a 2-term Democrat who bought himself a Republican seat with money from Nancy Pelosi and her friends.** This seat in upstate NY should be Republican, and the path to winning back Congress runs right through this seat.

**I need your help, Peter, to give a voice to those in our country being ignored and pushed to the side just for believing in liberty and freedom, are you with me or not?**

[** STAND WITH MARC AND HELP TAKE BACK CONGRESS **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f5683816077475a96cfcb96ced1a2e0&_e=IgCRGv5ZM4piSmL4L3d_R5i_5lbm_Nx-YbKnxDHchLTHCNxk_0AuPr-ZPA65YvEu1wvWatl-aCWZgkZNs4CGG5YAVPXccmh2bfLWTvh0qq67219DUI8V1dKtFeq22rAvXUJlz_coh933ww6hybgpt_xmbKsBoehn-XstnMSI_uoadRQSCYiakbgiuRdrymfvx3rAm3nuKr7qWagbiZVr-OQhYBgLbpwJOzhfGQTxhrYPQ2X-GH-Aqc6MnajiJZV9wcpKLEvJ9-VbpIr_RgGCedLW1i_9tDDq2J3GAalYj6dGSw2Kzei2qzdoFdzVGNCgvo7Ys_tJK-zs1Uf3G-gkpNIuvr-gcbMHyKbMWzCUrVFRolNJPJo3Pfzs6cBu3hnnqZwdOVvgbZ9BP-VeHKLc03B8qm_QpVnCCvtOrQ8p2s5-hNTROohdfbw0wtNPtJUT)
Right now, America is at a crossroads, with every decision having a profound and lasting impact for years to come. We cannot allow _"business as usual"_ to be the standard way of doing things in Washington D.C.

I’m running because I believe in America. I believe in our exceptionalism—our capacity and the need to restore our shining city on a hill. I’m running for us—we, the people! [**Will you join me in saving our nation?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f5683816077475a96cfcb96ced1a2e0&_e=IgCRGv5ZM4piSmL4L3d_R5i_5lbm_Nx-YbKnxDHchLTHCNxk_0AuPr-ZPA65YvEu1wvWatl-aCWZgkZNs4CGG5YAVPXccmh2bfLWTvh0qq67219DUI8V1dKtFeq22rAvXUJlz_coh933ww6hybgpt_xmbKsBoehn-XstnMSI_uoadRQSCYiakbgiuRdrymfvx3rAm3nuKr7qWagbiZVr-OQhYBgLbpwJOzhfGQTxhrac8oAX-9sZflNZiLvaeZrKiGwLkk1jz-Ek0Ncl3t2rM0eMRmQfkRMDTDCJxNAivUOMdNeiBvRG4eHsOEQjPaHk72-YOKlDrNjuBqytgUYKtWym6jerFfOgiZN5ZG44kDDRdNMouIBxGIxj0hLjD8ikHPHODGXDdeoGYhdIIL_yVn9m-QRcGNMu6J0OGqB7DeksXEYFZuVM3AOtEFdcMNmw)

We have an opportunity to take back a GOP seat and win back Congress. [**If you’re willing to help create the change that America deserves, then we’re that much closer to a Republican Congress.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=1f5683816077475a96cfcb96ced1a2e0&_e=IgCRGv5ZM4piSmL4L3d_R5i_5lbm_Nx-YbKnxDHchLTHCNxk_0AuPr-ZPA65YvEu1wvWatl-aCWZgkZNs4CGG5YAVPXccmh2bfLWTvh0qq67219DUI8V1dKtFeq22rAvXUJlz_coh933ww6hybgpt_xmbKsBoehn-XstnMSI_uoadRQSCYiakbgiuRdrymfvx3rAm3nuKr7qWagbiZVr-OQhYBgLbpwJOzhfGQTxhrYvFNvQXM9x8h_zQ2pGj-cyq8-MBZaj05X5AaWFRt9LO8f0AEyHmD1nsOxwGUGTTrYF3CvoxPuSg4RJUGyJjWvsEt5seeowij-abq7_J34X_JpnTe9DLi2eT6dnscJXuqC7QaomKpjtTHTyXiKukTPvBBLLcSpToWkauHdlU1kDZO1F7N6uxMCL1TWEnkoRv79SuXS_4FUhbAi3G5P_TeoH)

subject: Do you have the courage?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
NY-19 is a plus 2 Republican seat currently occupied by a Democrat. It’s time we take it back.
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=10104a42d06746259e4d843225a7b8b0&_e=MT5M0cywFAOTfhSR24OuIxN8_HenpsiwVp4wVyelpMgpsG87eWOiUtRPfQi2m_q4zyu_lQQiN5sNZZv44AbCo2jeTRVznvhYkHeGjblpyICwVUwEXamxxbXJOQNVjHU65QZHym6UH5OaZNdPU6VTVEQkgELLMHbTx5ns45MxNZCqA2o799CeZkQPbooXO_vjpLrVTwIId0klQfns3wtdi1pWasC71NnVsLLE9GUIJ-942nXGiUAMP3ajBr3vfOLanoeHuSdDRPR9iAjsoZUhxtJcHgQIEsNSKrI0safR0CPzpn0frOOOuqlviM3TzwzchkUmcKO60FEPyz1_YBOoHGhmkz8ddbQT1sj4eT9YeKKmtN6cG0pj7UCiR9zVCuqYuThA2kZhip8UnjU_iAuPDPSHvg5cnh832Akh6zqmTqMwrhtZE9128xtmuggA4Pb1)

---
| Fellow Conservative- you’re seeing everything that’s going on in this country, right? Big government overreach. Democrat incompetence and socialist ideology driving food and gas prices sky-high. Runaway covid. A broken border with Mexico and a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan that has put us at greater risk of a terror attack than at any time since 9/11.

[**Are we just going to continue to allow the unraveling of our economy and national security, or are we going to come back in a red wave to take back Congress?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=10104a42d06746259e4d843225a7b8b0&_e=MT5M0cywFAOTfhSR24OuIxN8_HenpsiwVp4wVyelpMgpsG87eWOiUtRPfQi2m_q4zyu_lQQiN5sNZZv44AbCo2jeTRVznvhYkHeGjblpyICwVUwEXamxxbXJOQNVjHU65QZHym6UH5OaZNdPU6VTVEQkgELLMHbTx5ns45MxNZCqA2o799CeZkQPbooXO_vjpLrVTwIId0klQfns3wtdi1pWasC71NnVsLLE9GUIJ--Z9hv6HCYGX-WJ5VjwEyqnXHrITOw6TD_oH23P6fcrx6jpwWOl8pnOq_kWbBR4Fcwn3XUNYEA6awlQzt9iHIRFWjEQH5fUY_LWhbSOo2NKuXtbThY67QaNdv3rLJmpQ5ViarFXhBoPdgfq6fEMj-Q8MV_130ScEntLyX-DH3-9D13JazGjirW5VeC-syj6_bDHD5lMoTRQTKwo_rZSmhnv) I want the RED WAVE, but I need your courage, your character, and your capacity to lead this charge, especially if we want to kick liberals out of GOP seats.

**My name is Marc Molinaro, and I’m running to unseat a 2-term Democrat who bought himself a Republican seat with money from Nancy Pelosi and her friends.** This seat in upstate NY should be Republican, and the path to winning back Congress runs right through this seat.

**I need your help, Fellow Conservative, to give a voice to those in our country being ignored and pushed to the side just for believing in liberty and freedom, are you with me or not?**

[** STAND WITH MARC AND HELP TAKE BACK CONGRESS **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=10104a42d06746259e4d843225a7b8b0&_e=MT5M0cywFAOTfhSR24OuIxN8_HenpsiwVp4wVyelpMgpsG87eWOiUtRPfQi2m_q4zyu_lQQiN5sNZZv44AbCo2jeTRVznvhYkHeGjblpyICwVUwEXamxxbXJOQNVjHU65QZHym6UH5OaZNdPU6VTVEQkgELLMHbTx5ns45MxNZCqA2o799CeZkQPbooXO_vjpLrVTwIId0klQfns3wtdi1pWasC71NnVsLLE9GUIJ-_RyPOAT0J0waWa1Tu38EkT9U4xWd5snRn4oproxIaH1ZaLUvqkPd-oBLWtnbcfDiGwW6D2aIBNYKOg_0aODXKL3JQYNgjiABmAPD_dQy8Pp8E6oObsn524VJQINqvLnaV3TeKdJBcXv-4G3EKNf1EHQ5MxUf69J3UmxM6jcL1yUdE7Ui0hMVGG5RrJILkCOc4f9SjEz2MDgeYMvtE0TQxw)
Right now, America is at a crossroads, with every decision having a profound and lasting impact for years to come. We cannot allow _"business as usual"_ to be the standard way of doing things in Washington D.C.

I’m running because I believe in America. I believe in our exceptionalism—our capacity and the need to restore our shining city on a hill. I’m running for us—we, the people! [**Will you join me in saving our nation?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=10104a42d06746259e4d843225a7b8b0&_e=MT5M0cywFAOTfhSR24OuIxN8_HenpsiwVp4wVyelpMgpsG87eWOiUtRPfQi2m_q4zyu_lQQiN5sNZZv44AbCo2jeTRVznvhYkHeGjblpyICwVUwEXamxxbXJOQNVjHU65QZHym6UH5OaZNdPU6VTVEQkgELLMHbTx5ns45MxNZCqA2o799CeZkQPbooXO_vjpLrVTwIId0klQfns3wtdi1pWasC71NnVsLLE9GUIJ-8zx5gDcaoyVo_NQVZZtehsOwUAjBfAcvbBvU3jLBdcdPBPAq-NG9QWVR1TfU-d5D7igmRJFfT-uDt4vgW-X4Dh_ANdBr53moEv5IYpc97QRdIkwGmsHDSsiopUQ7pOP6tNXd_epthE-s5jRK5hj1gyn1pim1Vlr7tZ5MvK8bBA41VkX4XxkRmNxsomaFgmlvH8Ed9yUI2vXGWyYMP_5NnT)

We have an opportunity to take back a GOP seat and win back Congress. [**If you’re willing to help create the change that America deserves, then we’re that much closer to a Republican Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=10104a42d06746259e4d843225a7b8b0&_e=MT5M0cywFAOTfhSR24OuIxN8_HenpsiwVp4wVyelpMgpsG87eWOiUtRPfQi2m_q4zyu_lQQiN5sNZZv44AbCo2jeTRVznvhYkHeGjblpyICwVUwEXamxxbXJOQNVjHU65QZHym6UH5OaZNdPU6VTVEQkgELLMHbTx5ns45MxNZCqA2o799CeZkQPbooXO_vjpLrVTwIId0klQfns3wtdi1pWasC71NnVsLLE9GUIJ-99nYRygHTzneq-LfIKzwZRL-TQXPArTsly154QKaOpphkfZ13DOJ0an0uOBiy7c6jey9biWjI6jZXKzvM7uKjPeWvnCiDUrtVIA8D4U9QcyKto6zUVHIu9qwqNlatKT0jW9Wv5cmvZEPzntqkZmHH_Rx1xHbrnn3B4VlD1kZmc3ev5uyQOeD90ArYOmGe_2C0yDHgdM3p45DQD39J0RC9_)

The future is in our hands, Fellow Conservative, and we need all the help we can get.

Best,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=10104a42d06746259e4d843225a7b8b0&_e=MT5M0cywFAOTfhSR24OuIxN8_HenpsiwVp4wVyelpMgpsG87eWOiUtRPfQi2m_q4zyu_lQQiN5sNZZv44AbCo2jeTRVznvhYkHeGjblpyICwVUwEXamxxbXJOQNVjHU65QZHym6UH5OaZNdPU6VTVEQkgELLMHbTx5ns45MxNZCqA2o799CeZkQPbooXO_vjpLrVTwIId0klQfns3wtdi1pWasC71NnVsLLE9GUIJ-99zSmwMIgK1i8hHkmSMVRz-OWK8Ib2X0iWo18NUG5Wm_qmh4GNjbdTExQVHhqf1Gyz0hYB3FnuSlMUQt_1BZJ9c3DKmkTtwIsN7ftjEUSE4dh4xmsmVpOxf0YDz0SjWdrOo4QxtXrsoZmEvJr7o3LbVtkqVOd8KU0LjjEqyP2qHebwDVTPIP137Tnr2IuziPHBlCserEFuujvCeGgFn_G1)
**Marc Molinaro**
Candidate
New York’s 19th Congressional District

[** STAND WITH MARC AND HELP TAKE BACK CONGRESS **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=10104a42d06746259e4d843225a7b8b0&_e=MT5M0cywFAOTfhSR24OuIxN8_HenpsiwVp4wVyelpMgpsG87eWOiUtRPfQi2m_q4zyu_lQQiN5sNZZv44AbCo2jeTRVznvhYkHeGjblpyICwVUwEXamxxbXJOQNVjHU65QZHym6UH5OaZNdPU6VTVEQkgELLMHbTx5ns45MxNZCqA2o799CeZkQPbooXO_vjpLrVTwIId0klQfns3wtdi1pWasC71NnVsLLE9GUIJ-_aG1VQh7Ft6XHVOTBiz5eoSLQTGwBBDp6Y5eeARuwXSaliWKNf1RD9gE0e17PMXTUWr81BliAqgWUciP_bV78eXMRYsCgfAR4G_S8fvQYbsRrnHVJX4PD6Z5c8-s7R8c3KOdlunrM9J4KfI42x8YCd-5ROq1TgTEeIJw9dB2bfZX243BqCZaoe4Xxc6Eip__U86CUSoxWcqpDnOJBFV_vd)

clean_body: NY-19 is a plus 2 Republican seat currently occupied by a Democrat. It’s time we take it back. | Fellow Conservative- you’re seeing everything that’s going on in this country, right? Big government overreach. Democrat incompetence and socialist ideology driving food and gas prices sky-high. Runaway covid. A broken border with Mexico and a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan that has put us at greater risk of a terror attack than at any time since 9/11. I want the RED WAVE, but I need your courage, your character, and your capacity to lead this charge, especially if we want to kick liberals out of GOP seats. My name is Marc Molinaro, and I’m running to unseat a 2-term Democrat who bought himself a Republican seat with money from Nancy Pelosi and her friends. This seat in upstate NY should be Republican, and the path to winning back Congress runs right through this seat. I need your help, Fellow Conservative, to give a voice to those in our country being ignored and pushed to the side just for believing in liberty and freedom, are you with me or not? Right now, America is at a crossroads, with every decision having a profound and lasting impact for years to come. We cannot allow "business as usual" to be the standard way of doing things in Washington D.C. I’m running because I believe in America. I believe in our exceptionalism—our capacity and the need to restore our shining city on a hill. I’m running for us—we, the people! We have an opportunity to take back a GOP seat and win back Congress. The future is in our hands, Fellow Conservative, and we need all the help we can get. Best, Marc Molinaro Candidate New York’s 19th Congressional District | | Paid for by Marc for US

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I never imagined that I would have to send this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ][IMG]

Hello,

I never imagined I would have to send this email, but as you might know, I
recently tested positive for a breakthrough case of COVID-19.

I’m in good health, and at home following CDC guidelines. But I have to be
honest about something: this pandemic has affected everything from schools
to businesses and yes, even our campaign.

We’ve had to cancel all of our in-person fundraisers for the rest of the
month. It was the right thing to do, and I’m proud of my team’s decision.
But this means our FEC fundraising goal is taking a huge hit right before
our numbers go public.

To make matters worse, a new poll was just released that shows me
neck-and-neck with my GOP opponents. In other words, we really can’t
afford to post a weak FEC report.

My team is working overtime right now to rework our strategy and ensure we
have the resources necessary to lay the groundwork for victory. And
messages like this are more critical than ever to help us reach our FEC
goal.

The truth is, we won’t reach our deadline in 3 days unless folks like you
step up and chip in to this email. So I’m personally asking:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4604?t=1007&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ]Will you donate $25 or more right now? Your contribution before our FEC
deadline will ensure we have the resources we need to fight off the GOP’s
attacks, break the stalemate in the polls, and flip Ohio’s Senate seat
blue.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/4605?t=1008&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ]Donate

Thank you for your support today. And I’m grateful to have the protection
of a safe and effective vaccine that's kept my case fairly mild.

Stay safe everyone,

Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1003&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1004&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1005&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1006&akid=1008%2E3611125%2EINyO-y ][IMG]

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: How Newsom Cheated
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [How Newsom Cheated](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooCWNGDXgDMN0LOA-65DctGy7bdxhs4RT7TEiZ10ga1fg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_27_final&n=1) That Gavin Newsom cheated in the Recall is not in dispute. He did so openly and his allies admitted it. I said so directly in a [June 28 speech in the Assembly](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopCigm5xd7KR-s4EOvPsXs7Zmp-6XxNOLrhzDffE2qBbA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_27_final&n=2). Newsom changed the laws for his own Recall right before the vote. He moved the election date in the manner of a banana republic. He instituted all-mail ballots. He bombarded us with ads even the mainstream media called lies. His Secretary of State illegally tried to exclude candidates. He also sent $600 checks from the government to voters, then asked them to return the money to his campaign. He used unlimited campaign contributions to call in $70 million from Special Interests. The good news: all of this will be harder in 2022. And while the Recall vote was for a one-year truncated term, next year’s Governor election is for a full four-year term. If voters are given a clear sense of just how corrupt our Capitol is, it can be a wave election. For instance, PG&E has just been charged with 11 more felonies – after giving Newsom $700,000 and receiving special treatment in return. Our state needs leaders of integrity who will reject this culture of corruption. Because I still believe California is worth fighting for. [Help me fight Newsom at the Capitol](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_27_final&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAy3rNd0W_MPprRCgvOorE4O6KY1PF4mETYLcMVKV7ue7w&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_27_final&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_27_final&n=5)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sept_27_final&n=6).

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities
_Sponsored message_
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpkeqrqidfphefg07m4jtgavd7stpmnq3ui9er68_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctie2ob4c5h2bs) Fellow American, [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrqn8eemk05olefqcr15n3tp698pe960qk1ugpc0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctie2ob4c5h2bs) You may be discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities, and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8f9890sk4vkvlaqq5u020aaqoi6e95qvaob7ji0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctie2ob4c5h2bs) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Taught by historian Wilfred McClay and based on his recently published history of America, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Please consider getting [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5tu3lfo534vbq5u8r1ckqepra7fmpe1h4lfflfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctie2ob4c5h2bs) as a DVD set for your home library or to give as a gift. Presenting real American history is the surest means of preserving liberty. Quantities are limited, so reserve your copy today. [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5k641pasnk4o3hueffks9a076q6g72q1qbd0ir0_rp22sh2s8i66pj2ctie2ob4c5h2bs) Thank you for your partnership with Hillsdale College and your support of its mission on behalf of liberty. Sincerely, Bill Gray Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: 10 Things I've Learned About Mississippi Politics
body:
10 Things I've Learned About Mississippi Politics
---
| | | | |
---
**10 Things I 've Learned about Mississippi Politics**
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
1. Most politicians care about only one thing – reelection
2. Most legislators believe they work for the state agencies not the people
3. If you want to move up in the government organization you must be willing to sacrifice core beliefs (or have none)
4. Politicians and some conservative groups are more concerned with short-term wins than long term changes in the direction of our state
5. Lobbyist are not the evil most believe, they are exactly what they claim to be – politicians direct anger at lobbyist as a deflection from themselves
6. There is systemic corruption and greed built into our political system
7. State agencies are ranked by the amount of money they control which promotes bureaucrats who care only about the size of their budget
8. Politicians love agency bureaucrats because they make them feel important — agencies keep special list that legislators can get you on that move you to the front of the line
9. Money is not the motivation for most state politicians, its position and power
10. Campaign finance reform was a joke played on the people of Mississippi

**COVID-19 Bonus Lesson: Politicians only care about the lives that affect them politically** ****
---
| |
---

name: Erica Smith
subject: You’re invited: An important conversation about Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
RSVP now >>
#
[**In a moment, I’m going to personally invite you to our Medicare for All virtual grassroots fundraising event tomorrow, Tuesday, September 28, at 7 PM ET**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17368?refcode=em20210927-498&t=1&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF) — with special guests Kara Eastman, Jen Perelman, and Roza Calderon.
Before I do, I want to share my personal story of navigating a for-profit health care system. I hope you’ll take a moment to read it, and then RSVP for our Medicare for All virtual event. [**If you’re short on time, click here to RSVP for this important conversation on fixing our broken health care system and putting people over profits.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17368?refcode=em20210927-498&t=2&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF)
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17368?refcode=em20210927-498&t=3&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF)
**[RSVP NOW](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17368?refcode=em20210927-498&t=4&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF)**
I had a medically fragile son and experienced first-hand the horror of navigating a for-profit health care system.
Our medical insurance and children’s Medicaid didn’t cover the medical equipment that his very life depended on. I had to get a part-time job teaching at an alternative school, and our family sold the car my eldest son used to commute to and from work. _This was our reality, and we had health insurance._
**My story isn’t unique — it’s far too common because our broken health care system prioritizes profits over people. That is fundamentally wrong and wholly immoral.**
We saw that all too well this past year as millions were left vulnerable, without healthcare, during a pandemic.
It’s time to reimagine our health care system and guarantee health care as a human right for all. It’s time for Medicare for All. **I’m running for the U.S. Senate to make that happen, and I hope you can join me tomorrow night to show your support.**
[**Will you join me tomorrow, Tuesday, September 28, at 7 PM ET on Zoom for our special Medicare for All grassroots fundraiser? RSVP now.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/17368?refcode=em20210927-498&t=5&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF)
I hope to see you there!
Blessings,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210927-498-footer&t=6&refcode2=498_3698_L62SrF&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=498%2E3698%2EL62SrF)

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Why this deadline is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
All eyes are on Alexandria and the strength of the grassroots movement behind her.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210927-2532-header&t=1&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)
You may have seen “end-of-quarter” and “FEC deadline” appear in your inbox these past few days. **We want to explain what this FEC deadline is and why it’s so important for our campaign:**
The Federal Election Commission (FEC) is tasked with collecting and reporting election data, including campaign fundraising and finances. Federal campaigns like ours submit these reports to the FEC on a quarterly basis.
Here’s a look at what the report looks like:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927-2?refcode=em20210927-2532-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2532_2526796_X1zA9q&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)
These reports are used by political pundits, the media, and potential opponents to gauge the support behind our movement and the strength of our grassroots campaign.
**This Thursday, September 30, is the Q3 reporting deadline** — when we’ll submit a report of our finances for the past three months. With three potential opponents already eyeing Alexandria’s seat, it’s incredibly important we publish strong numbers to fend off well-funded challengers.
And for a campaign like ours — one that doesn’t accept contributions from corporations and lobbyists — a strong finance report proves that small-dollar, grassroots campaigns can compete against the corrupt influence of big money in politics.
**We’ve set a goal to raise $1.7 million this quarter, and still have 12.3% to raise before our deadline on Thursday.** [If you can afford it — will you make a $3 contribution (or whatever you can) to help get us to our goal and ensure we post the strongest FEC fundraising report possible?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927-2?refcode=em20210927-2532-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2532_2526796_X1zA9q&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927-2?refcode=em20210927-2532-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2532_2526796_X1zA9q&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)**
These numbers will be reported like baseball stats on news outlets across the country, immediately after they’re published. As one of the most heavily targeted members of Congress, all eyes will be on Alexandria’s report and the strength of the grassroots movement beside her.
But, it’s not just the safety of her seat that pundits will use our report to measure — the popularity of the progressive policies and ideals that Alexandria represents are also in question.
[Your $3 contribution will ensure that our report shows strong support for Alexandria’s work to tackle the climate crisis, invest in healthcare and childcare, and take care of working families — and will power our fight to pass the policies we care about. Can we count on your $3 contribution now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927-2?refcode=em20210927-2532-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2532_2526796_X1zA9q&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)
Thank you for everything you do for our movement.
— Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210927-2?refcode=em20210927-2532-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=24&refcode2=2532_2526796_X1zA9q&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20210927-2532-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=25&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2532%2E2526796%2EX1zA9q)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. He is running for Congress against MAGA Republican Rep. subject: We're on the clock
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e78e8fef616c/i-was-just-at-our-southern-border-4967982?e=13f35c4add)
---
| |

| Right now, Democrats are plotting to force through the most aggressive big government proposals in our nation's history. **They are working to usher in socialism and they want to use your tax dollars to do it.**

Add this to the **_MOUNTAIN of crises facing Biden - our nation is in trouble._** Let's look at a quick list:

* **Afghanistan handed over to terrorists**
* **Wide open southern border **
* **Skyrocketing costs for your family**
* **Biden hiding from the media **
* **China becoming emboldened **
* **Record labor shortages**

I could go on but this email would be way too long - you get the picture. **Biden is putting our nation and our future in jeopardy, and Nancy Pelosi is his enabler. **

She gave him the keys to the car and pointed him towards a cliff. **_That would be bad enough, but he’s asleep at the wheel and is showing no signs of stopping. _**

[**_> >> This is what we’re facing. I cannot stress how critical to our nation’s future it is that we take back the House in 2022 <<<_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=1e18c42288&e=13f35c4add)

This is about more than stopping tax hikes and liberal lunacy, it's about saving our nation from a President who destroys everything he touches. **When we control Congress, we can stop Biden. **

[**_> >> I need you, and our nation needs you. Can we count on you today? <<<_**](https://jacobs4congress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f489c052d27770feb645116f8&id=3898491b59&e=13f35c4add)

**I am in this fight 100% and I won’t stop until our government is balanced and your freedoms are protected. **

Best,
Chris Jacobs

name: =?utf-8?Q?Erica=20Lee=2C=20Future=20Generations?=
subject: You’re invited: An important conversation about Medicare for All with Senator Erica Smith!
body:
Can you join us tomorrow? | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9b87dcf25a&e=66979298f9)
---
| | | [In a moment, I’m going to personally invite you to a Medicare for All virtual grassroots fundraising event in support of Erica Smith for U.S. Senate tomorrow, Tuesday, September 28 at 7 PM ET](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1b7134f8b5&e=66979298f9) — with special guests Kara Eastman, Jen Perlman, and Roza Calderon. **Can you join us?**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=1c3e5dbdb1&e=66979298f9)
---
| **Policy is personal — and for Erica Smith, that includes Medicare for All.** She had a medically fragile son and experienced first-hand the horror of navigating a for-profit health care system.

Erica’s medical insurance and children’s Medicaid didn’t cover the medical equipment that her son’s life depended on. She had to get a part-time job teaching at an alternative school, and her family had to sell the car her eldest son used to commute to and from work. This was Erica’s reality and she had health insurance.

**Erica’s story isn’t unique — it’s far too common because our broken health care system prioritizes profits over people. That is fundamentally wrong and wholly immoral.**

We all saw that all too well this past year as millions were left vulnerable, without healthcare, during a pandemic.

It’s time to reimagine our health care system and guarantee health care as a human right for all. It’s time for Medicare for All. Erica Smith is running for the U.S. Senate to make that happen, and I hope you can join us tomorrow night to show your support.
---
| [Will you join Erica and Roza tomorrow, Tuesday, September 28, at 7 PM ET on Zoom for our special Medicare for All grassroots fundraiser? RSVP now.](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=eff58127e8&e=66979298f9)

Erica Lee

name: Marc Molinaro
subject: Do you have the courage?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marc for US
body:
NY-19 is a plus 2 Republican seat currently occupied by a Democrat. It’s time we take it back.
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5e3d04a452f142f6a46f4dbdbc9875a4&_e=zdBU7S8t2A9LCrodxWMNcPPu8Bdi8rsS-7HzG0C2cZ1apNJPgbSmMyPnvOQ9DjQQBuWLXgrW2eqYxFgje5tPOUUSnQT9sW4RSIDYWd4qBNEo2e46kc97yWT4TT4ixDpFu_u8sRlDFc_qRbF9zB-9yMwHvWfGvmZvDnEujEMiQpEkLdNytzAK7xEjIGQWIwrEoZPzLF1Tp1I8wcEfIh_-nQOefLsr8Oj1qN5wDDJTdj0ejgqKYZegLkpVFs8pzSo0eeBMrlFOAyjUEOPDMTa_QH5_u01WHEDvPxyAu7FjnfH58_d9f1y0kdbnCVpkzeKmRRxKr47Lu37aeCRIvqYyHeSgYaeN20Ev_ztrLxpM7dlw0ddzzB5bviP2V0-d-ei1hlxxx0nQnXjQhRGzaHct7fXqE-YoMQWInkGuVLkxGaXKOj0vTX2XqrQiGpTU9yZtDxA4W66Cpj-xmd9puGmBcA%3D%3D)

---
| Peter- you’re seeing everything that’s going on in this country, right? Big government overreach. Democrat incompetence and socialist ideology driving food and gas prices sky-high. Runaway covid. A broken border with Mexico and a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan that has put us at greater risk of a terror attack than at any time since 9/11.

[**Are we just going to continue to allow the unraveling of our economy and national security, or are we going to come back in a red wave to take back Congress?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5e3d04a452f142f6a46f4dbdbc9875a4&_e=zdBU7S8t2A9LCrodxWMNcPPu8Bdi8rsS-7HzG0C2cZ1apNJPgbSmMyPnvOQ9DjQQBuWLXgrW2eqYxFgje5tPOUUSnQT9sW4RSIDYWd4qBNEo2e46kc97yWT4TT4ixDpFu_u8sRlDFc_qRbF9zB-9yMwHvWfGvmZvDnEujEMiQpEkLdNytzAK7xEjIGQWIwrEoZPzLF1Tp1I8wcEfIh_-nQOefLsr8Oj1qN5wDDJTdj0ejgqKYZegLkpVFs8pzSo0fZO4LMVLcQhxCGI8cc1zcjbPm0MB2gG_3X3K2MP32REwhgHTzVQXLjORDqN-liD92n1ULDVsqQNG3fdkuc5nfK1fqIybLxflyqmt4_lpo99pNWf6gmkW6FMFa_S25v8cMBgffp569GW5c4I7IClAmWaxhOVcld9hnv2yKDHxp4uVMahOnAWopMZGg59M6KwkDzTXFh300Bb6RTtnoI_AJw%3D%3D) I want the RED WAVE, but I need your courage, your character, and your capacity to lead this charge, especially if we want to kick liberals out of GOP seats.

**My name is Marc Molinaro, and I’m running to unseat a 2-term Democrat who bought himself a Republican seat with money from Nancy Pelosi and her friends.** This seat in upstate NY should be Republican, and the path to winning back Congress runs right through this seat.

**I need your help, Peter, to give a voice to those in our country being ignored and pushed to the side just for believing in liberty and freedom, are you with me or not?**

[** STAND WITH MARC AND HELP TAKE BACK CONGRESS **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5e3d04a452f142f6a46f4dbdbc9875a4&_e=zdBU7S8t2A9LCrodxWMNcPPu8Bdi8rsS-7HzG0C2cZ1apNJPgbSmMyPnvOQ9DjQQBuWLXgrW2eqYxFgje5tPOUUSnQT9sW4RSIDYWd4qBNEo2e46kc97yWT4TT4ixDpFu_u8sRlDFc_qRbF9zB-9yMwHvWfGvmZvDnEujEMiQpEkLdNytzAK7xEjIGQWIwrEoZPzLF1Tp1I8wcEfIh_-nQOefLsr8Oj1qN5wDDJTdj0ejgqKYZegLkpVFs8pzSo0N_Bz8JXT2JwI_9Y_3XyJT8NiOXSsYHKrxu4yzfcT9pboUCeU_-gE0DUz_DMJZ3QxMiMnDJiO_1JAicOEsQabEzQuQb7BI_27ghP53Tt6iL3faye3hUSQvIJFiOyku_ZmFBzo6n6-ViOSDoHPQ8azoLCTNbzetIjLe2sh9oAhVkvzvlxe7f59J14Yfz3JILOY0qj78mNNs5PI2Y36l2eSAg%3D%3D)
Right now, America is at a crossroads, with every decision having a profound and lasting impact for years to come. We cannot allow _"business as usual"_ to be the standard way of doing things in Washington D.C.

I’m running because I believe in America. I believe in our exceptionalism—our capacity and the need to restore our shining city on a hill. I’m running for us—we, the people! [**Will you join me in saving our nation?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5e3d04a452f142f6a46f4dbdbc9875a4&_e=zdBU7S8t2A9LCrodxWMNcPPu8Bdi8rsS-7HzG0C2cZ1apNJPgbSmMyPnvOQ9DjQQBuWLXgrW2eqYxFgje5tPOUUSnQT9sW4RSIDYWd4qBNEo2e46kc97yWT4TT4ixDpFu_u8sRlDFc_qRbF9zB-9yMwHvWfGvmZvDnEujEMiQpEkLdNytzAK7xEjIGQWIwrEoZPzLF1Tp1I8wcEfIh_-nQOefLsr8Oj1qN5wDDJTdj0ejgqKYZegLkpVFs8pzSo0VhvxPV6oyQkAak1moIald4k8lp1uTrdtjN_DBIKmlM566PQIYaUDPdhKtQb4hoCdFkKR-XHB7IlNBkM2qqKPe8KmL4G4wA63F91Fz4vpUe3LOJ3wlu7550QbG6n9PmCrXOp7u3sRsAhBbsFdhTkdYXB3xY25SJExldcrzyENxDIGy75ycGI4L1PWjPB3RZPcYX8aSMIDsH-ScFVQm5h1Dw%3D%3D)

We have an opportunity to take back a GOP seat and win back Congress. [**If you’re willing to help create the change that America deserves, then we’re that much closer to a Republican Congress.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5e3d04a452f142f6a46f4dbdbc9875a4&_e=zdBU7S8t2A9LCrodxWMNcPPu8Bdi8rsS-7HzG0C2cZ1apNJPgbSmMyPnvOQ9DjQQBuWLXgrW2eqYxFgje5tPOUUSnQT9sW4RSIDYWd4qBNEo2e46kc97yWT4TT4ixDpFu_u8sRlDFc_qRbF9zB-9yMwHvWfGvmZvDnEujEMiQpEkLdNytzAK7xEjIGQWIwrEoZPzLF1Tp1I8wcEfIh_-nQOefLsr8Oj1qN5wDDJTdj0ejgqKYZegLkpVFs8pzSo0SzctJtNJpZXZtBl1McYS5DjYKnUSKagP2dfmMoV2fmLadV4cstBlY7MkOcDENXd4eolGqO3rsbSM_8NKWYLB7Sp8RIR0fOCMDDHEtQwC2yzNZ5bL-bZTebh0iWCTZmqnaysQg4DLQ0s85SGG4Al6epEOLOaZeR2fEauSYN-Hrh9ZSdLOW41AnmAINx25gKRqZubLAXd8OGDU-9ZuLgd-qg%3D%3D)

The future is in our hands, Peter, and we need all the help we can get.

Best,

clean_body: NY-19 is a plus 2 Republican seat currently occupied by a Democrat. It’s time we take it back. | Peter- you’re seeing everything that’s going on in this country, right? Big government overreach. Democrat incompetence and socialist ideology driving food and gas prices sky-high. Runaway covid. A broken border with Mexico and a humiliating and deadly retreat from Afghanistan that has put us at greater risk of a terror attack than at any time since 9/11. I want the RED WAVE, but I need your courage, your character, and your capacity to lead this charge, especially if we want to kick liberals out of GOP seats. My name is Marc Molinaro, and I’m running to unseat a 2-term Democrat who bought himself a Republican seat with money from Nancy Pelosi and her friends. This seat in upstate NY should be Republican, and the path to winning back Congress runs right through this seat. I need your help, Peter, to give a voice to those in our country being ignored and pushed to the side just for believing in liberty and freedom, are you with me or not? Right now, America is at a crossroads, with every decision having a profound and lasting impact for years to come. We cannot allow "business as usual" to be the standard way of doing things in Washington D.C. I’m running because I believe in America. I believe in our exceptionalism—our capacity and the need to restore our shining city on a hill. I’m running for us—we, the people! We have an opportunity to take back a GOP seat and win back Congress. The future is in our hands, Peter, and we need all the help we can get. Best, Marc Molinaro Candidate New York’s 19th Congressional District | | Paid for by Marc for US

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Biden Administration’s COVID-19 Community Corps Program
body:
Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services seeking all records related to the so-called COVID-19 Community Corps.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Sep 27, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25923&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctY292aWQtY29ycHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Biden Administration’s COVID-19 Community Corps Program](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25923&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctY292aWQtY29ycHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==)** The HHS website describes the COVID-19 Community Corps as “an initiative to increase confidence in COVID-19 vaccines and reinforce basic prevention measures.” The government program also seeks to enlist minors (16 and older). The site reports “over 4,000 organizations and almost 10,000 individuals across the United States have joined the COVID-19 Community Corps. They’ve committed to take action to encourage their families, friends, and members of their communities to get vaccinated for COVID-19.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25923&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctY292aWQtY29ycHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25895&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaGhzLWRvY3MtYWJ1c2UtbWlub3JzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MjcyMzM2MDc=) | **[Judicial Watch: New HHS Documents Reveal Sexual and Physical Abuse of Unaccompanied Minors](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25895&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaGhzLWRvY3MtYWJ1c2UtbWlub3JzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MjcyMzM2MDc=)** The records include a spreadsheet of data from the HHS Office of Refugee Resettlement and lists 33 “sexual abuse allegations” involving “unaccompanied children” (UAC) for the time period of January 21, 2021, to February 26, 2021. These incidents seemed to be tied to “voluntary agencies” (VOLAGs), which are contractors for the federal government. Ten of the allegations of sexual abuse were made against staff and “non-staff” members. Twenty-one incidents of children sexually assaulting other children while in government contracted care facilities were reported. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25895&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvaGhzLWRvY3MtYWJ1c2UtbWlub3JzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA5MjcyMzM2MDc=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25919&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZG9qLWxlZnQtd2luZy1ncm91cHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for Information Concerning Justice Department’s Decision to Challenge Georgia’s Voter Integrity Bill](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25919&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZG9qLWxlZnQtd2luZy1ncm91cHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==)** A week after the DOJ filed its lawsuit against Georgia, on July 1 of this year, the U.S. Supreme Court upheld two Arizona voting provisions that Democrats and civil rights groups had challenged as disproportionately burdening minority voters. Judicial Watch and the Allied Educational Foundation filed amici curiae (friends of the court) briefs in support of Arizona’s law. The court’s decision is what Fitton called “a knockout blow to the Left’s tsunami of harassing lawsuits challenging virtually any effort by any state to modestly increase the security of elections and minimize the impact of voter fraud.” In response to the Supreme Court ruling, the Left appears to have become, in Fitton’s words, “desperate to short circuit the efforts of states to implement security measures such as voter ID.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25919&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZG9qLWxlZnQtd2luZy1ncm91cHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25903&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9iaWRlbnMtYmVuZ2hhemkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==) | **[Biden’s Benghazi](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25903&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9iaWRlbnMtYmVuZ2hhemkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==)** Hearings into President Biden’s disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal got underway last week on Capitol Hill. Like many Americans, here at Judicial Watch we were shocked and outraged by the Kabul debacle—the collapse of U.S. foreign policy, the chaotic airfield scenes, the suicide bombing that killed thirteen American military personnel and scores of others, the bungled U.S. drone strike that took down no ISIS enemy but managed to wipe out ten members of an American-friendly Afghan family, including seven children. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56764&L=25903&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW52ZXN0aWdhdGl2ZS1idWxsZXRpbi9iaWRlbnMtYmVuZ2hhemkvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDkyNzIzMzYwNw==)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced that it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the Department of Health and Human Services seeking all records related to the so-called COVID-19 Community Corps. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Sep 27, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == The HHS website describes the COVID-19 Community Corps as “an initiative to increase confidence in COVID-19 vaccines and reinforce basic prevention measures.” The government program also seeks to enlist minors (16 and older). The site reports “over 4,000 organizations and almost 10,000 individuals across the United States have joined the COVID-19 Community Corps. They’ve committed to take action to encourage their families, friends, and members of their communities to get vaccinated for COVID-19.” == ---|--- | | | | = | = The records include a spreadsheet of data from the HHS Office of Refugee Resettlement and lists 33 “sexual abuse allegations” involving “unaccompanied children” (UAC) for the time period of January 21, 2021, to February 26, 2021. These incidents seemed to be tied to “voluntary agencies” (VOLAGs), which are contractors for the federal government. Ten of the allegations of sexual abuse were made against staff and “non-staff” members. Twenty-one incidents of children sexually assaulting other children while in government contracted care facilities were reported. = ---|--- | | | | == | == A week after the DOJ filed its lawsuit against Georgia, on July 1 of this year, the U.S. Supreme Court upheld two Arizona voting provisions that Democrats and civil rights groups had challenged as disproportionately burdening minority voters. Judicial Watch and the Allied Educational Foundation filed amici curiae (friends of the court) briefs in support of Arizona’s law. The court’s decision is what Fitton called “a knockout blow to the Left’s tsunami of harassing lawsuits challenging virtually any effort by any state to modestly increase the security of elections and minimize the impact of voter fraud.” In response to the Supreme Court ruling, the Left appears to have become, in Fitton’s words, “desperate to short circuit the efforts of states to implement security measures such as voter ID.” == ---|--- | | | | == | == Hearings into President Biden’s disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal got underway last week on Capitol Hill. Like many Americans, here at Judicial Watch we were shocked and outraged by the Kabul debacle—the collapse of U.S. foreign policy, the chaotic airfield scenes, the suicide bombing that killed thirteen American military personnel and scores of others, the bungled U.S. drone strike that took down no ISIS enemy but managed to wipe out ten members of an American-friendly Afghan family, including seven children. == ---|--- | | | = Fox News The judge in the case of recently indicted Democratic lawyer Michael Sussmann is married to the lawyer who represented a disgraced former FBI official that worked on the Donald Trump–Russia probe that Sussmann played some role in advancing. = == Fox News Recently released documents from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) Office of Refugee Resettlement (ORR) reveal incidents of physical and sexual abuse of unaccompanied migrant children intercepted at the southern border. == == The Washington Examiner Judicial Watch president Tom Fitton, who settled a lawsuit against California to clean up dirty voter rolls, said all is not lost. He recalled how Republican Barry Goldwater lost the 1964 presidential election by a landslide, and that ushered in the Ronald Reagan dynasty in California. “If you care about our constitutional republic, you should stay and do what you can do,” he said. “A committed opposition can have a dramatic impact, even in a state like California.” == = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Peter, we assigned you to Monroe County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If we’re going to flip this Senate seat blue in a midterm election, we can’t just rely on turning out the same people who always vote.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210927-2796-header&t=1&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)
Hey, it’s Eric — John’s Deputy Campaign Manager.
In a minute, I’m going to ask you for $5 before our end-of-quarter FEC deadline strikes. But before I do, I hope you’ll allow me to unpack exactly why your donation is needed to flip this PA Senate seat blue.
**Joe Biden won Pennsylvania by just 1% in a year with record turnout.** If we’re going to flip this Senate seat blue in a midterm election, we can’t just rely on turning out the same people who always vote.
The Republicans have recently been making smart investments in registering new voters. Especially from 2016 to 2020.1 And if we want to get anywhere CLOSE to flipping this seat, **we really need to register more Democrats ASAP, or we risk getting overwhelmed in 2022.**
So, I'm asking for your help. We’ve assigned each person a county to help spread the funding around:
_[**Can you sponsor Monroe County and help register more Democrats to vote in this key swing state? Every dollar — especially before our big FEC deadline this Thursday — will help us resource a big push in all 67 counties.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30721?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20210927-2796&t=2&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)_
**You have been chosen to sponsor Monroe County. Can you chip in $5 to help us close the registration gap statewide?** | Democrats | 54,657
---|---
Republicans | 40,588
**[Yes, I can help with $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30721?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20210927-2796&t=3&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)**
It’s true there are already more registered Democrats than Republicans in Monroe County. But this is an area where we need to seriously run up the margins to keep Pennsylvania from going red statewide.
**We can't let Republicans have any kind of advantage when it comes to registering new voters. They want to make Pennsylvania a permanent red state by out-registering us.**
John Fetterman and this team can make sure that does not happen. John’s already proven he can win statewide. He’s a candidate who will bring a lot of independent voters into our fold. And, last but not least, he’s running a grassroots campaign that will reach out to new voters in every single one of Pennsylvania’s 67 counties.
**But we can’t pull this off without your help!**_[**Can you chip in $5 to sponsor our efforts to bring in new Democratic voters in Monroe County?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30721?County=Monroe+County&refcode=em20210927-2796&t=4&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)_
If even 25% of the people reading this email decide to chip in, we would meet our goal for funding this plan in just a matter of hours. This is within reach, but only if we get enough participation.
Thanks for considering a donation today.
Eric
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
1 - [PA Dept. of State Data](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30771?t=5&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210927-2796-footer&t=6&refcode2=2796_434096_nF9Z-B&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2796%2E434096%2EnF9Z-B)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

clean_body: End Of Quarter Deadline is upon us! ACT NOW! | Fellow Conservative, We don't have much time left until our major End Of Quarter deadline is here. My friend Ted Budd was just endorsed by Donald Trump, and he needs your help to make sure he hits his goal. Let's show President Trump that Ted has what it takes to win BIG in November! | Ted is running to be the next Senator of North Carolina. If we are able to reach the End Of Quarter goal, that puts us one step closer to stopping the Blue Wave from flooding North Carolina. Bottom Line: Ted Budd and I are counting on you to keep the momentum going into 2022! I know that with the help of conservatives across America we can get Ted Budd over the finish line and put him one step closer to TORCHING the Liberal Agenda. Thank you for chipping in! Rep. Jim Jordan TED BUDD IS THE TRUMP-ENDORSED REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR U.S. SENATE IN NORTH CAROLINA Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.
